If you haven't seen it yet, I’d love for you to be one of the first to **[watch it](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557753/570715000/2039595266?refcode=em-9.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxZTY3ZTYtYjQ5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T-nR0htlPRfAkJ146uiSCodBqgyJ2DJq4p7iSjJdi5I=)** : [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557755/570715010/-39051648?refcode=em-9.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxZTY3ZTYtYjQ5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T-nR0htlPRfAkJ146uiSCodBqgyJ2DJq4p7iSjJdi5I=) | [WATCH VIDEO ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557757/570715018/2039595266?refcode=em-9.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxZTY3ZTYtYjQ5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T-nR0htlPRfAkJ146uiSCodBqgyJ2DJq4p7iSjJdi5I=)
---
This isn’t just another campaign ad. It’s about where I come from, why I’m running, and what this fight means for families here in the Central Valley.
I grew up on Medicaid, in a working family that relied on food assistance and school lunches to get by. My parents worked every day in our family’s auto repair shop, but we still struggled to make ends meet.
Meanwhile, David Valadao voted to slash Medicaid, SNAP, and food assistance – all while cashing checks from the corporations that are ripping us off, raising our prices, and polluting our air.
I’m not taking a cent of corporate money. I’m running a campaign powered by people – teachers, farmworkers, nurses, and neighbors who know the Valley deserves better.
**[Please take a moment to watch this video and share it with your friends. Together, we can flip CA-22 and deliver real representation to Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557759/570715024/2039595266?refcode=em-9.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxZTY3ZTYtYjQ5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T-nR0htlPRfAkJ146uiSCodBqgyJ2DJq4p7iSjJdi5I=)**
[WATCH VIDEO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115557761/570715026/2039595266?refcode=em-9.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcxZTY3ZTYtYjQ5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T-nR0htlPRfAkJ146uiSCodBqgyJ2DJq4p7iSjJdi5I=)

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
| | |
---
Friend,In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA. **All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come.As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save."We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt
& The Turning Point USA Family
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bd7S/?__vbtrk=MzIxMjI1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIxMjI1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Our race in Virginia:
body:
---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)
---
Derek, I’m Abigail Spanberger, and I’m the Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia, the _only state_ where we can flip a Governor’s office from red to blue this year.
Early voting begins today across Virginia, and I’m reaching out to personally ask for your help.[**Will you click here to split a $20 contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_
| | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $75](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)**
---
****
Our Coordinated Campaign, Operation Virginia Victory, has an incredible organizing team doing the crucial work to turn out voters, activate volunteers, and protect access to the ballot box over these final weeks.
_In fact, we’ve knocked on more doors so far than any Coordinated in Virginia’s history!_
This is work that takes sustained resources from people like you, Derek.
According to the polls, many Virginians have not yet decided who they’ll support in this race.
That’s why Operation Virginia Victory is spanning the Commonwealth, speaking directly with voters about the issues they care about most. This team is directly responsible for driving up turnout, and the DNC has been our key partner through it all, investing in the Coordinated Campaign.
But with Trump vowing to endorse my opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, we could soon be up against his billion-dollar war chest.
[**So, I’m asking once again for your help, Derek. Together, we can — and will — win this election and stand up to Trump and Republicans’ disastrous agenda. But we need to invest now to reach voters across the Commonwealth. If that work is worth $20 to you, I hope you’ll split a contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250919_4612_fr&refcode2=4612_22930333_ArLzwI&akid=4612%2E22930333%2EArLzwI)
Thank you for your support. I am so grateful.
Abigail Spanberger

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:
I know — beyond a shadow of a doubt — that Abigail is going to bring all the residents of our Commonwealth the leadership they deserve.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115558285/570732274/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-19_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzRiNTNkM2QtYjk5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X0s7cxe_m3Mr5hY32zZhkmfoVvTbugWoxh_MYEO_LPU=)
Adam Spanberger here! I snuck out early this morning to vote for my wife, Abigail Spanberger, to be the next Governor of Virginia.
_**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115558286/570732275/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-19_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzRiNTNkM2QtYjk5NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X0s7cxe_m3Mr5hY32zZhkmfoVvTbugWoxh_MYEO_LPU=)**_
It's a privilege to see the name of someone you love — someone you believe in so deeply — on the ballot in such an important election.
I see Abigail's strength every day, Peter. I hear the conversations she's had with Virginians, who confide in her and share their dreams with her. _And I know — beyond a shadow of a doubt — that Abigail is going to bring all the residents of our Commonwealth the leadership they deserve._
_But so many Virginians still haven't decided who they'll be voting for or whether to vote at all._
[_**So, today, I hope you'll make a small contribution to Abigail's campaign to help us get out the vote. clean_body: I know — beyond a shadow of a doubt — that Abigail is going to bring all the residents of our Commonwealth the leadership they deserve. = Adam Spanberger here! I snuck out early this morning to vote for my wife, Abigail Spanberger, to be the next Governor of Virginia. = It's a privilege to see the name of someone you love — someone you believe in so deeply — on the ballot in such an important election. I see Abigail's strength every day, Peter. I hear the conversations she's had with Virginians, who confide in her and share their dreams with her. And I know — beyond a shadow of a doubt — that Abigail is going to bring all the residents of our Commonwealth the leadership they deserve. But so many Virginians still haven't decided who they'll be voting for or whether to vote at all. = = = = = = = Thanks for doing this, Adam Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We're in the homestretch now, and you deserve to know exactly what we're doing to flip Virginia blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3)
Peter, we have less than 50 days to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. **[Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to power our work?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3)
---
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the time left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
**[Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $10 or more to my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=11&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=12&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95474?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95473?refcode=em20250919-9450&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=9450%2E614464%2EpxW9o3)
---
I'm grateful to have you on my team,
Abigail Spanberger

name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Charlie’s fight lives on… in you and me
body:
His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning.

| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/MWcNvu_7u0FupPF0_mBI0qMzXVC64jce4uQfqzG62-nlkCzv5pD3A1QhxUFwes60ji4ym7eX18qpgVUncTqcNClqQ4kRQdGkeiAnGbffpFp85QtC34SPxkPVElpPCwfnMjrOjk5QtyevrgNRsVwrzvnt8GZFjR0NueybV1k1H3kjKLly2IL5l_NiP1vVvXegFCsDUzjOb0ymdfRtVkzg7uwsve7T1w5p774XSVNFIo8d-4RCSYj4VZ5r4F-HpyScX8TCXKKOSrrunTJM-fywPf3VpVPq8dqQYiyfzm6IedDEzrdEgTjkpi918ckUstIoFHgaWRUCGpsR5-QDcd4euvyUTTh1kNuwX1vMGOLg5yeQkmBVcthmwnfY0GaHjOYZ452CH44erpYaIeZ1NLHEZDl-sOcsSDK2DWzA7WhJdZhLYj7M-f8fz7Ssu2DCk7umx7KFxVNYnqnaOjw0irGhMSeFqwmyTqVeWeL1FbOPuoFAXmTAa0g5s7zS8cy3r2Apxhym1RNNbu9vSNYswux0ek6JMAXgyRcTuwIgfbCq49XZKvrxWazYmYtSW8RqYakXhZTU2E6ohdFOZuixhQjU2tjFYrcn3UMfreQSpSEfjoOBYT0-L5YplO5LOiLuVrYyRrB6iOpXSLsVCgf1iTvyL3EAiA9Edl4upcRRniTJV3D70Kc-xSEKNyvqznQQA1zKCl2HPwZGfBwzHcKoqDUfMpDUTi4kxJKgFFeVnt1mXTjbhi6ZfTMJZ8C_rnw-i3IgfEPdKt1TLgEa0tT_rjr5zTseMLR1Nn5JUJgxj6yqdPVWsdCHGl7xVOhtEtCV7Mvubi91nfOGKT9_ecqVdhPI3GgCudFYwiJNpWobs2qlnTBpGqMvrk12FBF3MMRxHKORaJaXCrNHzJ6snj7nLXUQ/_R3XSE7adb6LhYLeG8ZouSAvi6tlravN/13)
---
Dear Peter, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. **Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. ** Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. **To me, Charlie was a little brother.** That honor I will carry with me forever.
---

I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough._But his memory will.__And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. **Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. **He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.**Peter, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive...** so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.**As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten.** That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations._Let 's make the world remember him._**[Peter, the only way to do that is to make Turning Point USA the biggest thing America has ever seen... because Charlie’s legacy doesn’t end here.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/f6mNFzYU9ckIwXLVkXaIYz2gzEUOw-1sVIEM9Xn_V6Ae9E_4Nzo93Nx66xloxW47_GtIKo_EoXoTctiST7J09T94dEaP3j9d9ig_Nvx51YO8517Wdsss1YErEYkT7nub1AB9Clbl2zFbcESY1q__mGWnuWnU9Q9Ldk7wHow1rPD3BeyiaBWGyZX1_2HC_ySvfitI-YoFpQj8Gx1gaLq7-DpH6Sh3FpbUdzo2a1nVtPilWT8-Pj8DvWtmF8sCSBoBCRAqgCleGlVNAn7v2bV7dZXjGSKgaPks-3Q2ZP2VA3xwbBGdtc_K1Qdv6KowydDcqWM2wRmpyeFY6LiNYbAxOW1_ada-5P-feeNOQZ__GCivhP6msDpNUlKpVUYcBh7Gd-3d9LkS5JuZInp2u0mcDs-VcpoBV31pmE3I5BD989DYOIuuNqz7IB0yiEWKjv_UVOVkBMU0uXu9Gwzr7wMQybER_3YRlBeC59cmyZihKvE6kUQ-7aiegyM6aRr3ZuSMugr3CQlcszjtafEuJpu5lGRimuAzF3fxJdufk-iWwRALFR5sIONqkVUFZlcYsZjcU_XFiyUyxdUkCV9gGKd19HCpHsuyYTYsseFOt/Nu1DFSE5vKOpEJV0ni7Sq93X9SRPpqmd/13)**

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie gave it all. We owe him this.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpihhl8bzlkomixkipbxv7a2envdykkkz1csvqu89z6676mv2i91b0vr7l6t1uh8uh219b5p7zh04w4oz7o98zaenqf9uxy&__stmp=t2v552&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit" | | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v552&__onlt=h)
---
Friend,
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can't stay quiet._ **Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v552&__onlt=h)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie. America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on.** _We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don't you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth. That's what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight. **And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible.** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right. Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn't just start a movement... _he started a revival._** And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision... **_Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today._** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v552&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v552&__onlt=h)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v552&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v552&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Privacy Policy](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5rm10oy7ofl0e2p5eht7iywmqvh1jjxoos3eohy4k1xtysleshut4zcmz9552dwhyea1do8dzzgxed6ho6x1422dcjno85r1kyqdamnvgk8x901e0x5gc4nmqx7v0vgk29me7q3hs2m0nsmb0okbepxo64ejz2j65l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v552&__onlt=h) / [Advertise with us](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=2ckkjtiswb42nxe4oqic6cbzvalmxrq9gtktk4tgm3b4l42jybkt1jthjmgte7l2ajhwcd6xnmrcx3kx661m1wknsvohmul5x0bnqf0rysi8j75kj0pz3x5gbmufmme5lthljtanxuq1d8cu1wcle3j4wfbr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v552&__onlt=h)

Peter,
I just got off the stage at our campaign kickoff, and all I can say is: WOW.
The support that you’ve shown me is incredible. I will always be grateful to you for giving this small-town boy, turned National Guardsman, turned high school teacher, a chance to serve as Minnesota’s 41st governor. And now I’m grateful to have you on my side as we continue to write the next chapter for Minnesota.
The energy I saw out there reminded me why I’m an eternal optimist.
[**To help make sure we can keep up the momentum we built tonight, I need you. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: We can’t lose this lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40166%2E3422442%2E8jzZy5)
Peter,
Right now, we have an urgent opportunity: Katie Porter, one of the strongest progressives in the country, is **leading in the race for California Governor.**
If we can help her keep that edge, we could reshape what progressive leadership looks like — not just in California, but across the country.
We’re asking if you’ll **[chip in the average donation — $30](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250919_1_ak?refcode=em20250919-40166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40166_3422442_8jzZy5&akid=40166%2E3422442%2E8jzZy5)** — to help make Katie Porter America’s most exciting new governor.
**$30** to elect a progressive to the most powerful office outside the presidency.
**$30** to show the country how bold, people-first leadership actually works.
**$30** to stop conservatives from overtaking this race at the last minute and prove that grassroots power beats billionaire donors.
This race isn’t just about governing the biggest state in the nation — or the world’s fourth largest economy. California sets the example for other states. And Katie Porter can set the new standard nationwide.
But the conservative money machine is already circling. If we don’t hold the line now, we could lose this lead — and this chance.
**[Will you give $30 today to help Katie keep her edge and make history?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250919_1_ak?refcode=em20250919-40166&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40166_3422442_8jzZy5&akid=40166%2E3422442%2E8jzZy5)**
[Donate $30](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250919_1_ak?refcode=em20250919-40166&refcode2=40166_3422442_8jzZy5&akid=40166%2E3422442%2E8jzZy5)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250919-40166&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40166_3422442_8jzZy5&akid=40166%2E3422442%2E8jzZy5)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40166&t=5&akid=40166%2E3422442%2E8jzZy5)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: GavinNewsom.com
subject: LAST CALL: $3 before tonight's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
By the time you read this...

**Gavin Newsom is asking you to make one more $3 contribution to help Gavin Newsom's Election Rigging Response Act before our first official deadline ends at midnight.**
Why $3, specifically?
$3 because we are getting outraised and outspent right now and everyone will be looking at the report we file to see if we have what it takes to win.
$3 because a recent poll showed us at 48% and we can't get over the hump without support from people like you who care enough to win this election.
$3 because this is about stopping Donald Trump's efforts to rig the next election and giving Democrats a fair chance to take back the House.
It may not seem like $3 can make a huge difference in the most important election of the year -- the equivalent of five House races in one. But by the time you get to this point in the email, quite a few folks have already made their donation.
Now they're hoping you'll do the same. As a rebuke to Trump. To give Democrats a fair chance.
[**Please use this link to contribute $3 or whatever you can afford today to help Gavin Newsom pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. Do it before our deadline ends at midnight tonight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250920-2&refcode2=2570_4767699_t9XOci&akid=2570%2E4767699%2Et9XOci)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Erika Kirk
subject: They took Charlie. They unleashed a storm.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvpnyhb6358ozfoemckpt4tt8zhp0pjjhermain4bw7ke5k6vkapbdkjgjez8zd1vf3vytfrqeh7vhjo&__stmp=t2v8cx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
We will never surrender. Ever. p; | | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v8cx&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done.** They didn’t just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before...****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v8cx&__onlt=h)
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v8cx&__onlt=h)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v8cx&__onlt=h)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v8cx&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _“Never surrender.”_ He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision die...
---
[ **Give in Charlie’s Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v8cx&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

subject: Charlie gave everything. Now it's up to us.
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
We will never surrender. Ever. p; | | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2v8re&__onlt=h)

Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done.** They didn’t just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before...****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life.

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Sept. 2025 e-Newsletter
body:
Take a hike for loneliness County recognizes Recovery Happens & Suicide Prevention Month San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c0babbc643&u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=276a7627ae)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### e-newsletter (our 100th Edition!)

## Sept '25
---
|
* **Take a hike for loneliness**
* **County recognizes Recovery Happens & Suicide Prevention Month**
* **San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary**

* **Passage of Senate Bill 63 puts Caltrain and SamTrans’ future in voters’ hands**

* **County rallies to support Proposition 50**

---
| | |
---
|
# “This is a stand against election rigging and a signal to the entire world that we here in the Golden State are ready to fight for democracy and fight against authoritarianism with every tool we have, including the ballot box.”
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2025 Sept e-newsletter** **Special 100 th Edition** **Thank you for subscribing to our monthly newsletters and for your invaluable feedback over the past 9 years. Here’s to 100 editions and to keeping you informed, inspired and connected to our office.** **County rallies to support Proposition 50** Dear friends, At its Sept. 9 meeting, the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors approved a resolution I sponsored, along with Supervisor Lisa Gauthier, supporting Proposition 50, the Election Rigging Response Act. This measure, on the 2026 ballot, would allow California voters to adopt new congressional district maps for elections between 2026 and 2030. Texas cannot silence California. Proposition 50 is a stand against election rigging and a declaration to the world that we in the Golden State will defend democracy and resist authoritarianism at the ballot box. If passed, new maps would be drawn by the Legislature in response to Texas’ mid-decade gerrymandering, which changed district boundaries to favor one party and threatens the balance of representation in Congress Special thanks to Sen. Josh Becker, Assemblymembers Marc Berman and Diane Papan, local elected leaders, and dozens of supporters who joined Supervisor Gauthier and me at the Sept. 8 rally at 500 County Center. **Passage of Senate Bill 63 puts Caltrain and SamTrans’ future in voters’ hands** The Legislature delivered a historic win for San Mateo County this past weekend by passing Senate Bill 63. With strong bipartisan support, SB 63 gives voters the chance in 2026 to approve a regional sales tax to sustain and improve public transit. As Legislation Committee Chair on the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, I’ve worked nearly two years to secure a fair deal for San Mateo County. Without new funding, Caltrain faces deep deficits that would force service cuts, strand riders, worsen traffic, and harm air quality—just when we most need greener options. Thanks to SB 63, the future looks brighter. A stable funding stream would keep Caltrain, SamTrans, BART, and other transit systems running and improving. I’m deeply grateful to bill authors Sen. Scott Wiener and Sen. Jesse Arreguin for their leadership in bringing this measure to voters, who deserve the final say.

**San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary** San Bruno marked the 15th anniversary on Sept. 9 of the gas pipeline explosion and fire that killed eight and destroyed 38 homes in the Crestmoor neighborhood. KTVU reporters Jesse Gary and Betty Yu covered the remembrance of the nation’s worst public utility disaster. The story featured resident Rick Silverman, who recalled the night vividly, and Mayor Rico Medina, who spoke about progress since the blast and how a $70 million PG&E settlement funded a new community and aquatics center. “Because of that tragedy, the U.S., California, and communities across the nation changed how pipelines are installed and monitored,” I shared in the segment. The photo above, taken by my staff member Bill Silverfarb while working at the San Mateo Daily Journal, shows resident Fumie Tanaka being rescued by firefighters after fleeing her burning home and collapsing on Glenview Drive. It is a haunting image and a reminder of both tragedy and resilience. View the KTVU story here: [https://www.ktvu.com/news/san-bruno-continues-heal-15-years-after-deadly-pge-pipeline-explosion](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=73c1d1ed94&e=c0babbc643 "https://www.ktvu.com/news/san-bruno-continues-heal-15-years-after-deadly-pge-pipeline-explosion"). **County recognizes Recovery Happens & Suicide Prevention Month** At the Sept. 9 Board of Supervisors meeting, I sponsored a joint proclamation recognizing Suicide Prevention Month and Recovery Happens Month. Both observances are rooted in hope, healing, and the power of community. In 2024, 69 county residents died by suicide, while more than 13,000 reached out to our Crisis Line, showing both urgent need and the importance of support. This year’s Suicide Prevention theme, “Support, Your Way,” reminds us that everyone’s path is unique, and prevention is a shared responsibility. Recovery Happens Month highlights that recovery is real. Every day, people overcome mental health and substance use challenges with care that is inclusive, peer-supported, and culturally responsive. I was especially moved by Victor Barfield’s story. After battling addiction for 30 years and losing his marriage and job, Victor sought help through a local nonprofit. Now, reunited with his family, he serves as a Recovery Coach with Voices of Recovery San Mateo County. Special thanks to Dr. Jei Africa, Director of Behavioral Health and Recovery Services, for leading the presentation. [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=bad3107a28&e=c0babbc643) **Take a hike for loneliness** Let’s hike together and turn loneliness into connection! Join us at 9 a.m., Saturday, Oct. 4 at Sawyer Camp Trail in San Mateo for Take a Hike for Loneliness, a community event bringing neighbors and friends together. San Mateo County was the first in the nation to declare loneliness a public health crisis in January 2024. Loneliness and suicide are both public health challenges that demand bold action. Sometimes the simplest acts, sharing a meal or walking with a neighbor, make the biggest difference. So, bring friends, enjoy nature, and meet new people as we stroll the trail with beautiful view of the Crystal Springs Reservoir. RSVP using the QR code or contact Mike Richardson at (650) 363-4572 or email to [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). Hope to see you there!

**Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1ace7a0745&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors
---
| | | |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=276a7627ae) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=276a7627ae).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5)
---

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: For Charlie we press on
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit"

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjc813hjlhngut5dt1u663np566vdbun6ljr2if0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob2c9h2bs)
---
Friend
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znehhki0mstd5g7n78j8sc135ttgr9uc6c92jng8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob2c9h2bs)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaapkvcqk4a2r97lkpj4848jf894mndlefgbjp9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob2c9h2bs)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt7i7p6ca2prhd7qng18lqcfm6a7bg78imtqskig_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob2c9h2bs)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z22cdfnan63si6o1oap44fvq8u0ql5emu1ftei00_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob2c9h2bs)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdhshqiahmfo11p17u37mf64fhvkodk4kf57tun8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob2c9h2bs)

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Will you pray with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
"I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me"

"I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me"
\- Philippians 4:13 You've likely heard this verse before - but it's more than just words to me. ** ** It's the Truth I turn to when I'm stuck between a rock and a hard place, as a husband, a father, and House Majority Leader. It reminds me that with Faith, we never have to surrender. The Lord gives us the strength to stand tall, even when the odds are against us. ** ** Right now, I think we could all use a little extra strength. Let me explain: ** ** The battle for the House Majority is tightening by the day. And if we fall short this quarter - if we miss this critical FEC deadline - we risk handing the keys to the most extreme, Far-Left voices in Congress. ** ** We're not just talking about losing seats. ** ** We're talking about losing the only firewall preventing Far-Left Radicals from destroying everything you, me, and President Trump have fought for. ** ** [If we lose the House Majority, here's what's coming:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5hhnvelkpa372f17r6qqmuat52302ebmq99cd58_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob6c3h2bs) ** **
* A Democrat-controlled House ready to block President Trump at every turn
* Endless investigations designed to distract and destroy our movement
* No protection for the MAGA agenda - not for the border, not for the economy, not for our schools
* Unchecked power for the Left to ram their radical policies straight through
* The GOP sidelined - and your voice drowned out in Washington

** ** That's not the America we know. ** ** That's not the America our forefathers fought for. ** ** And that's not the future we are going to accept. So I'm asking you to do two things: ** ** PRAY for our country, our leaders, and your fellow Americans ** ** GO THE EXTRA MILE and pitch in a few bucks to help send more America-loving Patriots to Congress before it's too late ** ** [I know times are tough. And I know you're probably being pulled in a dozen directions. But if you believe in what we're fighting for -- and if you can spare even a few dollars -- it could make all the difference before our 9/30 deadline hits.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdnccufvigcgidf00ereb8sv47sl9hes3ts46f28_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob6c3h2bs) Do you think you can help me out? | [ YES >> ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6mlh97vmmlk842n6m6rr1t94o5fnl1dohqdr1po_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob6c3h2bs) | [ NO >> ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zopnb2gcenhfqm747jqa3u4vbhcsp6hiltjri0uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob6c3h2bs)
---|---
Look,
** **
It's going to take EVERY ONE OF US to do our part to save this country. I know it's a lot to ask but if you can afford to pitch in even a couple bucks, it would go a long way.
** **
We have a very important choice to make here.
** **
We can either sit back and see how things play out. OR we can mobilize the faithful nationwide, elect leaders who love this country, and help Make America Great AGAIN!

[Going the extra mile right here and right now is the FIRST STEP. Will you do your part?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo47j9cfm8gpthlddp9l4igupngiqqf71vnobmsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm4ob6c3h2bs)

- Steve

subject: I need you to know something very important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjvoh5utidgbo9fghhadr9hp61v2217b5nvl4im0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmcpj4chh2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd71vcoi8buri64mlp6413e3caqjkn524r1m6kv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmcpj4chh2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1jtb4nr75uboglqu99l8tel9sbabnr74jmfpbj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmcpj4chh2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqol4i1q4dh0giirk6df9td9g74jbtrjup09qa3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmcpj4chh2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza
---

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by God.

| | |
---
Friend,In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA. **All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come.As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save."We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt
& The Turning Point USA Family

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: For Charlie we press on
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit"

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr29bggf90vaja6etv98umpk4ha323gnifv7hnbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6o34clh2bs)
---
Friend
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8slrgbcgi8ohjm7uiq9eu8kdmghofi695tkgcgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6o34clh2bs)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1qcedqe4uvd167rpifc3uscepbmtc36p0mdheu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6o34clh2bs)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjhgu9j74j02m57urukoav2ihbrdrmpfo595tbsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6o34clh2bs)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhtn2ro2n13tv3dsjfh9nmfp2lcltksapnn71tog_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6o34clh2bs)

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: For Charlie we press on
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit"

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpnosnpl8a2sjnntv7c4ea1na82vfgemlbq91lrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74clh2bs)
---
Friend
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcrvlgevt7a56hsnn3u6a4fqmi2hdct7ffpj1mqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74clh2bs)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrkimtq5hf8nbun2a4hnimnd8qv5sh1uml1lbrj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74clh2bs)**
---

**Support Turning Point USA**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsl5bhacukcf02vc7r39m6vhnqcpps8l7hfqp2c0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74clh2bs)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z59pchs3dq6f0j3f9nj8p0juqc9t9beri0rq9dvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74cdh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqfg913k9d4jk8o8cul2r737pt7g9q12ue7afj78_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74cdh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z96o75kap1ucua4hbc4k3r2cbjhmn1nlo7ggr4eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74cdh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zffba9ar2rn3tg2qfd3efu7j9gj0130em2n706r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74cdh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqfd99daktmgmvnofgpprulbv4kjjssd21n6bqko_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74cdh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq9c9shno514e7khpf8mhv6uot89b9sjcig9sfcg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74cdh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8aqkde66msd9tibmqfo9qbh7dn4ogpickc33pog_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74cdh2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zimcc1va28scm5cokkmfjqua9k532obcb6a2h7v0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm6p74cdh2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The left is creating a generation of confused and fearful children
body:
If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | |
---
| | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3j5499a3vjhncdieuetqq5lnk44tp41v36alb0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvn5jt78ejfvvb574udgrs9nl6i3h7uioqqf6n3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpna9hk5e9bs6djs3mu8q684b4f0h4b2bg792vig_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbkioj2clv03e9fpsmmnp9u957n12hmqo8cl75fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znt77hvefsqm0v8e5jmbj18elk3mcruefdubvhb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo21rb72q6uofrkki66o39hd9oneum1ek0usdl2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr0i39b90m0coltu4hntnn3k87mqs18p48faatng_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zldrdfpftb876so10iivei46o5gbqtd8hmhmu7ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze129mt9bdgkjfd80ohm1bc0pphcartdj4df1crg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z02n9c5kmhvkefh6qhtu3gv8dqt6tj6oh9mfksqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8clfmutn70uk6v6r7gmnjt0bqhh140t8riiq8mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphmeo72cph2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
