clean_body: If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named BRAVE Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome BRAVE Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), BRAVE Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking BRAVE Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So BRAVE Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of BRAVE Books , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, BRAVE Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines , TV personality Missy Robertson , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. BRAVE Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 **** | Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

---|---
|
---
# You are making a difference.
They do not have the votes. Governor Braun is trying every tactic to get the votes needed to redraw Indiana's congressional maps--including making us fear retaliation from the White House. Keep up the pressure and remind Republican leaders: Indiana can't be bought or bullied.

Instead of being stiff-armed into cheating, more state leaders should listen to the real needs of Hoosiers.

**If they did, they'd probably hear: **
* Utility bills are suffocating Hoosiers
* Property taxes are crushing everyday families, and especially seniors on fixed incomes
* We are in a child care crisis that Braun promised to fix on the campaign trail, and**wasted no time breaking that promise once in power.**
* Hundreds of thousands of people in Indiana will lose their health care as a result of unpopular Republican policies.

Instead, they know Hoosiers are sick and tired of their platform of broken promises, and they are going to try to silence you because of it.

But we won't go silently.

With hopeful courage, we will continue the work of our ancestors and the freedom fighters before them, ever pursuing America's promise of freedom, liberty and equality.

Though the road there is winding, and it can feel like we are going backward, so long as we are focused on the destination, I know we will get there, _**together.**_
---
|
---
# **📍 Let's Be Clear: They're Trying to Rig the Maps **
You may have seen a graphic from the Princeton Gerrymandering Project giving Indiana's Congressional map a decent grade. But let's not get it twisted. That rating isn't about the maps for the Indiana House or Senate. It's about how we're represented in Congress--and even then, it hides what's really going on. That grade doesn't show how communities like Bloomington, Fort Wayne and Indianapolis were split up to weaken Democratic voters.

It doesn't show how Indiana's voice in Washington is being diluted on purpose.

And it definitely doesn't show why Governor Braun is pushing to rig the maps again--mid-decade--just to please Donald Trump. Let's stop pretending this is about fairness. It's about cheating. You've probably heard Republican leaders say "both sides do it." That's the distraction. But the numbers don't lie: After the 2020 Census:
* Republicans had full control over congressional map-drawing in 19 states, covering **187 seats**
* Democrats controlled just 7 states, covering **49 seats**
* The rest were drawn by courts or independent commissions

That means Republicans had nearly **four times** the power to rig congressional maps in their favor than Democrats did. And now, they want to go even further--by changing the rules in the middle of the game. This isn't about population shifts or doing what's right for Indiana. It's about locking in power before voters get another chance to speak. And it's happening because Donald Trump told Mike Braun to do it. Braun isn't standing up for Indiana. He's surrendering our voice to Washington. Let's call it what it is:

**Rigging. Cheating. Selling out the people of this state.** Hoosiers know the difference between fair and fixed.
We know when our communities are being silenced.
And we're not going to let anyone take our voice--not Trump, not Braun, not anyone.
---
| | | | |
# Milestone Bill Signings
---
## _[SEA 176](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c9a895ee86468e8e0d9593defd826d360f05371a4a4ba15d7085d990b21f94ba51bc57aca0aab6f0d78b1c1acdbceeff4acd08269e1499c1 "SEA 176")_
---
| | |
---
Indiana, like many other states, is staring down a critical nursing shortage in the next few years. The expected [14,000 shortage](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c9a895ee86468e8e58fede76f6ea7975fd1dfa4aa37d0bc425737a5f3dcb480de9641bf5c61c35ae5c3ca3cfea2234ffb4e50d9cc67a980a) would put the state's healthcare system in a precarious spot. When there are higher nurse staffing levels hospitals see f[ewer deaths, lower failure-to-rescue incidents, lower rates of infection, and shorter hospital stays.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c9a895ee86468e8e912f5aab391ecf46e2da9d47e0716567326fb8e93699bbb61230db92005bf3c11ac4fbbdbd9937b77dc7bb2834d0ae7c) However, when a nurses workload increases due to staffing shortages, [patient mortality rates increase. ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c9a895ee86468e8ee7ecf99fb45daed4a314d91a33f30b14dbdda5648a263bc2fd3eab50dec9322d14af67ab6f062e199872180ffeb850e1) These realities influenced Sen. Shelli Yoder's authoring of SB 176.
* SB 176 allows high schools students to begin earning credits towards licensed practical nurse training, allowing schools to accelerate the path of passionate people into the health care system

* By removing a barrier, students can both work on earning their diploma and prepare themselves to meaningfully contribute to Indiana's workforce while adhering to the most rigorous standards

* This bill empowers students while also empowering Indiana's workforce needs to ensure that the state is positioned to take care of every Hoosier for years to come

---
## _[HEA 1555](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c9a895ee86468e8ebd0d0a1a875e5d33e774643124ba133c9fe17e75d8d32c79435f89833ffdeca416432c3c6ee09679365cede69e7e8f77 "HEA 1555")_
---
|
---

HEA 1555, a bill which I was proud to sponsor, further addresses shortages in our health care field by creating a limited medical license for those who have graduated from international medical programs, obtained a sponsor and agreed to work in a medically underserved area.

In Indiana, [more than two million Hoosiers live in areas that the federal government has designated as having a shortage of primary care providers.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=c9a895ee86468e8eee68b13ab07c273f4fc7ae8203b7c3490e33e312e23aabe3d1ed684b5021e0d18f7f8e239c2f399699cecbc0019a06fd "more than two million Hoosiers live in areas that the federal government has designated as having a shortage of primary care providers.")

This additional flexibility is a big step in helping ensure that more Hoosiers have access to the health care they need, when they need it.
---

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvrgvdvc7tu6eu0khjo8a6rjbnemt0o8afv6akq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm9or5cth2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znm1vf78us68v5encchl6gna3sap763biknlmrgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm9or5cth2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3qqb3eb6599uk5nv8qnn97hnpclgqoq8mk54jbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm9or5cth2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq547r01tv68dl8bomp38bocneld2ren084e0190_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm9or5cth2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7brvt0glt1chr2095n3unjsdkq7gav4vnmbr6a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0sphm9or5cth2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Charlie=E2=80=99s?= Legacy via CBF
subject: Charlie Kirk gave everything to this movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Conservative Battleground Fund PAC (conservativebattlegroundfund
body:
Will you commit to carrying on Charlie’s vision?

Friend,

Charlie Kirk gave everything to this movement. He built a platform for a generation of conservatives **to stand tall, speak truth, and refuse to bow to the radical Left.**

And what did the Left do? **They silenced him.** Because Charlie represented something they feared most: **a young, bold, unapologetic conservative who inspired millions to fight for America 's future.**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z82h5uch4qg4jed3rgls2god1v5bopso24ogk6h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spjm8ob4cth2bs)
[ADD YOUR NAME: CONTINUE CHARLIE'S LEGACY](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpcbkbf5l7pg3bvp1cnl8slvnrrshqtnqgteotbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spjm8ob4cth2bs)
---

If we let the Left succeed, if we allow their violent rhetoric to intimidate us, then Charlie's vision ends here.
_**We cannot let that happen.**_
That's why Conservative Battleground Fund is launching this petition of commitment: _**to prove that conservatives will rise, speak louder, and fight harder than ever before.**_
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zntasu1s8591stkrctssgsfvdli381vma9ka3oj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spjm8ob4cth2bs)
[ADD YOUR NAME: CONTINUE CHARLIE'S LEGACY](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zga1s6ne1fc9khddenabljef8fhi9kjoqa1pnoko_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spjm8ob4cth2bs)
---

Charlie Kirk's legacy demands that we stand together--stronger, braver, and more united than ever. The Left silenced one voice, but they will never silence millions.
_**[Will you commit to carrying on Charlie's vision and standing with conservatives across America?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu6conotqlgqjg2tqf06d9o8le5vjla1v473sofg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spjm8ob4cth2bs)**_ [ADD YOUR NAME: CONTINUE CHARLIE'S LEGACY](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjrtansem4cj43t0smb967ma8n9r71dtah9ca608_rp22sh2s8i6epb0spjm8ob4cth2bs)
---

name: Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden
subject: I’m not your typical politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need every America First Patriot reading this to step up and read this email.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkyMF9XMC1GUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MTE0MDItMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MjBfVzAtRlAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzExNDAyLTI4OTkifQ/QcRtIhPtS-wV410nxscfGg)Peter,
I've never been one to shy away from a fight.
Whether overseas as a Navy SEAL or right here at home defending conservative values in Congress, I have always stood on the front lines, ready to serve, lead, and protect the country I love.
**_Now, I'm in the political fight of my life._**
Cook Political Report labeled my race a toss-up, and the radical Left believes they can buy this seat and flip Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District blue.
**Let me be clear:** that's not going to happen.
_Not on my watch. _
_Not with your help._
Democrats are furious that I've stood with President Trump every step of the way. They're pouring money into my opponent's campaign because I don't play by their rules.
And I REFUSE to quit.
They want to shut me up because I call out Biden's failures, and the Left’s attempt to rewrite our history and redefine gender, family, and morality.
**But I didn't run for office to cozy up to the D.C. elites. I ran to serve the people and protect the country I risked my life for.**
This race will come down to the wire, and every dollar counts.
[I need every America First Patriot reading this to step up and pitch in today. Your support could make the difference between victory and defeat.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDkyMF9XMC1GUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MTE0MDItMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA5MjBfVzAtRlAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzExNDAyLTI4OTkifQ/Rk9wg6buxjSq9_vj-3QJvQ)[SEND HELP NOW

Thank you for your kind support,
Derrick Van Orden U.S. Congressman (WI-03) Navy SEAL (Ret.)| |

# Saturday, September 20, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1881, Chester A. Arthur became [the third president to take office that year](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2unDAUxfHVmM7IGGOgcJGGbtKmRAZfxjfxB7LvDGL30Ty9Hbz6L_10dP481ofFgOn520YwdOQ1wVUDEEFZqbziWXePyUYAwvT8Z6MN9lilkAMXM5didRbDvarGmQNAQt-A6cZh6rUcx7nxRmmlxNxrN-96HwH6Th2dFkpNm1bboRs0H03MUnRC6G5s5TD20wBdPx8wWamZEuCQcmn_Zkzk4Qh3fkNp9xybYDzRWVn_i8mFyeW6rtZjpVzuT2dyIY-VO3tzTPy7MLlUOAniBoVLweSye6gEhdtC_lX4BnuOUDl5LI6fBSo6SMQp8wrlDR8rJ-A32NIU484LQ8CqR6bEM1oMX9voR4e-jfwfAAD__10zjGM). Rutherford B. Hayes ended his presidency in March, handing power to James A. Garfield, who was shot in July of that year and died on Sept. 19. ****With fall approaching, hummingbirds are starting to head south. If you're one of our readers trying to decide when to take down your hummingbird feeder, make sure you check out today's[ _Flyover Podcast_ for tips on timing](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtOwzAYRp_G2RI5duLL4AEBERIt6gSli-XEvxtT5yLHbRSeHhUegekbPukc6Xzs9d744MfzmxlAJTfpEdYlQEoQdYrXYV663o9mAEh-PF_MYIJxmmBS51jmBGtrfNh0lVnlAAjQDFTJa0EZ4VxmvWLWMtc56ASTrWixqKioGHG1lVXZdiLz6k7DkuASY1bygtScihpKKh0IQxiqMFifplh8TX5MPbiwTTeIRTcNWVB9SvOC6AMiDSLNuq7FNl3TtYX7j0gzB7MFvyREm795Ouye35fPY3o9hMfD6fuliUee7-ZT1Bc85qXlMovKzqsPwS-MowqfB-PDry_9K9JNkZ8AAAD__4sWewc). Hint: It depends on where you live.

## Trump to Meet with China's President
President Trump said Friday he would [meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yqzAQRp9GdHjECklQqLgNnW-bklFgsTbWDyM2dvz2GfwKqb_5zsw5H9f56ilSvv33CR1vZc74PCIyY525fqf9WAJlnxCZ8u3uk49-m0GCbuXYgpxXT_E1983qNkRA1aDrrB6UAWvHJrhlwEVpC6BGMND3gJ92WaBTGpQCYxpyJ02OIDspTWcvoK0aNHZq3HDwYEQvcSUu9fJVKHPALb7KA-tlKamJLjDvh1D_BEwCJg4YKMZzEzCFkvAUEjD5NVGmg6tnKlnApHUHahjaH2rfoi3ldsd6lNyyj_fz01S37k-KkQ5jRS9vydMb3fCfWj0c_AYAAP__xJZ8qA) at a summit in South Korea next month, marking the first in-person meeting between the two leaders in Trump's second term. Trump spoke with Xi by phone on Friday, with the Chinese leader [giving his approval](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOnCAURp8Gdxi8iOiCxTSN6Wa6aZom3Zg7ch2pCAaYsf_bN_6v0PXJvfnO-XWf7ui8C8_vuJMpS5wCndlTKZSmkl77kefVBdyJigvPDXf0uEwgQHExcBCTRec_prayZiECkhWZRqtedqD1UK1GgtDYt1Kpx_DAuZ2XB8xLp_TcKG1lWzlzfRMDiEaIrtE1KC17RY0cFuoROtYKsq7EVP-JLpSVFv8R35TqOe6VN2spR2byxmBkMJ7nWe85XIzBSIG_MoPxkrpgTN4yGD_FOAbL_zpeIr_suAs8x1dZ-RYTIcfMi9tK3Lgl9ByPI8U3XdeY-O3W3H9-S7-ZHOPsLJNfv1wN6cw_KB1VMvY4nfcud5q14rmj859ry38lfhv4FwAA__-xS5D4) of a deal for U.S. companies to take control of TikTok's U.S. operations in a discussion that also included tariffs and the war in Ukraine. Trump said in a social media post Friday after that he would meet with Xi in person at a summit in South Korea later this fall and that he will "go to China in the early part of next year."

The TikTok deal will reportedly see a group of U.S. firms, including Oracle, step in to enable TikTok to continue operating in the U.S.
## Kamala Fires Away at Democrats
Former Vice President Kamala Harris' new memoir, _107 Days_ , won't be published until Tuesday, but excerpts and leaks have [already riled up the Democratic Party](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DGchuGwyBg03IZtMNUQMN9K6NR6Zn0Nx-xf9H-FlJJZXqvT-P8YEc-Nh-YyQvaxoPus5AIpRHya_4POedD4xEwsf2DyMGXEdQ0FSqr0CNC3L4jLZc_EoEZEry2jWdacG5vtz9rLp-mrGx2lLb29k0uFhwaKbJ6haoZH-vqR6UVqrVrobGma4hbfqVOoS2sIoWlpTrv4kP2WkNn_SmXM8plsHvIs-zML8KGAoYruuqP7indLcFDDdOAQNm4TnQHSde6KimlwhvTFu1UExzRjmrb7pqx5z5rHRvjLGN0_UuMZTZL8-LQ-CzdYVVW0QOXw_kR9reHv4HAAD__1imgaE) with her criticism of party leaders.

The book recounts the compressed 107 days of her presidential campaign last fall, focusing on political rivals as well as her boss, former President Joe Biden. Of Biden, Harris said his decision to run was "reckless," that he kept making "physical and verbal stumbles," and that he called her just minutes before her crucial debate with President Trump to complain that [Harris' team was bad-mouthing him](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHSnTAMhE9jOjNCYAyFizTu_rQpGQHyw3kGM7b_x3D7DMkR0mhUSLv77a-v6Yt88MfrJ-1siovTwVcOXAqnqaTv_czL5g_amYs_Xm_aKZCbEFBJGCXCtJIP99RVq3HMyG3FptFqaHvUeqw2M_f9gEs3z8q5oWE1OpihndWC69wtY1t586jBiNAA9I2uUel2UNy0o-OBsBcd8OpLTPXv6I-ysQt3_HCql7hXwWylnFm0PwRagfa6rvo7U4kr3c-BQJtLTLdA-5AJtGcMvvjlWR9jgRZGgbZ5xj8-uVFKPsuDLznH-JYNaLnSnWWhN9NF9_M89IidAgWgBdoqmfW8fAg-91p08NrJh78Jy3_V-jH4JwAA__-My4kc). The book also explains how she settled on her choice for vice president. She writes that she preferred then-Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg, but was afraid voters would reject a ticket with a Black woman and a gay man. Buttigieg [expressed surprise](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL8GOpBZMDaFizR0lzYl8uE13sTGJ7N36P4-Ir-QbqSRZvTe1225WYq0b582oWGflx3PIyIzloXLMz2ONdBuEyLTvv3YZKP1CwiQjZgaEIuzFN_LUDvjEQH7Gk2npO5HUGqqg5FOjlb33t8HeR8Hv3qHYlUAUompl2NN5loTE4hOiLFTLUjVa4ldP3nUFsZqEOiIc2m_M-0c0Md3fmFp15zqaALz46j6jwrmCubzPNu3DTlfbQXzhVPBbAvTGvGK9yczbYRbE2wpdDRnfka3N9xwzg3A0IHWWrWBU6yLcY-TYqRjVNUgtmQp_v3yv2S9DPwGAAD__1cvffA) at that calculation. She said she rejected Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro because he seemed too ambitious, leaving Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz as her running mate instead.
## Charlie Kirk's Funeral Set for Sunday
The public funeral for assassinated conservative activist Charlie Kirk will be held Sunday at State Farm Stadium in Glendale, Arizona, with [the service](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdF7Zw9pA4SIN3UubEk1gvJ5g45WZLNq_jza_8Oor3aNzfn0tX8iZj8dPLBQk1uWg68wkQm2R9rc8zzXxgYVI-HjsWDBjXMCA02bSYJYNOb-Xe7eFSATUdxTs4MbewzBMXQqDs3dv4u_VrNY5249uIhPjZKK36Cffcfi8mQmMNcbb4QZu6EdHtp8ijQhe3Q1tLLXd_lQ-JFHM7_qidltr6XJIIs9T9T8UzApmSZQ458-mYE610EdIwXwKCukLZU0KZues6Q3oNWHLTHrntutCpTbGrOlFh-groWipej_qpWDuWtieF-fMpx_U3TwK8n9OJ98K9wrwLwAA__-CPoGO) set to begin at 11 a.m. local time (2 p.m. ET). Vance, and other leaders. The arena holds roughly 63,000 people, and organizers have arranged overflow seating at another arena next door. Enhanced security measures will be in place, including TSA-level screening. [Admission is free](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnwRsR_DYGBoYubOna0cL27_hvMFiYJEqfvnJfofNJn-7u6zpcA0VKt8-woatLHhK-joi1YhlqeWz7Ma2UwoZYKd3uYQsxLAMIUFxYDmKYA8X30DWzWxAB2wad1Mq0PWhtm9UpMwnTm24arZVqnGVrRKsnoZSSZhxtQ-7UhAUhheilvoDSrVEoW7ugCdCzTuBMNZfLd6ZUV1ziOz-xXKa8NdGtte4Haz8YeAY-vfd81DNi4E-YgReWgZeagX8c_NzHwK_5xWvmoVZMM5_WUCIhv1O5H3x5JCwhcko8FPrJKTDwTXHz_qIY6eg168RtCxT_KtR__fZ08BsAAP__3LZ_rg) with advance registration through TPUSA's website. Attendees have been asked to wear red, white, and blue. The funeral will be livestreamed on [Charlie Kirk's Rumble account](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7Fu6yAUgOGngS0RHAKYgeHqSlmqdO2IiDnYpwHbwiRR3r5KX6HzL33S_3UJl0iFlukzVvQ9r2HB516wd2yht3vd9nGmJVbETst0izWWmAMI0AfhDiBCilRe4cSTz4iAiqOXVg_KgLWOz15pBaPMAgc9aqUhy_HqnEnpKgxCQk7-rQkHQgphpD2CtmrQKJXLOEQw7CQwUV_b8Xulpc-Yy2t9YDuOa-XFz71vO1P_GJwZnNu9Xgu-E4Pz_zm2QvhB7cabT9uTSqHdWHYSU41UfoX-p-2Hh58AAAD___Pia5g) and broadcast on FOX News, CBS affiliates, and other networks.

clean_body: President Trump said Friday he would at a summit in South Korea next month, marking the first in-person meeting between the two leaders in Trump’s second term. | | | | | | Saturday, September 20, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1881, Chester A. Arthur became . Rutherford B. Hayes ended his presidency in March, handing power to James A. Garfield, who was shot in July of that year and died on Sept. 19. **With fall approaching, hummingbirds are starting to head south. If you're one of our readers trying to decide when to take down your hummingbird feeder, make sure you check out today's. Hint: It depends on where you live. Save up to 90% on your favorite brands this Fall with today's ! | Trump to Meet with China's President President Trump said Friday he would at a summit in South Korea next month, marking the first in-person meeting between the two leaders in Trump's second term. Trump spoke with Xi by phone on Friday, with the Chinese leader of a deal for U.S. companies to take control of TikTok's U.S. operations in a discussion that also included tariffs and the war in Ukraine. Trump said in a social media post Friday after that he would meet with Xi in person at a summit in South Korea later this fall and that he will "go to China in the early part of next year." The TikTok deal will reportedly see a group of U.S. firms, including Oracle, step in to enable TikTok to continue operating in the U.S. Kamala Fires Away at Democrats Former Vice President Kamala Harris' new memoir, 107 Days , won't be published until Tuesday, but excerpts and leaks have with her criticism of party leaders. The book recounts the compressed 107 days of her presidential campaign last fall, focusing on political rivals as well as her boss, former President Joe Biden. Of Biden, Harris said his decision to run was "reckless," that he kept making "physical and verbal stumbles," and that he called her just minutes before her crucial debate with President Trump to complain that . The book also explains how she settled on her choice for vice president. She writes that she preferred then-Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg, but was afraid voters would reject a ticket with a Black woman and a gay man. Buttigieg at that calculation. She said she rejected Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro because he seemed too ambitious, leaving Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz as her running mate instead. Charlie Kirk's Funeral Set for Sunday The public funeral for assassinated conservative activist Charlie Kirk will be held Sunday at State Farm Stadium in Glendale, Arizona, with set to begin at 11 a.m. local time (2 p.m. ET). The event, organized by Kirk's political organization, , is expected to draw many tens of thousands and will feature remarks from his wife, Erika Kirk, President Donald Trump, Vice President J.D. Vance, and other leaders. The arena holds roughly 63,000 people, and organizers have arranged overflow seating at another arena next door. Enhanced security measures will be in place, including TSA-level screening. with advance registration through TPUSA's website. Attendees have been asked to wear red, white, and blue. The funeral will be livestreamed on and broadcast on FOX News, CBS affiliates, and other networks. | The following stories are featured exclusively on The Flyover Podcast—a daily show that gives you the most important headlines in under 15 minutes, straight from the heart of the country. ➤ Eleven elected New York officials were arrested for staging a sit-in at ICE offices. name: Erika Kirk
subject: They took Charlie. They unleashed a storm.
body:
My husband’s voice will ring out louder and clearer than ever.

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GAP69586&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GAP69586>

Peter,

I want to thank you for loving my husband.

For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For
mourning. For remembering.

But now, I need you to listen closely...

Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they
have done.

They didn’t just try to silence a man...

They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of
God’s merciful love.

Instead, they ignited something even greater.

If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before... They have NO idea
what they have just UNLEASHED.

Not just across this country... But in me.

They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife.

And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my
husband built will not die.

I refuse to let that happen.

And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too.

Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever.

I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the
love of my life.

I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want
you to hear what comes next:
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GAP69586&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GAP69586>

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GAP69586&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GAP69586>

Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his
name.

We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever.

For Charlie,

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GAP69586&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GAP69586>

Erika Kirk

On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GAP69586&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GAP69586>

P.S. Charlie always said: “Never surrender.”

He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward.

If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision
die...

Give in Charlie’s Honor
Support Turning Point USA
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=GAP69586&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=GAP69586>

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: A&M President Resigns, Return of the Dodo, and a Social Media Good Deed
body:
Texas A&M President Mark Welsh [resigned from his position](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQhU-DOywYx2AKim3cZdstLRKGBC2GCCZ2fPuVU-wF_mqKkb73vffnulxdTDE_frsVLX1CWTLuLSER1sWtr4otesx03kduFeldc1lAwMiF4SAW72I6lkvn7U14Izu0Uo_ToJQwpnvacQg66OANeBX0BBOqQQgh5R2VcU530Z4wYUBIKeSgeu3Hi5gA9agMBqnZRaCPVGpPTyT8uBbSUTas_b2sXbJPoldjwy8GM4N53_f-740-55PBfLIZzMIwmOXEYP4CuFv5O8cNa4t08P8teXk3Qs9dIKx8i9UlvkWPhd9LpnqGtoPB3FXrX3tMKTZ1-j1WF9NXh3424mbhXwAAAP__xEGHWA) Friday amid fallout from a viral video in which an A&M student confronted her professor for teaching “gender ideology” that did not align with her religious beliefs.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1905, [Texas Baptist University](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb8GOtDYgAmFi9fQ5bVbIrMzwGiNjexJSP5-RX5hq9udo3u-7tPdseew_nc7WXktcQp0Zk8ilCa3H4kyIwW5dg05kTxSiJMG3VUwVBomdOzfU1uinQEHVZJVfXdrjIFhKDdrAAEGhdi0s0F1mxflXDvP6IBaXEzJ9oLBoEEpUI2pe-xauGnqOzPQovqiBUKWmGrZSOjl8uLf8Ump_o576e0mcuSi-VfosdDjeZ615M3F4DlQHdNa6HFzAecYfwo9Xl-YcqHHD6qa3SGcpXoEflLKLO8yWTxO9p6zueTr7th_XPK3Qk-rfwMAAP__MF99tQ) opened at the site of the former Patton Seminary in the the Oak Cliff neighborhood of Dallas. Mounting debts forced the university to close in 1912. Big Tex was [installed at Fair Park yesterday](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnMV2sXWywKSj-xl3-9kqEs0uChE0EXJy8_cn3CldNM_qkma-ru_qY4n7_7ze27R2y2_moiVvj4vz2LFwj8d7OvO-1cPsue3YSpLqAuUhw5GP6uFGQXYEMCrY4qXnQGowRD4tsDIWVBuXXGcPNr2Em1t6MjHQzLKI9MTASEAEH3U-kRpglT0obDjh1IzDFlkvfHtz47WtIn_zi0t_yJpJ9tPas3fCvk0snl-M4-pDf4znjLHRyeUXi3MkFJwSFIIql5xFTilWf-H3zMf1a7W8PvKz8CQAA___kUXAr) in the buildup to the 2025 State Fair season. ## Texas A&M President Resigns
Texas A&M President Mark Welsh [resigned from his position](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQhU-DOywYx2AKim3cZdstLRKGBC2GCCZ2fPuVU-wF_mqKkb73vffnulxdTDE_frsVLX1CWTLuLSER1sWtr4otesx03kduFeldc1lAwMiF4SAW72I6lkvn7U14Izu0Uo_ToJQwpnvacQg66OANeBX0BBOqQQgh5R2VcU530Z4wYUBIKeSgeu3Hi5gA9agMBqnZRaCPVGpPTyT8uBbSUTas_b2sXbJPoldjwy8GM4N53_f-740-55PBfLIZzMIwmOXEYP4CuFv5O8cNa4t08P8teXk3Qs9dIKx8i9UlvkWPhd9LpnqGtoPB3FXrX3tMKTZ1-j1WF9NXh3424mbhXwAAAP__xEGHWA) Friday amid fallout from a viral video in which an A&M student confronted her instructor for teaching “gender ideology” that did not align with her religious beliefs. Welsh initially defended the instructor before ultimately removing her, as well as her department head and dean, over the incident. That initial response [drew backlash](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQRk9jMrfKBmwcONiErDfdENXiorFkcMsu-uf2I1qjucBElXx6eq_-XacrxhT321_cyPNrydNOz5qImcqE271QjYF2Pu9tr4X4KHueNOhegpMapoAxvaeuCf4_BKca8sr2Q2sMONesHiyhg2AHaNs-hEGZeVZGDz0asEunm-hPGDgNSoFqzcWGvoNBk-2No0VZ0QGFyLlceCWmF9YlvfODymXOW5P8ynyvov0j9Cj0GDAlrPQ6zeu5EHqkcMzIMe9Cjx-AxE3-pMknpbrK70KJC1ORKWKReISYP8N6FBJ6bIoP92dMKVZzet02jOmjwb973sPrrwAAAP__wRKGVw) from political voices in the state, with Gov. Greg Abbott and Attorney General Ken Paxton, among others, calling for Welsh’s removal. Chancellor Glenn Hegar and the university’s Board of Regents announced Welsh’s resignation Thursday night, calling him “a man of honor” with “[selfless dedication](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb_G3rDgEWMzMHTJlq4dLWweNgpgC2hI_r5yKvUHOr3l3Xt07tdtumnnXVw_dUBVnnafItbssRRMkw5HwuwMxnLeNeaE5TvFfQIKPaGSAJ2Mdv41XVqjZmoka1GxoR-5EFTKdlPjqCUD6OdFyh4WboW0gs2DEbPlaG3r1FlGJVDGKOOiG0x_oSPg0AuJlg3NhaJxZU9d2bDgU2frX_sDU7fsofVqK-XIDf9o4NrAtdbanQoV8X4-NHB9Z4gO5M-G_Oq4uBIdnCGzXu5e540A48BHaJMyR3XeuyxO_hq0829c-d9IDwU_AQAA___JD3z8),” but acknowledging that “now is the right moment to make a change.” Welsh released a farewell statement yesterday in which he thanked A&M students: "_You make this university whole. You give it a pulse. You bring it light."_ Student leaders organized a "clap-out" as Welsh exited campus Friday morning.
## Big Tex Rises in Fair Park
The 2025 State Fair of Texas opens next week, signaled by the raising of the iconic 55-foot-tall Big Tex cowboy in Fair Park on Friday. You can watch the [full installation here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnMV2sXWywKSj-xl3-9kqEs0uChE0EXJy8_cn3CldNM_qkma-ru_qY4n7_7ze27R2y2_moiVvj4vz2LFwj8d7OvO-1cPsue3YSpLqAuUhw5GP6uFGQXYEMCrY4qXnQGowRD4tsDIWVBuXXGcPNr2Em1t6MjHQzLKI9MTASEAEH3U-kRpglT0obDjh1IzDFlkvfHtz47WtIn_zi0t_yJpJ9tPas3fCvk0snl-M4-pDf4znjLHRyeUXi3MkFJwSFIIql5xFTilWf-H3zMf1a7W8PvKz8CQAA___kUXAr). ## Dallas Team Sees Dodo Progress
The team at Dallas-based Colossal Biosciences announced a breakthrough in its attempt to [resurrect the dodo bird](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-OhCAQx_GnwY4NoMJSUFxDt9deaVBG5RbBwOwf3_7ivsJVU0zyyTe_n9twcyGGtHy7DQy-5zwkeNUIiFAGt-0FavCQ8LxLqgXwUVIeBBM9ZZoKNngX4jF0jTcj85o3YLjqr62UTOtmNd6raZp7JTtg7ioVn1vpnWMdwKwmPTbBnBjTgnHOeCsvyvcduwpQvdQwc0U6Bj5gLhdcAeHt6hyP_IRymfLWRLMi7pW0X0RYImw69lzxfBFhT5kIyzQRlisi7PioIUGtRNiPRKe87S4ddHN3qHRzv7nQsYC741ryY1lpSNQDhTeGNGHIieaZ-uwzHUPxRNimGL-_QoyhyjN12VyInzL8355PI_4CAAD__2Ski4c), which has been extinct for centuries. Colossal’s “[pivotal step](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0bHO4yAQBOCnsTsiWBvbFC6ucfdfe6W1sEuMfgwRkN_J259yr3DVFCON9Gn-fO1fGGJI99948tpePu-Jrxq5NS47no_CNRCn9sl7qoXbs6S8gwQtpBEgd8IQ3_vY02olGdXzqma9DNMkjemPVYI3UqMfwNMAXjsvrSJSehlnp73uw_oZkwakUlIN020mPcoFeNaTYa_mbpRMoeVyawc3fmH18Z1_uNxcPvu4Hq09ajf86mDrYLuu63Z5xE_ZwYalBRe5g-3Mid8dbPZZQ-JaO9goUxY2FBKEMWIVFiuTsCFXFzg5Fi6fD0xvceI3V2EL43c7Sn7eD0Es-NVCci3k1MEGyyy8Vk7hrMTiJyvG2bKwPGrhrZELGR4Xgr6s9LhCjKFOH9v9xBD_Udr_HfCzwt8AAAD__2nPm18)” was a recipe that successfully grows the primordial germ cells of Nicobar pigeons, the dodo’s closest living relative. Researchers hope to create a genetic copy of the dodo to bring it out of extinction. The company said the dodo de-extinction project could take another five to seven years. It’s also looking to revive the woolly mammoth, the dire wolf, and the Tasmanian tiger, among other extinct species. Among Colossal’s high-profile investors are Chris Hemsworth, Nicholas Braun, and Paris Hilton. The team plans to raise an additional $120 million for ongoing projects.

clean_body: Texas A&M President Mark Welsh Friday amid fallout from a viral video in which an A&M student confronted her professor for teaching “gender ideology” that did not align with her religious beliefs. | | | | | | Saturday, September 20, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1905, opened at the site of the former Patton Seminary in the the Oak Cliff neighborhood of Dallas. Mounting debts forced the university to close in 1912. Big Tex was in the buildup to the 2025 State Fair season. Check out today's Roundup for more. We're thrilled to welcome the Texas State Historical Association as a sponsor of The Texas Flyover— of the Lone Star State with our Texas History Quiz, powered by TSHA's decades of expertise in uncovering the stories, people, and events that shaped Texas into what it is today. Abilene ☁️ 93/69° | Amarillo 🌤️ 89/64° | Austin ☁️ 95/72° | Brownsville ☁️ 91/75° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 89/75° | DFW ☁️ 96/77° | El Paso 🌧️ 90/65° | Houston ☁️ 91/72° | Laredo 🌤️ 96/74° | Lubbock ☁️ 88/66° | Midland ☁️ 90/70° | San Antonio ☁️ 94/71° | Tyler ☁️ 92/72° | Waco ☁️ 94/72° Take The Flyoverwith you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Texas A&M President Resigns Texas A&M President Mark Welsh Friday amid fallout from a viral video in which an A&M student confronted her instructor for teaching “gender ideology” that did not align with her religious beliefs. Welsh initially defended the instructor before ultimately removing her, as well as her department head and dean, over the incident. That initial response from political voices in the state, with Gov. Greg Abbott and Attorney General Ken Paxton, among others, calling for Welsh’s removal. Chancellor Glenn Hegar and the university’s Board of Regents announced Welsh’s resignation Thursday night, calling him “a man of honor” with “,” but acknowledging that “now is the right moment to make a change.” Welsh released a farewell statement yesterday in which he thanked A&M students: "You make this university whole. You give it a pulse. You bring it light." Student leaders organized a "clap-out" as Welsh exited campus Friday morning. Big Tex Rises in Fair Park The 2025 State Fair of Texas opens next week, signaled by the raising of the iconic 55-foot-tall Big Tex cowboy in Fair Park on Friday. You can watch the . The fair begins next Friday, Sep. 26, and visitors will once again be welcomed by Big Tex’s waving arm, swiveling head, and iconic “Howdy, folks!” Check out more . a fairgoer's experience for the 2025 season, which runs through Oct. 19, featuring classics such as Fletcher’s Corny Dogs, as well as crab and mozzarella arancini, the Chill and Thrill Delight, the Cookie Chaos Milkshake, and Wagyu bacon cheeseburger deviled egg sliders. Dallas Team Sees Dodo Progress The team at Dallas-based Colossal Biosciences announced a breakthrough in its attempt to , which has been extinct for centuries. Colossal’s “” was a recipe that successfully grows the primordial germ cells of Nicobar pigeons, the dodo’s closest living relative. Researchers hope to create a genetic copy of the dodo to bring it out of extinction. The company said the dodo de-extinction project could take another five to seven years. It’s also looking to revive the woolly mammoth, the dire wolf, and the Tasmanian tiger, among other extinct species. Among Colossal’s high-profile investors are Chris Hemsworth, Nicholas Braun, and Paris Hilton. The team plans to raise an additional $120 million for ongoing projects. | Do you love Texas history? Are you a life-long Texan or new to the Lone Star State? Test your knowledge with our Texas State Historical Association (TSHA) is dedicated to preserving and sharing the history and stories that shaped our state. We proudly publish the Texas Almanac, the official state book of Texas, as well as the Handbook of Texas, a free digital encyclopedia of all things Texas history. Through our membership programs, award-winning publications, and educational outreach for students and teachers, we work to keep Texas history alive for future generations. Learn more and get involved at tshaonline.org. Test your knowledge with our Texas History Quiz! | ➤ Waco: Baylor alumnus and Grammy-winning songwriter Brett James was among three people killed in a plane crash in North Carolina. James is best known for co-writing “Jesus, Take the Wheel.” () ➤ Statewide: The Texas Education Agency reported Wednesday that it's reviewing hundreds of complaints about public school teachers' social media posts related to Charlie Kirk's assassination. The complaints are currently under investigation. ( ➤Plano: A Texas man** has been charged with 22 counts of threatening New York City mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani and his family. Jeremy Fistel allegedly left Mamdani a series of messages suggesting he should fear for his life. () ➤ Bexar County: A backlog of up to 45,000 voter registrations remains unprocessed ahead of the Nov. 4 elections because the California-based vendor responsible for processing the registrations is struggling financially. The election includes a vote on constructing a new Spurs arena. () ➤ Houston: Police recovered the body of University of Houston student Jade "Sage" McKissic this week after she was reported missing days earlier. () ➤ Collin County: The county animal shelter has suspended dog adoptions due to a canine distemper outbreak. The viral infection is highly contagious. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=005d3a906cd740dd9d9d019bcb8e6728&_e=jKdzCSzNpltn1c-UYWb2UMbc4VrhFpaJcGiZIYv_1zP3yrRDhIEGr3awM2xmgx5ef2Z3brF1tQ66kTUzhRLJ6B4Lm0mqQC0UNSRtl0FjW_uvxdsyAxNrpikdBjwk_OPR6Z8Bvr5f-Hrlu_w8jOEsdevpislu1LM44-NKatuFCNifB9Rg9df2AX2wN5_lT2XY1RUSljrH_6MMITMMDcJEyCYEJF3b-FB99ShWDhzn2-ch6R-Hg7sK6vHk7egNuL5R7e6UyDmiarMkmrlyN1tSrQKoL260XaerIjastHH8XrD5KdA40i421N6X48HYpNJPtcKEkMCcRzrsEFh2Q5KTxipsE28sDa5VATXzV4-_DQEHQI4iodqNawcVr6VmJOGuSPD0IlIdSNaIUHy5VRJjP0yayZL0hFO0RtRk9P37OLZEdQM1MIBEK9-eJUOw-Zb3PNIWX8er7YiHq6wybjRG8nle2hiCIgc5KxIfTzNp0zrAEI_bPflWfLWF5rxVyXjEWbNNh2hiGi5bV6L5NTo55u_gFmJ486F8IZu8b3dDos7fJ_apgLZhVcbFqTgEPkmyDLfWjhkJqhLd4TjYENDcKtlH-0_g4HETYTCbm_c5XXaA30g0otMDHycCfZigKPRH4TGxHkrxIURun2WvBd34DA%3D%3D) __
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=005d3a906cd740dd9d9d019bcb8e6728&_e=jKdzCSzNpltn1c-UYWb2UMbc4VrhFpaJcGiZIYv_1zP3yrRDhIEGr3awM2xmgx5ef2Z3brF1tQ66kTUzhRLJ6B4Lm0mqQC0UNSRtl0FjW_uvxdsyAxNrpikdBjwk_OPR6Z8Bvr5f-Hrlu_w8jOEsdevpislu1LM44-NKatuFCNifB9Rg9df2AX2wN5_lT2XY1RUSljrH_6MMITMMDcJEyCYEJF3b-FB99ShWDhzn2-d7ecl8IBn1E_qd7ZLAdDJGW9dOqBmZ44ECN95slpUyhxZqAmtHv1z9ivUFyjm6LjIKkVRQBxTBtEgO3F5Z3tvusa3Gl44DCmLMYnxQQYZAirOR89VsOBpMfu0qPXp9wwZoZJ0-2xwF7T44mmdoLdqp-XIWhjbI5jpiiCh_9jlMGmkNMT9yPiVhfh9RS0c1AgIpalQKCXfw1aGHUlaOO1IBT4bdNJRq0939pRys9LP1BXllMh20ynemODsEVfb7V1lGcTmjLmM4D0H2fvncD9nouF5DUspg8lD-5pWNx4Z77Uj2-QOJj_4mU_uSy4UrK2aniATLkyzjTA9LPRtLOMvjUUIG-1e2wlgnw7U2I3kxBPrqZmnPPCop9BPEiQWboo9mczoZXxrZwuNbTkfa-T1lqaX0HzO1B5EJ6QvmQ8L4wQ%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American, Glenn Grothman's recent Subcommittee on Health Care and Financial Services hearing highlighted some scary stats about the state of our medical system and the danger it presents to our children! **For example, Glenn reported to the committee:**
* Rates of teenage depression have nearly doubled since 2007
* Approximately 3 million high school students have reported suicidal thoughts over the past year
* Millions of our children are on amphetamines and other potent stimulants
* More than 1 in 5 American children over six years old are obese, a 270% increase since the 1970s

President Trump and RFK Jr. are on a mission to **Make America Healthy Again** , but it will take all the support they can get from allies like Glenn in Congress. [_We've created a short survey on Glenn's behalf, and we would appreciate if you'd take a few moments to give your feedback on this critical healthcare issue._](http://links.arenawins.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=b328d1435a2c4f3ab2bd0a71c982befa&_e=bQqCQF3f6tOINuRxhA6Iv40hiDDUwM0frwyF3MQQev6RDCaLboqhdYHLx963wcxac0X1VS9-OoTmrSHkg-akjPWJHvVINPnbpbNNriEgXrHz1I6CsA0G80d7D6Mmzep7st8nEVFadg70uTLqctntxmpvXl3zFtli2hevpL-2QRHiXqYbQAXnxg04BV7D0VEi3KFnrsOc0sj15LKgmaQKKxIGV9UwnHOtLVE5ZRnNUBPIfZiH25-XDTUQZJxRTw10K3tm42jjHaf-AragWwcbKYX5ZOA-YosfjGaPNhIsWReoTqYjXMkycwA3GwVqaGPBFKKI_IyKh9OYpVAMso-DPUS7if4a5g1RnCPfh064Virezq2-YhNH6m1B2eHCr7nSyEBJg21aCxk3WuhVU4YqzvmvyBZuZ2rgSbmYt3lXmINw6KPKR4oLlCi3aDck2E8OzF_bPRqxJ10JlWz1JE-qvkYU3riUqb1O35TZXObMXrGxgChHsDt3uJLdM0isXoh9Abpv_V0OUVM1ZFs8gbAoSlztwEsP3Dx8aO5jiFXBF_V7_mKEWp7rDXovUrg9fOMXDP_tY8za-GCOP5rm08NwZm2Nz8bMct-IE5PSVhPI1xo%3D)

clean_body: 3 questions we want to ask... | | | | | Fellow American, Glenn Grothman's recent Subcommittee on Health Care and Financial Services hearing highlighted some scary stats about the state of our medical system and the danger it presents to our children! For example, Glenn reported to the committee: Rates of teenage depression have nearly doubled since 2007 Approximately 3 million high school students have reported suicidal thoughts over the past year Millions of our children are on amphetamines and other potent stimulants More than 1 in 5 American children over six years old are obese, a 270% increase since the 1970s President Trump and RFK Jr. are on a mission to Make America Healthy Again , but it will take all the support they can get from allies like Glenn in Congress. | Question 1: Do you think our kids are over-medicalized? Question 2: Do you think our kids are getting enough exercise? Question 3: In your experience, do our kids have a better or worse diet than they had 20 years ago? | | FOLLOW GLENN ON SOCIAL MEDIA! | | | | ---|---|---|--- Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Action needed from your zip code
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
This is how we STOP Mamdani...
| **_A LETTER FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR, REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
September 30th is the FINAL FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day.
---
**That means it’s our LAST CHANCE to raise vital funds we need to _STOP_ communist Democrat Zohran Mamdani from becoming the next mayor of New York. **
---
_As New York’s Senior elected Republican, I’m fighting with every fiber of my being to save our state’s largest city, including launching an unprecedented city-wide GOTV effort._
---
Per _Politico_ :
---
**“New York City Republican voters are going to be hearing from Rep. Elise Stefanik. The potential gubernatorial candidate is the face of a get-out-the-vote effort for Big Apple Republicans... Stefanik and the New York GOP are targeting Republican voters who turned out in the 2024 presidential election, but have not cast ballots in mayoral elections.”**
---
However, I’ll be perfectly honest with you, Fellow Patriot... _
---
_**If we don’t reach this critical goal, we’ll lack the funds we need to keep our operation running all the way through Election Day (and beyond as ballots are counted).**_
---
That is why I’m officially launching our end-of-quarter fundraising push earlier than ever before with an ambitious target of **_1,000,000 NEW grassroots contributions_** before September 30th.
---
And given the scale of the threat we face, we need contributions from not just New York, but from all over the country.
---
That is why I’ve also set an ambitious goal of securing a contribution from every single zip code in the United States of America to SAVE the largest city in America.
---
[**_Can I count on YOU to represent your zip code by making a grassroots contribution of ANY amount? And to ensure it goes as far as possible, I’ll even ensure it has 500% impact!_**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=16aa4d7a94964de5b8c7a666f281c6d0&_e=eWbrOhc4zbisQD_ZwntkIYv_sftTcGqyG4WRFu9Ku6NO0R7CtoX-JZjjnBpV9Sqsth_jNzMPsdI2AsQihdTJ4ZZEH2lxOEjar45lmQ7ypXyC3C2IbigICDa4BXFzhziesnRAWZnsnJ5H9m-BkLDllmH9ALYwD4Kl5Lmzrg_aY7JilmOHcxgavikXRGouup7j2ExRFtN0c_feSHdJ0mKEydKow94oXEeoGVn66NLA3lI5qqq1wgvUKFBvofS9pPKtM5qm45UT2z-s-LIztoPmDljYXjtW6GP3tixD5jEFyIZm3Jv1vnNf5IRUvbciUD7UXCjg1ljNfnvvuHP95m0fIjbCzLEGXIJeziGcD-szovk4DrSbNmPY2KPI_JciiNMK_DqD4tyJCrgfeMATnCkip1jFwU22xXrSygEahMgpbEx4Ei3ILRYJdY8tkjHmZRkigEtowY089NSnKNR9tqFQ8aHd6Y5UABFbbQOQ_2ozUQuj6vMqwZs6OHk03wGMBFGxAaTopD-KUmPbSLmVyduKqece-US67-eN9VeWizzhKV4S5-ISdVYS54uWLj3pohREJYqOBaW5zKBNk5dpnW356UjF-9DIzYRs8UimKi2f1d8%3D)
---
You see, while it may be easy to dismiss this as a problem for New York alone, that couldn’t be further from the truth.
---
The consequences of a Mamdani victory will not be limited to New York.
---
The rise of Zohran Mamdani bears a lot of similarity to the rise of a radical young community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama.
---
In fact, many are already calling Zohran Mamdani “the next Obama,” and Obama has even called Mamdani to offer his advice and support!
---
_Knowing what you know now, if you had the chance to destroy Obama’s political career _before_ he rose to national prominence, wouldn’t you do everything in your power to do so? _
---
Well, this is our chance to _STOP_ the next Obama!
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount before the upcoming end-of-quarter deadline to represent your zip code in the battle to STOP New York from falling to communism – for 500% impact.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=16aa4d7a94964de5b8c7a666f281c6d0&_e=eWbrOhc4zbisQD_ZwntkIYv_sftTcGqyG4WRFu9Ku6NO0R7CtoX-JZjjnBpV9Sqsth_jNzMPsdI2AsQihdTJ4ZZEH2lxOEjar45lmQ7ypXyC3C2IbigICDa4BXFzhziesnRAWZnsnJ5H9m-BkLDllmH9ALYwD4Kl5Lmzrg_aY7JilmOHcxgavikXRGouup7j2ExRFtN0c_feSHdJ0mKEye7LL_RFx8jJ3nxIG5BgdzekVhq7SQk-zxmR36Qb4w-SKE_o7GPKFattouVEGQonGHcrghbacXe2_Fscad9ssErZu7kuWCh6EErIZc1btinvlblk2jDYe77pq7s1EUHonZyU3-iNTiKutPDtdjwJPUTwcRhuzO_GM9oecBHIUC22dSs5zRX8lE1j521N7lq3M19JaN7osS3qLzw-EzJMUGb9e5ZDryK7YaOrmUue8D3GtZH4ATsi1VG3FkK7Fmq4I5pnwhtvO-9k1ECyPJZR3Sb1BzWqmgqeY5Xoe5FnAPOq49zBcsEiDZqa2iRQXPsInKzE4eYGsylynsEF8CFiQuBfeOMl_QQnaZvfZwSrN0X9FKwTw2Tq95K-qEMj3LoYlm_BCJD4QghUihGBSIenNn0%3D)

clean_body: This is how we STOP Mamdani... | A LETTER FROM THE HOUSE GOP LEADERSHIP CHAIR, REP. ELISE STEFANIK Fellow Patriot, September 30th is the FINAL FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline before Election Day. That means it’s our LAST CHANCE to raise vital funds we need to STOP communist Democrat Zohran Mamdani from becoming the next mayor of New York. As New York’s Senior elected Republican, I’m fighting with every fiber of my being to save our state’s largest city, including launching an unprecedented city-wide GOTV effort. Per Politico : “New York City Republican voters are going to be hearing from Rep. Elise Stefanik. The potential gubernatorial candidate is the face of a get-out-the-vote effort for Big Apple Republicans... Stefanik and the New York GOP are targeting Republican voters who turned out in the 2024 presidential election, but have not cast ballots in mayoral elections.” However, I’ll be perfectly honest with you, Fellow Patriot... If we don’t reach this critical goal, we’ll lack the funds we need to keep our operation running all the way through Election Day (and beyond as ballots are counted). That is why I’m officially launching our end-of-quarter fundraising push earlier than ever before with an ambitious target of 1,000,000 NEW grassroots contributions before September 30th. And given the scale of the threat we face, we need contributions from not just New York, but from all over the country. That is why I’ve also set an ambitious goal of securing a contribution from every single zip code in the United States of America to SAVE the largest city in America. You see, while it may be easy to dismiss this as a problem for New York alone, that couldn’t be further from the truth. The consequences of a Mamdani victory will not be limited to New York. The rise of Zohran Mamdani bears a lot of similarity to the rise of a radical young community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama. In fact, many are already calling Zohran Mamdani “the next Obama,” and Obama has even called Mamdani to offer his advice and support! Knowing what you know now, if you had the chance to destroy Obama’s political career before he rose to national prominence, wouldn’t you do everything in your power to do so? Well, this is our chance to STOP the next Obama! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Fran Hong
subject: We’ve been told that doing better isn’t possible. That’s bullshit.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
All we need to do is fight. Don’t let anyone tell you we can’t do this.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef5781c5-769a-4b43-aeb6-a1719348b11c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Years before I was called to run for the Wisconsin State Assembly, I started out my career as a line cook in a kitchen...right across the street from the state capitol. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e306fef-47d3-46d2-ad56-3d4f4d2587ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) A lot of people in that building don’t seem to get why it’s so damn hard to get by these days, and it shows. Over the years, I worked my way up from the dish pit to executive chef and even opened my own restaurant. Like so many service workers, I learned what it means to hustle just to survive. Working hard doesn’t always mean you can keep up. One wrong step can lay you out flat. That’s not an accident. The government works for billionaires and big corporations. Their wealth skyrockets while the rest of us scramble to keep our lives together. Enough. Five years ago, my community sent me to the Capitol. As a single mom, a service worker, and a community organizer, I’ve seen the mess up close — and now I’m running for Governor to clean it up. [Let’s build a Wisconsin where we share the table—where everyone has a seat, a say, and a fair shot at a better life. If you can, please split a contribution of $5 or more between Blue Amp Action and our team today to become a Founding Donor of this grassroots-powered campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5673414b-8530-46eb-9d4e-081341a00391/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ff4db1a-a791-4fe7-8b2b-850fdbc0fb64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| For years, we’ve been told that better isn’t possible. Let me tell you: that’s bullshit. We can do better. We can fully fund our public schools and provide universal childcare for our kids. We can guarantee paid leave and cheaper healthcare for every Wisconsinite. We can fix this broken system that puts billionaires and corporations over workers and small businesses. All we need to do is fight. Don’t let anyone tell you we can’t do this. I’m running for governor because I know that, together, we can make better possible. [This campaign might be in my name, but it’s by and for working people. We’ll only win if we work together. Please split a donation of $5 or more between me and Blue Amp Action as a Founding Donor to kickstart my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf030988-b6fd-435b-bf3b-90a8343a8f45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| In solidarity, Fran

[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T468aae5d-327c-42db-8854-7f566e0e1ec3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf96165d6-a0f5-44cc-a6d1-d2835d7f0a2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My husband is gone — but his mission is alive in ME.
body:
Charlie gave everything. Now it’s up to us.

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MREP69597&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MREP69597>

Peter,

I want to thank you for loving my husband.

For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For
mourning. For remembering.

But now, I need you to listen closely...

Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they
have done.

They didn’t just try to silence a man...

They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of
God’s merciful love.

Instead, they ignited something even greater.

If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before... They have NO idea
what they have just UNLEASHED.

Not just across this country... But in me.

They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife.

And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my
husband built will not die.

I refuse to let that happen.

And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too.

Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever.

I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the
love of my life.

I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want
you to hear what comes next:
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MREP69597&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MREP69597>

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MREP69597&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MREP69597>

Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his
name.

We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever.

For Charlie,

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MREP69597&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MREP69597>

Erika Kirk

On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MREP69597&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MREP69597>

P.S. Charlie always said: “Never surrender.”

He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward.

clean_body: Charlie gave everything. Now it’s up to us. <> Peter, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, I need you to listen closely... Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done. They didn’t just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before... They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED. Not just across this country... But in me. They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. I refuse to let that happen. And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life. I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next: <> <> Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie, <> Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family <> P.S. Charlie always said: “Never surrender.” He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi is a picture of American success
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/mssuccess?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**They say a picture is worth a thousand words, so today I’m sharing two striking images that tell an inspiring story about Mississippi’s progress.**

The first is a U.S. map highlighting household income growth in 2024. Darker shades indicate faster growth, and Mississippi shines bright with the second-highest increase in the nation at an impressive 6%.
---
|
---
_Household income growth by state 2024_
| While 21 states saw no income growth, our state is surging ahead.

**The second image, created by our team at MCPP, compares vehicle production in Mississippi and Alabama to my native UK over the past 15 years.** The contrast is staggering.

In 2010, the UK produced twice as many cars as Mississippi and Alabama combined. Today, our two states—despite having just 12% of the UK’s population—outproduce the UK by nearly double.
---
|
---
_Estimated Vehicle Production 2010 - 2025_
| **These images underscore a powerful truth: Mississippi is no longer the underdog.**

Whether you compare our state to other US states, or to what is happening in the wider world, it is undeniable that something remarkable is beginning to happen in Mississippi.

While Argentina is often praised for its free-market reforms, I believe Mississippi is an even stronger example of how smart policies drive growth.

**In recent years, our state has embraced bold changes:** deregulating the labor market in 2021, reforming taxes in 2022, eliminating the income tax this year, and reforming classroom funding in 2024. We’ve also avoided costly renewable energy policies that have driven up energy prices elsewhere.

We still have work to do, particularly in ensuring our next generation receives the education they deserve. **But the old narrative that Mississippi always lags behind? It’s outdated.**

Enjoy your weekend, and thanks for being part of this exciting journey!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3c907052d2&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=49da14cafc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=49da14cafc).

_Copyright © 2025 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=643%2E1086043%2EbJ_gel)
Trump is back at it again, Peter.
The other week, he attacked Baltimore. Calling it a “hellhole” and saying our children are “born to be criminals.” **And to top it off? He threatened to send the National Guard _again._**
Our president is delusional. He’s speaking nonsense when we know what’s true.
Because of significant investments into our communities, crime is at a historic low across the state of Maryland. And our children are the future, not criminals.
**[Peter, we have the solutions, but we need your support to implement them. Will you pitch in $5 to help fuel our work and move past the nonsense coming from Washington?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250920-1?refcode=em-20250920-1&refcode2=643_1086043_bJ_gel&akid=643%2E1086043%2EbJ_gel)**

name: Erika Kirk
subject: Charlie’s mission didn’t die. It just got LOUDER.
body:
We will never surrender. Ever.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MAWCO69577&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MAWCO69577]

Friend,

I want to thank you for loving my husband.

For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For
mourning. For remembering.

But now, _I need you to listen closely..._

BECAUSE THE EVILDOERS WHO TOOK CHARLIE’S LIFE? THEY HAVE NO IDEA
WHAT THEY HAVE DONE.

They didn’t just try to silence a man...

They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of
faith, and of God’s merciful love.

Instead, they ignited something even greater.

IF THEY THOUGHT MY HUSBAND’S MISSION WAS POWERFUL BEFORE... _THEY
HAVE NO IDEA WHAT THEY HAVE JUST UNLEASHED._

NOT JUST ACROSS THIS COUNTRY... _BUT IN ME__._

They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife.

And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement
my husband built will not die.

_I REFUSE TO LET THAT HAPPEN. _

And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too.

Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than
ever.

I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I
lost the love of my life.

I WANT YOU TO WATCH. I WANT YOU TO HEAR WHAT CHARLIE MEANT TO ME. AND
I WANT YOU TO HEAR WHAT COMES NEXT:
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MAWCO69577&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MAWCO69577]

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MAWCO69577&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MAWCO69577]

Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop
speaking his name.

We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever.

For Charlie,

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MAWCO69577&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MAWCO69577]

Erika Kirk

On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=MAWCO69577&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=MAWCO69577]

P.S. Charlie always said: _“Never surrender.”_

He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it
forward.

If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let
Charlie’s vision die...

GIVE IN CHARLIE’S HONOR
SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=320842&trkid=933901298&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

* **DESTROYED** Social Security programs that Joe Biden expanded
* **GUTTED** Medicaid and other critical services in his so-called "Big Beautiful Bill"
* **INSTITUTED** tax breaks for billionaires like Elon Musk
* **FIRED** thousands of federal workers for no reasons
* And so much more!

I don’t know about you, friend, but we miss President Biden! [**5,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Who is a better President? →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69057?t=5&akid=23415%2E4449941%2EY_zHNW) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69057?t=6&akid=23415%2E4449941%2EY_zHNW)
