Remember friend, under President Joe Biden...
* The FIRST Black woman was nominated to the Supreme Court
* Our world alliances were STRENGTHENED
* The first meaningful gun legislation was passed in OVER 30 YEARS

* And so much more!

**So, we NEED to make sure Joe Biden knows how much we miss him!**

name: Erika Kirk
subject: Charlie gave everything. Now it’s up to us.
body:
They have no idea what they just unleashed.

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUM69591&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUM69591>

Friend,

I want to thank you for loving my husband.

For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For
mourning. For remembering.

But now, I need you to listen closely...

Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they
have done.

They didn’t just try to silence a man...

They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of
God’s merciful love.

Instead, they ignited something even greater.

If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before... They have NO idea
what they have just UNLEASHED.

Not just across this country... But in me.

They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife.

And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my
husband built will not die.

I refuse to let that happen.

And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too.

Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever.

I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the
love of my life.

I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want
you to hear what comes next:
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUM69591&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUM69591>

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUM69591&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUM69591>

Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his
name.

We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever.

For Charlie,

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUM69591&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUM69591>

Erika Kirk

On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUM69591&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUM69591>

P.S. Charlie always said: “Never surrender.”

He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward.

If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision
die...

Give in Charlie’s Honor
Support Turning Point USA
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUM69591&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUM69591>

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe
<http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=c96efed0e76f44ea9618016ffa500b7f&_t=dSaTzKCCEQDQKuGokyvzHeO0qqGIUAfI_GCDXuKHZI3My7EN5jRO376LayWcn0c3ViZhfBduY3U5oqbv5LjA0GvuLeVu_eiEvGSS1LV5XJlrZs_S7s2yE5PNR9xImods>

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
| | |
---
Patriot, In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA.** All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come. As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save." We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt
& The Turning Point USA Family
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Our Mistake
subject: INSIDER ALERT: Massive Survival Food Overstock - Shocking Discounts Inside!
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11278399/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvOXN2SHoyTVJXNw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjA/LbmNsNXFQU1owag/qP2hpZHM9bmNvb01TTDFFY3JNdjVscw/gaM6ruA/s5v284e467d)

**INSIDER ALERT:** **Huge Savings: Warehouse Overload - You WIN BIG!** If you've been watching the headlines, you already know - the threat of food shortages, blackouts, and supply chain failures is more real than ever. Our **3-Month Survival Food Kits** have been flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. Why? Because people are waking up to the truth - you can't count on the system anymore. So we gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **produce as many kits as humanly possible.** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse - more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits - just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family... **you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare.** And yes - **you'll get a stack of FREE BONUSES** as our thank you. [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11278399/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIxLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjA/LbmNsNXFQU1owag/qP3RydmlkPTEyOTA5JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUE/gaM6ruA/sfsd3baaa70) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11278399/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIxLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjA/LbmNsNXFQU1owag/qP3RydmlkPTEyOTA5JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUE/gaM6ruA/sfsd3baaa70) **3 Months Of Food, Security & Peace Of Mind - All In One Kit** This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. That's right - **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** - just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value - and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11278399/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIxLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjA/LbmNsNXFQU1owag/qP3RydmlkPTEyOTA5JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUE/gaM6ruA/sfsd3baaa70) Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11278399/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIxLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjA/LbmNsNXFQU1owag/qP3RydmlkPTEyOTA5JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUE/gaM6ruA/sfsd3baaa70) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11278399/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIxLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjA/LbmNsNXFQU1owag/qP3RydmlkPTEyOTA5JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTNNTy0xODMwLTIwMjUwOTIwLUE/gaM6ruA/sfsd3baaa70)

Hi Peter,

In the city of Detroit’s 324-year history, there have been 75 mayors. They were all men.

We are proud to share the news that that’s about to change. Her Bold Move has officially endorsed Mary Sheffield – the youngest member of Detroit’s city council and the youngest person to ever hold the position of President of the Council – for the critical position of Detroit Mayor.

You may have heard that the city of Detroit is making a comeback. When Mary first joined the city council in 2013, the city was on the brink of bankruptcy. Fast forward 12 years, and Detroit has fully emerged: 12 balanced budgets with a surplus every year, 50-year record low crime, and so many other unbelievably positive trends **under Mary’s leadership.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115577374/570798573/1868917145?refcode=EM_F_250920Sheffield_CD_90DO_12_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNDZmM2U5LTI1OTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sIJEu435RzL0lp_1ug-QAG78Lx33EruZC86QM7P8i14=)

**Mary is running on a platform of equitable quality of life improvements for all Detroiters. She wants children and families throughout the city to look forward to an integrated, well-connected, and safe city that makes homeownership and economic mobility possible.**

When we asked Mary what issues impact the women of Detroit in particular – she answered that domestic violence and human trafficking were of particular concern.

“We do not have enough domestic violence shelters in our city. That is an issue that I wish we could talk more about, and I try to bring it up as much as I can,” Mary told us.

As Mayor, she will elevate the issue and allocate more resources toward solving the issue for the women of her city. In the history of Detroit, this has never been a priority for any of the men who have held the title as Mayor. We’re looking forward to helping Mary change that.

[**Detroit has never before had a woman mayor, and it’s time for that to change. Help support Mary Sheffield as she works to become the next Mayor of Detroit by rushing $20.25 between Her Bold Move and Mary’s campaign today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115577404/570798592/1868917145?refcode=EM_F_250920Sheffield_CD_90DO_12_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNDZmM2U5LTI1OTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sIJEu435RzL0lp_1ug-QAG78Lx33EruZC86QM7P8i14=)

Let’s do this,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

Fast forward 12 years, and Detroit has fully emerged: 12 balanced budgets with a surplus every year, 50-year record low crime, and so many other unbelievably positive trends under Mary’s leadership. = In the city's primary election, Mary received 51% of the vote, to her opponents' 17%. Now, she will once again be on the ballot in November, and we must ensure she wins. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Mary Sheffield: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Mary is running on a platform of equitable quality of life improvements for all Detroiters. She wants children and families throughout the city to look forward to an integrated, well-connected, and safe city that makes homeownership and economic mobility possible. When we asked Mary what issues impact the women of Detroit in particular – she answered that domestic violence and human trafficking were of particular concern. “We do not have enough domestic violence shelters in our city. That is an issue that I wish we could talk more about, and I try to bring it up as much as I can,” Mary told us. As Mayor, she will elevate the issue and allocate more resources toward solving the issue for the women of her city. In the history of Detroit, this has never been a priority for any of the men who have held the title as Mayor. We’re looking forward to helping Mary change that. = Let’s do this, Colleen Davis Endorsements Manager Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Trump has made $3.4 billion off of the presidency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
A Qatari jet, meme coins, and Trump-branded perfume

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)
---
Exactly how much money is Trump making off of his presidency? _The New Yorker_ did some back-of-the-envelope math — and it’s staggering. Trump’s made an estimated $3.4 billion in profit from his presidency, including:
* On Inauguration Day, he released a new meme coin and most of the Trump family followed suit. He’s profited to the tune of **$385 million.**
* Trump’s Mar-a-Lago resort has hauled in an extra **$125 million** in profits as he holds campaign events there and steers influence-seekers to his own resort.
* He’s hawking Trump-branded Bibles and “Fight, Fight, Fight” perfume in his online store, bringing in **$27.7 million** in merchandise alone.
* Trump accepted a luxury jet from the Qatari government worth **$400 million** and is now using taxpayer funds to the tune of $1 billion to retrofit it to use it as Air Force One.

As Trump is raking in the cash, he’s also picking the pockets of everyday Americans by pushing chaotic tariffs, taking away Medicaid, and giving tax cuts to billionaires and corporations that rip off consumers. Meanwhile, he's keeping up the rich claim that he’s been a champion for the middle class. What an abomination. **I’m not letting Trump get away with this. I’m questioning the Secretary of the Air Force on how retrofitting Trump’s Qatari jet is a good use of taxpayer funds. I’m pushing regulations that will rein in the crypto industry that has Trump in its pocket. I’m pushing stricter ethics rules for anyone who wants to do business with the government.** [**If you’re sick and tired of Trump profiting off of the presidency, and you want something to be done about it, please pitch in $28 or anything you can to our campaign if you’re able. We’re going to keep fighting this.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?amount=28&t=8&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)
---

---
Trump promised to lower costs on Day One. But Trump only cares about one thing: Enriching himself. That’s why he’s bullying companies into settling lawsuits that fill his presidential library coffers. It’s why he’s pushing his chaotic tariffs so world leaders are forced to come and bend the knee to him in order to trade with us. And it’s why he’s supported the GENIUS Act — a giveaway to the crypto industry that would allow Trump to personally profit from his stablecoin at the expense of consumers, our national security, and our financial stability. Bottom line: Nobody in public office — members of Congress, the vice president, or the president — should have conflicts of interest like this. (Remember when President Jimmy Carter sold his peanut farm to a blind trust to avoid even the appearance of corruption?) **I won’t let up on this, and I’ll keep exposing how Trump doesn’t give a damn about working families — he only cares about enriching himself.** [**Will you chip in to fuel our fight?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?t=14&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J) More to come soon. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3150?t=12&akid=2651%2E4032634%2EEmq7-J)
---

body:
He is toying with your wallets.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115579530/570803035/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250919Grocery_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWVhMTcwMy0yODk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJ07-Uxmcze4n-V9oBPvKpL9aHBGim0ui7PGn644ass=) Peter –

Trump is breaking the economy, and it's hardworking Americans who are going to pay the price.

name: Kimberly Begg
subject: Radical teachers are showing their true colors
body:
When did celebrating murder become acceptable?
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e357291/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvcU1OdTNRbXBaRg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjA/LbmNsZ2t3dW85ZA/qP2hpZHM9bmNuemt1cU04Rlo0cjZscw/gaM6xeg/s8te708297c)
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, A young man was assassinated on a college campus for engaging in a debate and the response from college professors is to celebrate. Now, look what teachers’ union president Randi Weingarten just wrote...
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
The Left isn’t just spitting on Charlie Kirk’s grave – they’re fanning the flames of hatred that incite violence against conservatives. Friend, it doesn’t matter how students were raised. Colleges are turning them evil. On purpose. **[Act now and stop the Left from radicalizing students in the classrooms.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) ** Randi and her cronies have turned schools and colleges into Leftist indoctrination camps. And the results are horrifying – especially amongst young women. Instead of coming home from college with knowledge, girls return ashamed of their country, disconnected from their families, and hostile to the truth. Fewer girls than boys go to church on Sundays. Over 1.4 million of them are selling their bodies online. And depression rates are skyrocketing through the roof. If we don’t act now, we’ll lose another generation of women to the Marxist Left. [**Will you join me in stopping Randi and radical leftist professors from hijacking your daughters?**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) You and I know what’s going on in America’s classrooms, but many parents are unaware of the danger their children face. Our public schools and universities are not what they were 40, 30, or even 20 years ago. They’ve become a breeding ground for violent liberal activists controlled by Marxist elites. The only way we can stop them is by shining a light on the evil they’re pushing. And at the**Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women** , that's exactly what we’re doing. Through the support of patriots like you, the Luce Center shares the truth about what the Left is really doing to your children in the classroom. We’re platforming courageous conservatives, both in person and online, so parents can be informed and stay up to date on the Left’s latest attacks. From **Abby Johnson** revealing the sinister partnership between universities and Planned Parenthood who are manipulating and profiting off your daughters. To **Liz Wheeler** uncovering the Marxist agenda driving radical teachers and professors to turn your girls into violent activists. But we can’t continue to spread the truth without your help. **[Please, join the Luce Center in uncovering the Left’s lies and sharing the truth with parents in America.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) ** We’ve reached a breaking point in our nation. Now is our time to stand firm for faith, family, and freedom. Thank you for joining this critical fight.
---
| | In faith and freedom,
---
Kimberly Begg President, The Luce Center
---
| | [ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Clare Boothe Luce Center for Conservative Women, 112 Elden St., Suite P, Herndon, VA
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

# _Weekend Edition:_
**Here 's what we are watching: **
* Academics fired after disgusting social media posts celebrating or justifying Charlie Kirk's killing
* Justice Kavanaugh's attempted assassin reportedly identifies as transgender
* Republican congressman puts Rep. Hakeem Jeffries in his place
* Security threats loom before massive Charlie Kirk memorial on Sunday, armed law enforcement imposter arrested

* * *
# **Kavanaugh would-be assassin identifies as transgender: report**
Nicholas Roske, **[who allegedly attempted to kill](https://substack.com/redirect/9ff5627d-6b07-4e5b-acc2-bb4757280b56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh in 2022, now goes by "Sophie Roske" and uses female pronouns according to defense court filings, with the DOJ recommending a 30-year prison sentence for the assassination attempt, the Daily Wire reports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ff5627d-6b07-4e5b-acc2-bb4757280b56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Extensive premeditation and planning revealed:** Court documents show Roske meticulously researched the attack for months, purchasing weapons, tactical gear, and burglary tools while conducting over 90 firearms-related internet searches and studying how to kill people quietly and escape detection.
* **Attack motivated by Roe v. Wade leak:** Roske was triggered by the leaked Supreme Court draft opinion showing the court would overturn Roe v. Wade, stating he wanted to "do something positive before I die" by killing Kavanaugh to prevent him from voting on the decision.

**[Read More...](https://substack.com/redirect/9ff5627d-6b07-4e5b-acc2-bb4757280b56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

The internet isn't a discussion anymore, it's a brawl between clickbait, spin, and headlines that sound like bad comedy. One minute you're checking the weather, the next you're wondering if "Ambassador Arrested in His Underwear" is news, or just Tuesday.
That's why Freespoke entered the ring.
Freespoke puts you back in control of the fight. One tap shows you the consensus, the divide, and expert insights from podcasts, so you see the truth, not the propaganda. It's private, clean, and uncensored. No tracking. No porn. No data harvesting. Just clarity.
Whether you're fact-checking a meme, decoding a viral TikTok, or cutting through the "official version" of events, Freespoke is your chaos-killer.

Premium unlocks enhanced privacy by blocking all ads while using the app which means no more creepy data-stalking ads. Plus, you get unlimited AI summaries that simplify complex stories in seconds, and fully searchable podcast transcripts that pull truth straight from the source.

* * *
# **Multiple university employees fired for celebrating Kirk's assassination**
College professors and administrators nationwide **[faced termination after posting social media messages](https://substack.com/redirect/f635fdaa-4bc8-461a-b7cb-b99cda73a989?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that appeared to celebrate or justify Charlie Kirk's murder, including at University of Mississippi, Ohio State, University of South Dakota, and Middle Tennessee State University.
* **Posts contained inflammatory language targeting Kirk:** The controversial social media posts described Kirk using terms like "yt supremacist," "hate-spreading Nazi," "disgusting psychopath," and "head of Trump's Hitler Youth," with some employees expressing that "the world is better off without him" and showing "ZERO sympathy" for his death.
* **Republican officials demanded accountability:** Screenshots of the posts spread widely on social media, drawing condemnation from Republican lawmakers and governors including Bill Lee of Tennessee and Larry Rhoden of South Dakota, who called for disciplinary action against the faculty members.
* **Universities cited institutional values in terminations:** School administrators consistently cited violations of institutional values of civility, professionalism, and human dignity when announcing firings, with some terminations happening immediately after the posts were discovered, while the wave of dismissals reflects broader concerns about normalizing political violence.

* * *
# Armed man falsely claiming to be law enforcement arrested at location of massive Charlie Kirk memorial event
The Secret Service **[arrested an individual at State Farm Stadium](https://substack.com/redirect/4fb731a3-49b0-4656-b9f1-995dbb933aec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who falsely claimed to be law enforcement while carrying a weapon, as security preparations intensify for Charlie Kirk's memorial service scheduled for Sunday, September 21.
* **High-profile attendees require maximum security:** President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance are among the speakers set to honor Kirk at the memorial, which has been designated a Level 1 Special Event by the Department of Homeland Security--the highest possible security rating equivalent to Super Bowl-level planning.
* **Massive crowd and credible threats expected:** Officials estimate over 100,000 people may attend the event at the 63,000-seat stadium with overflow areas, while law enforcement is tracking "several threats of unknown credibility" according to an internal bulletin obtained by ABC News.
* **Security experts urge heightened vigilance:** Former NYPD detective Pat Brosnan advised mourners to stay alert and avoid distractions, warning that violent extremists may view the memorial as an attractive target due to the high-profile attendees, government officials present, and major international media attention.

* * *

body:
We need your support to keep tackling these urgent threats to democracy
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115582399/570811764/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZTM0YjFiLTJhOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z1MIcetgl1jIYsZYDucg_MLBiQ9u1i4uJH1lrfKglPs=&emci=af19741c-8d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=75e34b1b-2a96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

, PeterA.G. Eric Holder isn’t mincing words about why Republicans are waging an all-out war to silence the voice of voters in Texas and across the country: **They are terrified of the voters.** After ripping away healthcare from millions of Americans and giving billions in tax handouts to the ultra-rich, Republicans know they’re deeply unpopular. But instead of offering up better ideas to voters, they’ve decided to gerrymander to strip power away from them. **Enough is enough. Please read A.G. Holder’s urgent note below about what’s at stake in this critical moment,[then rush a donation to show your commitment to tackling these urgent threats to democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115582402/570811766/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderUpdateTopper_email_20250920-NDRC-Tier1-HolderUpdateTopper_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250920-NDRC-Tier1-HolderUpdateTopper_&utm_campaign=HolderUpdateTopper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZTM0YjFiLTJhOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z1MIcetgl1jIYsZYDucg_MLBiQ9u1i4uJH1lrfKglPs=)** \--------- Forwarded message --------- Peter, My team and I have been working day and night for the last few months to stop what feels like constant attempts to dismantle and undermine our democracy. They passed an egregious racial gerrymander in Texas and Missouri. Fights in Indiana and Ohio are on deck. It’s been a hectic few months to say the least. So I want to take a step back — and talk about why they’re so desperate to rewrite the rules of the next election. **The Republicans are scared. Donald Trump is scared.** They’re worried that if the election is fair, they’re going to lose the House and their anti-democracy agenda will finally be put in check. We fight for fairness for a reason. For us, fairness is an invaluable tool. If things are fair, Democrats win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up. We win because we have better candidates, better policies, and better ideas. [**If you’re with the NDRC in our fight for fairness, we need your support. This is an existential moment for our democracy, and what we do today will resonate for years to come. Rush your donation today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115582404/570811769/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HolderUpdateTopper_email_20250920-NDRC-Tier1-HolderUpdateTopper_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250920-NDRC-Tier1-HolderUpdateTopper_&utm_campaign=HolderUpdateTopper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ZTM0YjFiLTJhOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=z1MIcetgl1jIYsZYDucg_MLBiQ9u1i4uJH1lrfKglPs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Make no mistake: Being committed to fairness does not mean being blind to reality.
This movement has a state-by-state strategy that deploys different tactics to combat unfairness in whatever form it takes. That allows our side to challenge unfair and illegal maps in the courts. We organize grassroots supporters to hold state lawmakers accountable. In California, we’re supporting responsible, temporary measures to respond to craven Republican power grabs. And throughout the country, we have kept our eyes on a 10-year plan to ensure we’re winning the most critical state-level elections for the future of our democracy.
**So even as we’re ready to push back against the new egregious gerrymanders coming down the pike, we’re also laser-focused on our long-term strategy to secure fairness. **
Because we know one thing for certain — Republicans are not going to suddenly give up and start playing fair. Texas Governor Greg Abbott swore the redistricting fight “could last years.” Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.”
[**They’re not going to let up — so we’ve got to be ready for whatever it is they try to throw at us. clean_body: We need your support to keep tackling these urgent threats to democracy | , PeterA.G. Eric Holder isn’t mincing words about why Republicans are waging an all-out war to silence the voice of voters in Texas and across the country: They are terrified of the voters. After ripping away healthcare from millions of Americans and giving billions in tax handouts to the ultra-rich, Republicans know they’re deeply unpopular. But instead of offering up better ideas to voters, they’ve decided to gerrymander to strip power away from them. Enough is enough. Please read A.G. Holder’s urgent note below about what’s at stake in this critical moment,= \--------- Forwarded message --------- Peter, My team and I have been working day and night for the last few months to stop what feels like constant attempts to dismantle and undermine our democracy. They passed an egregious racial gerrymander in Texas and Missouri. Fights in Indiana and Ohio are on deck. It’s been a hectic few months to say the least. So I want to take a step back — and talk about why they’re so desperate to rewrite the rules of the next election. The Republicans are scared. Donald Trump is scared. They’re worried that if the election is fair, they’re going to lose the House and their anti-democracy agenda will finally be put in check. We fight for fairness for a reason. For us, fairness is an invaluable tool. If things are fair, Democrats win. We don’t need special treatment or a leg up. We win because we have better candidates, better policies, and better ideas. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Make no mistake: Being committed to fairness does not mean being blind to reality. This movement has a state-by-state strategy that deploys different tactics to combat unfairness in whatever form it takes. That allows our side to challenge unfair and illegal maps in the courts. We organize grassroots supporters to hold state lawmakers accountable. In California, we’re supporting responsible, temporary measures to respond to craven Republican power grabs. And throughout the country, we have kept our eyes on a 10-year plan to ensure we’re winning the most critical state-level elections for the future of our democracy. So even as we’re ready to push back against the new egregious gerrymanders coming down the pike, we’re also laser-focused on our long-term strategy to secure fairness. Because we know one thing for certain — Republicans are not going to suddenly give up and start playing fair. Texas Governor Greg Abbott swore the redistricting fight “could last years.” Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.” = Peter, you’re a critical part of this effort — thank you for never giving up on our movement. Sincerely, Eric H. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Anti-Trump Lawfare Update!
body:
Justice Department's Biden-Hur and Epstein Memo Leaks

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FBI FOR COMMUNICATIONS WITH ANTI-TRUMP
ORGANIZATION

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36108&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vbGl2ZS9ES3YtUVAtdVJfcz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f2a2ad58ed51e024096a075d771549c3923894a08a14494754716af2969a689c]
Judicial Watch is still actively working to reveal the anti-Trump
lawfare shenanigans of the Biden Justice Department and FBI.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36096&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWZiaS1hbS1vdmVyc2lnaHQtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyNTU2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=66f63bf3f6a9536139bffa0082fbd87713c7ddab0fe724224f641ec7868c7d7e]
against the U.S. Department of Justice for communications between
former Assistant Special Agent in Charge Timothy Thibault and the
anti-Trump organization American Oversight (_Judicial Watch Inc. v.
U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36096&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWZiaS1hbS1vdmVyc2lnaHQtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyNTU2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=66f63bf3f6a9536139bffa0082fbd87713c7ddab0fe724224f641ec7868c7d7e]
(No. 1:25-cv–02556)).

Judicial Watch sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of
Columbia after the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) failed to
respond to a January 31, 2025, FOIA request for:

> Records and communications between Timothy Thibault, former
> [Assistant Special Agent in Charge, Washington Field Office] and the
> non-profit organization American Oversight, 1030 15th St. NW, B255,
> Washington, D.C. 20005, email domain: @americanoversight. The search
> terms for this request are a) Trump b) Electors c) Investigation d)
> election

In July 2022, U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley (R-IA) reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36097&F=T&&hash=be25c9c45cfa4efab597bab459331352b7d342ec456d47aa7f6e26fd59d8aa69]
warned then-Attorney General Merrick Garland that Thibault and an
official in the Justice Department’s Public Integrity Section,
Richard Pilger, were “deeply involved in the decisions to open and
pursue election-related investigations against President Trump. At the
time, whistleblowers told Grassley that the Thibault-Pilger
investigation’s predicating document was based on information from
‘liberal nonprofit American Oversight.’” Thibault retired
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36098&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vbmV3cy9odW50ZXItYmlkZW4tZmJpLWFnZW50LXRpbW90aHktdGhpYmF1bHQtcmVzaWducy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=cfe0a2e483dccbe4966c38dd620d51e71d2bf0864ad3754205cf311050753145]
in August 2022.

Earlier this year, Senators Grassley and Ron Johnson (R-WI) publicized
records dating back to 2022 about Thibault’s targeting of Trump
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=35587&F=T&&hash=79aebe34af6840221b7b24644e69916701037f84b337d2c2b7f4e673e14012b6

> Internal FBI emails and predicating documents provided to Grassley
> and released jointly by the two senators show Timothy Thibault, a
> former FBI Assistant Special Agent in Charge (ASAC) who was forced
> to retire
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=35588&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3Jhc3NsZXkuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9uZXdzL3JlbWFya3MvZ3Jhc3NsZXktdGhpYmF1bHQtcmVzaWduYXRpb24tYW5kLW1lZGlhLW1pc3JlcG9ydGluZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=59787fdc9149e2307a01c7029cad0ee8b570635e57671709034f3daa8eff0f50]
> from the Bureau after Grassley exposed
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=35589&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3Jhc3NsZXkuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9pbW8vbWVkaWEvZG9jL0NFRyB0byBET0ogRkJJIChXRk8pLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a5f7bdf2104d8799ffa3f213a704244633f2435fe80e8c29686069b5a843f73b]
> his public anti-Trump bias, authored the initial language for what
> ultimately became Jack Smith’s federal case against Trump
> regarding the 2020 presidential election. Records show Thibault
> essentially opened and approved his own investigation.

American Oversight describes itself
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36099&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbm92ZXJzaWdodC5vcmcvYWJvdXQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b5f23bd040ac04e1180f53c6b4b3e861db7e4c867e07eb43227b22daa1571399]
as “founded in 2017 in
response to the unprecedented challenges that the Trump administration
posed to our nation’s democratic ideals and institutions....”
Earlier this year, _Politico _described it
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36100&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saXRpY28uY29tL2xpdmUtdXBkYXRlcy8yMDI1LzAxLzI5L2NvbmdyZXNzL2RlbW9jcmF0cy1vdmVyc2lnaHQtdHJ1bXAtY29uZ3Jlc3MtMDAyMDExOTQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d98e16e21a97fdcc0835f99bb4be95d06477ebf8c2e0793b16395c279e549a8e]
as, “A left-leaning watchdog group ... working to gather materials
that could feed Congressional investigations into the Trump
administration.”

It’s a shame that we must sue to get these records about how the
Biden gang at the FBI and DOJ tried to rig an election by jailing
Trump for disputing the 2020 election. It’s past time for these
institutions to focus on transparency under law, so the American
people can know the full truth of the lawfare attack perpetrated on
Trump.

We have actively pursued transparency for the lawfare waged against
Trump.

In June 2025, we launched a related lawsuit

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE DEPARTMENT FOR COMMUNICATIONS ON BIDEN-HUR
AUDIO, EPSTEIN MEMO

The American public deserves to know the details surrounding the leaks
of “exclusive” U.S. Department of Justice information on the
Biden-Hur interviews and the Epstein client list memo.

Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36084&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLWh1ci1lcHN0ZWluLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzIyNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=83f51db368187d6346cb5485cff830db64b8e29c8c4dd7fb1e9620928ea1d65e]
against the Justice Department for its communication with the media
outlet Axios regarding the outlet’s “exclusives” on the release
of audio of then-President Joe Biden’s August 2023 interview with
then-Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding Biden’s handling of secret
documents and the July 2025 memo that states there is no Jeffrey
Epstein “client list” (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36085&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLWh1ci1lcHN0ZWluLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzIyNS9dXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ecc1d1edda48ab7cf511b3089df83df3c9d41281cdfc5f243670d085784b950d
_(No.
1:25-cv-03225)).

We sued the Justice Department after it failed to comply with two FOIA
requests. In May 2025, we filed a FOIA request for the Justice
Department’s contacts with Axios regarding the Biden-Hur audio
recordings
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36086&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tLzIwMjUvMDUvMTYvYmlkZW4taHVyLXRhcGUtc3BlY2lhbGNvdW5zZWwtYXVkaW8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c871781e06937c9de08f9e1356ada6486031d96c43e24e8c47d2b3a99802b0fc.].
We also had submitted a July 2025 FOIA request for the Justice
Department’s communications with Axios pertaining to the
investigation of Jeffrey Epstein
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=35617&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tLzIwMjUvMDcvMDcvamVmZnJleS1lcHN0ZWluLXN1aWNpZGUtY2xpZW50LWxpc3QtdHJ1bXAtYWRtaW5pc3RyYXRpb24/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=fa9f7a016f7f0247272d9c58a424005a28d4a5323460d8a8305c69add0c501ac].

We have been at the forefront of these investigations.

Regarding the Biden-Hur records, in March 2024, we filed the first
FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=31590&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tc3BlY2lhbC1jb3Vuc2VsLWludGVydmlld3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5e35eab9c3bd168fe398125086a7964bc0469879f3e6fddc4d4dad65680cb648]
and
were the lead plaintiff asking for the Special Counsel’s interviews
of Biden (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=31585&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJpZGVuLWh1ci1pbnRlcnZpZXctY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNzAwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6dc84b815e33e4d79cc93a6ce0254c139b20bb5b159e92efdbcbf14e22ef5017]
(No. 1:24-cv-00700)). In June 2024, the Justice Department admitted
that the Special Counsel’s transcript was inaccurate

DEFENSE DEPARTMENT BEING SUED TO RESTORE KIDS’ TRANSGENDER
TREATMENTS

Three military families are suing the U.S. Department of Defense to
reverse a provision in the 2024 National Defense Authorization Act
(NDAA), signed by former President Biden, which bans Tricare from
covering hormone therapy and puberty blockers for transgender minor
children of service members. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog explains
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36113&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcva2lkcy10cmFuc2dlbmRlci10cmVhdG1lbnRzL106P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=df9a1adc86e5c83701bcc7402c431401686e0e2fa4a234dec07b274d90daa585

> Although the Defense Authorization Act
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36114&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmhvdXNlLmdvdi9iaWxsc3RoaXN3ZWVrLzIwMjQxMjA5L1JDUF9IUjUwMDlfeG1sJTViODklNWQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a79b488bb15fdc64add845fec68c1f5089b14573d9a46b4bb0ecb3e21fab0ad1]
> signed by former President Biden blocks the U.S. Military’s
> healthcare system from providing specialized treatments to the
> transgender children of service members, three families are suing
> the Department of Defense (DOD) to reinstate the benefit, claiming
> they have been left with “significant” and “crushing
> out-of-pocket costs.” Leftist groups were outraged when the
> measure passed late last year and called on Biden to veto
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=76713&L=36115&F=T&&hash=8e84bea744cbaed23d47cb7e0021a2fc71b6d6e10ca7f9aba2f955c9eceb7998
> because it bans the military’s Tricare Health Plan from covering
> gender-affirming care such as hormone therapy and

clean_body: Justice Department's Biden-Hur and Epstein Memo Leaks [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FBI FOR COMMUNICATIONS WITH ANTI-TRUMP ORGANIZATION [] Judicial Watch is still actively working to reveal the anti-Trump lawfare shenanigans of the Biden Justice Department and FBI. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Justice for communications between former Assistant Special Agent in Charge Timothy Thibault and the anti-Trump organization American Oversight (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv–02556)). Judicial Watch sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) failed to respond to a January 31, 2025, FOIA request for: Records and communications between Timothy Thibault, former [Assistant Special Agent in Charge, Washington Field Office] and the non-profit organization American Oversight, 1030 15th St. NW, B255, Washington, D.C. 20005, email domain: @americanoversight. The search terms for this request are a) Trump b) Electors c) Investigation d) election In July 2022, U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley (R-IA) reportedly [] warned then-Attorney General Merrick Garland that Thibault and an official in the Justice Department’s Public Integrity Section, Richard Pilger, were “deeply involved in the decisions to open and pursue election-related investigations against President Trump. At the time, whistleblowers told Grassley that the Thibault-Pilger investigation’s predicating document was based on information from ‘liberal nonprofit American Oversight.’” Thibault retired [] in August 2022. Earlier this year, Senators Grassley and Ron Johnson (R-WI) publicized records dating back to 2022 about Thibault’s targeting of Trump [ Internal FBI emails and predicating documents provided to Grassley and released jointly by the two senators show Timothy Thibault, a former FBI Assistant Special Agent in Charge (ASAC) who was forced to retire [] from the Bureau after Grassley exposed [] his public anti-Trump bias, authored the initial language for what ultimately became Jack Smith’s federal case against Trump regarding the 2020 presidential election. Records show Thibault essentially opened and approved his own investigation. American Oversight describes itself [] as “founded in 2017 in response to the unprecedented challenges that the Trump administration posed to our nation’s democratic ideals and institutions....” Earlier this year, Politico described it [] as, “A left-leaning watchdog group ... working to gather materials that could feed Congressional investigations into the Trump administration.” It’s a shame that we must sue to get these records about how the Biden gang at the FBI and DOJ tried to rig an election by jailing Trump for disputing the 2020 election. It’s past time for these institutions to focus on transparency under law, so the American people can know the full truth of the lawfare attack perpetrated on Trump. We have actively pursued transparency for the lawfare waged against Trump. In June 2025, we launched a related lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for records about the FBI’s investigation of Trump codenamed “Arctic Frost,” which was part of the Biden administration effort to prosecute and jail President Trump for disputing Biden’s controversial election victory (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-02011)). In March 2025, we sued [] the Justice Department for details of any investigations, inquiries, or referrals concerning potential misconduct of any person working for Special Counsel Jack Smith (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-00801)). Also in March, Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis was ordered [] to turn over 212 pages of records to a state court judge. The court also ordered Willis to detail how the records were found and the reason for withholding them from the public. The records were belatedly disclosed in response to a Judicial Watch request and lawsuit for communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. In January, we were awarded [] $21,578 for “attorney’s fees and costs” incurred in the case. The court previously found Willis in default [] and stated: “The Court finds Defendant [Willis, in her official capacity] is in default and has been since 11 April 2024”(Judicial Watch Inc. v. Fani Willis et al. [] (No. 24-CV-002805)). In January 2025, a federal court ordered [] the Justice Department to provide us information on communications between Special Counsel Jack Smith and Willis regarding the prosecution of then-former President Donald Trump. In May, the Justice Department was directed to search text messages from the Special Counsel’s Office for responsive records (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 23-cv-03110). In January 2025, records [] from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) showed it and the FBI warning that law enforcement agencies should be prepared for a surge in threats from so-called Domestic Violence Extremists (DVEs) following the August 8, 2022, FBI raid on Trump’s Mar-a-Lago estate in Palm Beach, Florida (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (1:22-cv-03275)). In May 2024, we uncovered [] a recording of a phone message left by an FBI special agent for someone at the Secret Service in the context of the raid on Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:22-cv-03147)). In February 2024, the Justice Department asked [] a federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that was targeting Trump and other Americans (Judicial Watch Inc. v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-01485)). In August 2022, we successfully sued to unseal the search warrant affidavit [] used to justify the unprecedented raid on Trump’s home ( [. v. Sealed Search Warrant [] (No. 9:22-mj-08332)). JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE DEPARTMENT FOR COMMUNICATIONS ON BIDEN-HUR AUDIO, EPSTEIN MEMO The American public deserves to know the details surrounding the leaks of “exclusive” U.S. Department of Justice information on the Biden-Hur interviews and the Epstein client list memo. Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for its communication with the media outlet Axios regarding the outlet’s “exclusives” on the release of audio of then-President Joe Biden’s August 2023 interview with then-Special Counsel Robert Hur regarding Biden’s handling of secret documents and the July 2025 memo that states there is no Jeffrey Epstein “client list” (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [ (No. 1:25-cv-03225)). We sued the Justice Department after it failed to comply with two FOIA requests. In May 2025, we filed a FOIA request for the Justice Department’s contacts with Axios regarding the Biden-Hur audio recordings [.]. We also had submitted a July 2025 FOIA request for the Justice Department’s communications with Axios pertaining to the investigation of Jeffrey Epstein []. We have been at the forefront of these investigations. Regarding the Biden-Hur records, in March 2024, we filed the first FOIA lawsuit [] and were the lead plaintiff asking for the Special Counsel’s interviews of Biden (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-00700)). In June 2024, the Justice Department admitted that the Special Counsel’s transcript was inaccurate []. Justice Department emails in a related case showed White House staffers suggesting edits [] to transcripts of Biden’s interview with Hur (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-02176)). In May 2025, we forced the release [] of the audio recordings of Biden’s October 2023 interview [] with Hur. The recordings are available here: justice.gov/storage/Biden-interview-with-Hur-part-1-October-8th.mp3 [] and justice.gov/storage/Biden-interview-with-Hur-part-2-October-9th.mp3 []. In July 2025, we reached a settlement [] in which the government agreed to pay $10,000 for attorneys’ fees and other costs associated with the successful lawsuit that forced release of the audio tapes of Biden’s interview with Hur. Regarding Jeffrey Epstein, in April 2025, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the Justice Department for records on the identities of clients or associates of Epstein (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [ (No. 1:25-cv-01056)). In July, the Justice Department reported to the court [] that it was continuing to search for and review records, which is at odds with the leaked, unsigned and undated Justice Department/FBI memo [] that suggested no more Epstein records would be disclosed to the American public. The memo was first disclosed late on July 6 []. We also sued [] in July for records related to Epstein’s victim Virginia Louise Giuffre. HUNDREDS MORE ILLEGAL ALIEN GANG MEMBERS, MURDERERS ARRESTED IN HOUSTON Every town in America is now a border town, but Texas is at the frontier and facing some of the worst consequences of the Biden era’s open-door policy for illegal aliens. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. Texas’s largest city appears to be a cesspool of undocumented criminals where just weeks after federal authorities announced the arrest of hundreds of violent gang members [] with a combined 1,700 criminal convictions, another 822 illegal immigrant offenders have been apprehended. This batch also includes gangbangers, convicted murderers, child predators, and other egregious criminals. In the last few weeks, during two separate operations, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) revealed that it has taken more than 1,000 dangerous criminal aliens off the streets in Houston, Texas’s biggest city—and the nation’s fourth largest—with a population of around 2.4 million. The perpetrators rounded up in the first operation completed in early August entered the United States illegally a combined 1,400 times under the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies that welcomed a record-breaking 7.6 million illegal aliens, including hundreds of thousands with serious criminal records and over 1.7 million [] from countries the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) says pose a national security threat to the U.S. In an effort to mitigate the damage the Trump administration launched a nationwide initiative known as Operation Take Back America [] that aims to repel the invasion of illegal immigration and protect American communities from perpetrators of violent crimes. Cracking down on criminal aliens released throughout the nation under Biden is a key component of the effort and the administration assures it is targeting the “worst of the worst [ for arrest and removal even as most media outlets spin the narrative to focus exclusively on polices open border groups claim separate immigrant families and victimize hard-working migrants. The mainstream media ignored last month’s announcement involving ICE’s Houston operation even though it nabbed hundreds of illegal immigrants who are mostly members of violent gangs, including the renowned Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13), Tren de Aragua, Latin Kings, 15th Street Gang, Sureños, Paisas and Tango Blast and the majority of the perpetrators have been convicted of serious crimes such as homicide, sex trafficking, domestic violence, burglary, arson and unlawful possession of a firearm. The feds made it incredibly easy to report the story by providing mug shots and detailed criminal information of the worst offenders, illustrating the urgency to enforce immigration laws after four years of devastating open border policies. As expected, the most recent Houston operation has also been disregarded by the media though it was just as alarming. In only a week ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) arrested over 800 criminal aliens, many of them transnational gang members, with disturbing records. More than 320 of the offenders had previously been deported from the U.S. and 112 illegally reentered the country at least once after getting deported. “During the past four years, transnational gang members, foreign fugitives and other violent criminal aliens took advantage of the crisis at our southern border to illegally enter the country,” said Houston’s ICE ERO Director Gabriel Martinez in a statement [] issued by the agency a few days ago. “Many of them remained in the Houston area and have gone on to wreak havoc in our local communities.” Martinez added that the most recent weeklong operation focused on targeting those threats to public safety and resulted in the arrest of 822 illegal aliens, including five transnational gang members, seven child predators and three criminal aliens convicted of homicide-related offenses. Here are a few examples of the criminal aliens arrested recently in Houston: Jorge Eliseo Torres-Soto, a 30-year-old child predator from Guatemala convicted of sexual assault of a child; William Alexander Telles Amaya, a 35-year-old from El Salvador convicted three times of child sex offenses, including aggravated sexual assault of a child, failure to register as a sex offender and sexual indecency with a minor; Cruz Leandro Martinez Leiva, a 25-year-old from El Salvador and MS-13 gang member convicted of robbery and armed carjacking; Carlos Vega-Ramirez, a 38-year-old Mexican deported from the U.S. twice and convicted of sexual indecency with a minor, enticement of a minor for indecent purposes, driving while intoxicated, fleeing police and forgery; Manuel Ivan Castillo Estrada, a 36-year-old child predator from Mexico deported from the U.S. three times and convicted of alien smuggling and sexually assaulting a minor; Francisco Eduardo Bonilla, a 37-year-old from El Salvador, convicted of sexual indecency with a minor; Alejandro Perez Miramontes, a 54-year-old Mexican deported from the U.S. 12 times and convicted eight times of illegal reentry and twice each of robbery, larceny and burglary as well as trespassing and evading arrest. DEFENSE DEPARTMENT BEING SUED TO RESTORE KIDS’ TRANSGENDER TREATMENTS Three military families are suing the U.S. Department of Defense to reverse a provision in the 2024 National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), signed by former President Biden, which bans Tricare from covering hormone therapy and puberty blockers for transgender minor children of service members. Our Corruption Chronicles blog explains [ Although the Defense Authorization Act [] signed by former President Biden blocks the U.S. Military’s healthcare system from providing specialized treatments to the transgender children of service members, three families are suing the Department of Defense (DOD) to reinstate the benefit, claiming they have been left with “significant” and “crushing out-of-pocket costs.” Leftist groups were outraged when the measure passed late last year and called on Biden to veto [ because it bans the military’s Tricare Health Plan from covering gender-affirming care such as hormone therapy and puberty-suppressants to treat “gender dysphoria.” An analysis [ by the American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU), a leader in the campaign opposing the military’s transgender healthcare ban, estimates that 2,500 minor patients receive care for gender dysphoria through Tricare and 900 get puberty-suppressants or gender-affirming hormones. In their lawsuit [ the DOD, military personnel with transgender children claim that Tricare’s sudden refusal to cover medically necessary care has inflicted profound harm and that plaintiffs’ families now face significant and crushing out-of-pocket costs. “This is not an abstract policy shift – it is an immediate and devastating disruption of essential health care that affects the physical and psychological well-being of plaintiffs and other young people throughout the country,” according to the complaint filed this month by two LGBTQ+ rights groups on behalf of the families. The transgender patients are not named to protect their privacy and are identified in the complaint as Diana Doe, Nathan Noe, and Parker Poe. The first two were taking hormones prescribed at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center in Maryland and were recently told by doctors that the treatments would no longer be covered under Tricare. The third plaintiff, Poe, is identified in the lawsuit as a young adult who has been taking testosterone covered by Tricare at an unnamed medical facility. Without Tricare coverage the testosterone prescription is “too expensive to purchase out-of-pocket,” the complaint states, adding that the “process has resulted in unnecessary stress and panic.” Servicemembers and their families have been able to obtain puberty blockers or cross-sex hormone therapy for their transgender children through the military insurance for nearly a decade, one of the LGBTQ+ groups that filed the lawsuit writes in a statement [ blames President Trump for ordering the DOD to terminate the essential care. “As a result of the Trump administration’s directive, the families’ trusted doctors cannot provide ongoing care and families are unfairly forced to take on this financial burden,” according to the group, which accuses the Trump administration of waging a relentless assault on transgender Americans and issuing a barrage of discriminatory executive orders designed to strip away their basic legal rights and deny them recognition. The reality is that the defense bill signed by Biden back in December 2024 bans gender-affirming care for transgender youth whose parents are active-duty military personnel. Leftist groups like the ACLU mounted a campaign to pressure Biden to veto the bill, but he signed it even though it prohibits insurance coverage for “medical interventions for the treatment of gender dysphoria,” including the hormone therapy and puberty-suppressants taken by the minors in this lawsuit. Tricare has never covered the costly transgender sex change operations for adults but until recently provided hormone therapy and psychological counseling for gender dysphoria, which is identified by the plan as “psychological distress that results from an incongruence between one’s sex assigned at birth and one’s gender identity.” Before Trump’s second presidency, Tricare allowed active-duty service members to request a waiver for “medically necessary gender affirming surgery,” but the pricey operation was typically denied and two enlisted men who identify as women sued the DOD claiming the policy discriminates based on sex and transgender status. Less than a year ago, an Obama-appointed federal judge ruled [ their favor, determining that the military’s health insurance plan is discriminatory and violates Equal Protection rights under the Fifth Amendment of the United States Constitution by failing to pay for gender transition surgeries, which the judge compared to mastectomies and hysterectomies due to cancer. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [advertisement] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: President Trump
subject: I’ll always be in your debt after everything you’ve done for me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
From Trump: Thank you!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
I wouldn’t be where I am today without YOUR support.
Friend, your support means everything to me.
Through thick and thin, you’ve always stood by my side.
This is President Donald J. Trump - and I had my team reach out to you so I can give you an important message:
**THANK YOU!**
For YEARS, it was taboo to even mention that you supported me - but that never scared you.
**_You put your CAREER on the line._**
**_You put your FAMILY on the line._**
**_But most importantly, you put your LIFE on the line._**
And for that, our great nation will always be in your debt.
Because you’re a true patriot who I know will NEVER abandon the MAGA movement!
That’s why I know what I’m asking next will be the easy part.
The Radical Left has NEVER given up the fight to take me down, so neither can we.
**_[Before the day is done, will you go on the record and let the Radical Left know that you will CONTINUE to SUPPORT ME and the MAGA Movement?>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
