name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06ed7afedf74fe285dd90cdb32f5ef1&_e=zt_DpmXPa0U1dpW-6iSnRapoS83Igo1jy_LjXRTfoypTWWODQgEeQPXjcSp7O_7j1nJB6eTF6fh5tG9nnLqlV2CU-QFJyarIQzBRj-GBEfZWht1_O6_K0gTK3RHj5NPGK3aTPyn0bv0gX_ciFCbK_8mUzBcBbMazxLpbagfJNX_9idk2QUI-VMFrCJKyE0XZlbG90t2dyalxBgLHs8RSVuVjjRBB2vGopJhGK6K7Cjjc0j3itdD_ubZAqFWmz_607GS8ltdlJlWd9Rnxm4vTMBfgyXSOMDUStVAF2drVScHMoRyeEXjiGFkH3DFUd8Nexj1jYhndxFSsSIFtmcFJ-IeLEL4YTWQp60rFOd9URs3MNLV2eGEXfrL0KyVxCSvc62iU9_QzAZ74pUnPFTLX-0NXeRKwml_EyE1bb7bhKqpat2c7w7_3McS6S4LJTNpb2e7hbFQAxU8sJO8U1adfGBlOl5Jp01jvjcPk9hsJTRHutjt0hn804XLRoQpKAr7aDg2r9cjJJ5HClds5vwKJiDZZpJqrUzAyPGUa8gc3zzDx84m5245SFAXrwE_8hUQBxFqZIHSO-IZYiUE9_V8ERpqRToAOZNJkl3cy669gNpSidSkd_T_bJPg2c9dfEp6MJ6c0lax7s72i4kETzTXeb58RCL815T54SoFMsmPYdK0Tl2IbV_ODBCJkZxqbUFroHQNZeDpvSIGvfyiPaoI3oCKAH0FzeHOBbTqEn0G6xoDXZdrjFpqHktclyvweHS_3fZBFUmi5PyC8NCo_BkN-fBgd5rd40OXD3i-jcKnHAsA%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06ed7afedf74fe285dd90cdb32f5ef1&_e=zt_DpmXPa0U1dpW-6iSnRapoS83Igo1jy_LjXRTfoypTWWODQgEeQPXjcSp7O_7j1nJB6eTF6fh5tG9nnLqlV2CU-QFJyarIQzBRj-GBEfZWht1_O6_K0gTK3RHj5NPGK3aTPyn0bv0gX_ciFCbK_8mUzBcBbMazxLpbagfJNX_9idk2QUI-VMFrCJKyE0XZlbG90t2dyalxBgLHs8RSVuVjjRBB2vGopJhGK6K7Cjjc0j3itdD_ubZAqFWmz_607GS8ltdlJlWd9Rnxm4vTMBfgyXSOMDUStVAF2drVScELCYRHXoGNXJqWdmnE776FaqnjQsUEYj-pxt6RM9oKGVlXs7zxcrMJ44sgkJYIfncFHP38VgSQfLGHC_EZmAdQ2aK5aY-gqtbu5bXUw_MUzohbz0bd7tGkmih-uI6nVkIuy0-8tbz1UaJJ19-M_RiX6B2nj9EqIzkKo0lACGw1TONEmz5J7pUplP-OwQghM6xRwUq139eIZWgHGK1VTuisT8fxNAKMeWwuox0vYvr1jeKiJ5ZqTMIsSRx-J_Xfx3o-GepBv9jkrKTqj1rOSYycvIO0UcosLeDWx6KBOPcEUDc3AgCbGRB18bdihYgVBnOp53e--wACrdToZOlP47mGnh54aOUiKsQqE58BIC5NrGbqQcBEFzceEVuDfVQQfU1AkBnBki-ihHJmDy9GnzXrf2OI8VBu3hDzpL1eQFtKbn8-O-DJwTE285WdsX0gX27n2Vg3l-xvuJ_EZ0nDM_99C2hzQqI0_oHPe1PWlaj6nW4TH78R5LLynDvxwWRy6oc%3D)**_.

_[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06ed7afedf74fe285dd90cdb32f5ef1&_e=zt_DpmXPa0U1dpW-6iSnRapoS83Igo1jy_LjXRTfoypTWWODQgEeQPXjcSp7O_7j1nJB6eTF6fh5tG9nnLqlV2CU-QFJyarIQzBRj-GBEfZWht1_O6_K0gTK3RHj5NPGK3aTPyn0bv0gX_ciFCbK_8mUzBcBbMazxLpbagfJNX_9idk2QUI-VMFrCJKyE0XZlbG90t2dyalxBgLHs8RSVuVjjRBB2vGopJhGK6K7Cjjc0j3itdD_ubZAqFWmz_607GS8ltdlJlWd9Rnxm4vTMBfgyXSOMDUStVAF2drVScG78R6FeREZdxVBs_jqYggnfEYthXn54SSmWGG3XAWtEaFljrLGsgdwuBvoc3-R71ORnPHJ7quKcfKtCVGzn2prZDfQX_eBhUoQxU1pDWNiRpR6uXiQRmOfKNPG9no1Jfvk6vQneoqhku5J_K8k6ZNeT4iYoh6jthEXEVFzuwBnRLiKEZdZ6DuCta-LeBWz2qnsFukS_tKGEqheArmwXDhjiovy9fOrLY2UDG6AhaDZVkniUafXeWDHPPCI_BoWi3likOJhDl-3K1eD_qKx2rU-WmdITnE1YTLxTkOKG9PdsQeiD2M94JoC4bVWUN9oGvFrdmKh4_goz-oTyI9oajU6FZR3fGUFpv9nRCfi0nqQSJLsXWxG2MtYt9eC0K81BUdqviWTwOqjUZFFrCq9wrsi1nrmtWNbfp_41hoZDEGyDnCL8De7u0NCt6cIDvKYXB1jWYoWU8sNhxcgxDGFiu8e8nMA0XVZJtZ3mtULJ1uVFGICqzZHy-CHa3MT5QTay4Y%3D)_
[**FIGHT FOR CHARLIE
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06ed7afedf74fe285dd90cdb32f5ef1&_e=zt_DpmXPa0U1dpW-6iSnRapoS83Igo1jy_LjXRTfoypTWWODQgEeQPXjcSp7O_7j1nJB6eTF6fh5tG9nnLqlV2CU-QFJyarIQzBRj-GBEfZWht1_O6_K0gTK3RHj5NPGK3aTPyn0bv0gX_ciFCbK_8mUzBcBbMazxLpbagfJNX_9idk2QUI-VMFrCJKyE0XZlbG90t2dyalxBgLHs8RSVuVjjRBB2vGopJhGK6K7Cjjc0j3itdD_ubZAqFWmz_607GS8ltdlJlWd9Rnxm4vTMBfgyXSOMDUStVAF2drVScG1zvXntOMONXVxoRUxK62XiRFvrP_m3vLE4vmocE7uD0OGFKkZY1vmpGqBvYQs6V_huARpCY1fMUuxH7OQ-xLOrJ2m-9Wbw6yNTVZK4tYtvyGbU4Te6v9-9qh9nHbFYElcZnD2SL5fLCtPNlqKPW_iGLkJuJ4syjBSJCpV2UBMAdfAUU4FK4WdJIDedHzjh6r85LqUmLEBOQ3mbSZZ2F6j3B3lm2Vrdfsgz3hcNH1myQb7v6K7_LNtlePI-xdiDeJKkGOVvWZdPdmCWjOxfWMEd20_iThbWtd4KfYSz_dgLFFvY5d2qOq61sUmTD9SfZe613BXT15H3aslsZ9B_MT7Y0haPUcnsccUtdrTmO_0nayOpdJCo9KrroW-MewQyHO3_8Vyp5Z_8TgliUNSXVavsAtuMB3b3XkSDldbphQuDhFdpfpaPWE_v2RVMde1SAix6yjxsQY464vTOxc9kV_kyRzspSi2z6UizcFfpn_Top4FWCXAsDvQDlJVbw49L14%3D)
Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

_[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06ed7afedf74fe285dd90cdb32f5ef1&_e=zt_DpmXPa0U1dpW-6iSnRapoS83Igo1jy_LjXRTfoypTWWODQgEeQPXjcSp7O_7j1nJB6eTF6fh5tG9nnLqlV2CU-QFJyarIQzBRj-GBEfZWht1_O6_K0gTK3RHj5NPGK3aTPyn0bv0gX_ciFCbK_8mUzBcBbMazxLpbagfJNX_9idk2QUI-VMFrCJKyE0XZlbG90t2dyalxBgLHs8RSVuVjjRBB2vGopJhGK6K7Cjjc0j3itdD_ubZAqFWmz_607GS8ltdlJlWd9Rnxm4vTMBfgyXSOMDUStVAF2drVScH8pCKrjqnNTmrqF-jc010nRdZlXfrA0rwdKYzKdVw6kYkxyX_RPkEDvwtIgCOiilyN8qf5VNAFN18oRIvba_j9c1euVBHwAeQa33q-HTMZ3Qwkw7auCgwdOpm9x3q26tiyfcZ7rg29dXjVfunagMd-uGQ5U9wdv0AI71FVw9--_p6z53XufDCCL7tJ5P6CExo6UlyWGNC-fMEUfpBIYcsPj37stK9X0PJy21bbc0B1XET376Ks1AJe3cOfUlK7xhCenCtp2BnLIhWxduaOlAG4TJsyBZYXzVC7BNuuMyQSTfvsTMZBvj7u8hEQEaQHxPuq5oxoSNAYBhP_hg7RE1AdUSLICfo9AUwP7Ou0aNIoeOqifi-p6MayV9roWkEvI39qqmm8UpqaaxRO0xSUxVcvtdS9bw_AHAbzGBIhMFmu2zPZe3G1uM8vREa-CEHUTGL71E2uBURylK_ncC1nYJA_LN5CissCIzPrXjmbLqVmk8ogJtfPMw0hsdnrKjRdZvA%3D)_

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. **[I would be honored if you would consider a small gift of $5 or even $10 right now to help me take my fight to the far-left and ensure that we’re able to complete this mission - for Charlie, for our children, and for the good of the entire nation](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06ed7afedf74fe285dd90cdb32f5ef1&_e=zt_DpmXPa0U1dpW-6iSnRapoS83Igo1jy_LjXRTfoypTWWODQgEeQPXjcSp7O_7j1nJB6eTF6fh5tG9nnLqlV2CU-QFJyarIQzBRj-GBEfZWht1_O6_K0gTK3RHj5NPGK3aTPyn0bv0gX_ciFCbK_8mUzBcBbMazxLpbagfJNX_9idk2QUI-VMFrCJKyE0XZlbG90t2dyalxBgLHs8RSVuVjjRBB2vGopJhGK6K7Cjjc0j3itdD_ubZAqFWmz_607GS8ltdlJlWd9Rnxm4vTMBfgyXSOMDUStVAF2drVScFeeh4yAzUdSN5zae558s64uk5SUcBgaSmDNBcq3DOyasDy9jFSgx_yxkZdvhL4G6tQwCKy4z_pnSfktRwN3hrdEvOpcaACR9hk3ZDii-zMnMMvHlTycrihj-JKc3j_46MQagdtkOQKT8juF6AcKLNQGIiXNzluhOy_rS7HYqT7DhAf_M9mHxkzooQMyXk1t083lPkyJ-4G4TbytOVTksG3NKOj0Y0zkJlBwIiUcr2nAlhiJhbyeMBKOjh9esPUTqKDvkiM6QL6IfaR7CJYe_5n8-onkOkU26A8G92qGsA4hC_nHJZt24D9zn044zTbl7opY6dcPt9jNj-gu8VRlWf4yEZjGDw7NdRvCbCgjEvmKObCdnA8wRNQXB4btrX7Wvg-8Ia4DeJCNuz3euBm3mHcQYK5GEnSDmIkyzPcqaDyvkw1Vee1GQ8vt-pSAUrurVWYGoKDWQQ6MGln137_k1nCotEXQAJb8Tq7Dbx2cL6sEP4bYT50iPd3xRiAwcsBrJs%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06ed7afedf74fe285dd90cdb32f5ef1&_e=zt_DpmXPa0U1dpW-6iSnRapoS83Igo1jy_LjXRTfoypTWWODQgEeQPXjcSp7O_7j1nJB6eTF6fh5tG9nnLqlV2CU-QFJyarIQzBRj-GBEfZWht1_O6_K0gTK3RHj5NPGK3aTPyn0bv0gX_ciFCbK_8mUzBcBbMazxLpbagfJNX_9idk2QUI-VMFrCJKyE0XZlbG90t2dyalxBgLHs8RSVuVjjRBB2vGopJhGK6K7Cjjc0j3itdD_ubZAqFWmz_607GS8ltdlJlWd9Rnxm4vTMBfgyXSOMDUStVAF2drVScH0vjkZ2WyUiI75FPHuNPKzeRm4RWD0nB5DK7QFNUeBy5P7RFXcst6lPhuXGM4ZWbA_nUc9rIQZUZioX4jytjN0ZpQClLDV4C50TbZ_L0WyMI9nzEZCOXPF7LWGgnv25Djy7_HA50n6ON2Vc3Z8kqpS6YzHwdL7SwrjlEh4T7Zco1AflSpoVj2XpDeX2hbrkHQxI3WknY2zzh4rl0gL5LnNvCRBT-L_-kpv4P_0fd610dmI0OV1rBxFLW6g4nz85DMDzZMPB5qm2cUEzetw0mHqWvpU8N2KKJnVc4mTtQCaQJqSqjEHuDugXxqECoksaOl_jCZ7Dwcs2YKJk1sCeTgu3ywqvy3t4ll6SW1iSBpgnk4KS8x6D-kznMQwZWE-OVYBP1rOrzJLBmd4TVnlWBEep4yGG-omspDzsDQpRTV9pLfuv2vn97oJxH2dbzsHcnF9ebb9pN2Mp-2Q0AQ5d8EJtXS4H-ivy5oOEuN2N1jUlbx3G466sBbopg24jrZctGs%3D)

Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets.

**You have a choice:** let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied.

**I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America.**

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | Fellow Conservative, The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me. Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable. I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America. Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. . Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric. Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online. I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.** Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder? I can’t. Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed. Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words. They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

# [It's not about Kirk, or Kimmel, or Colbert](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=174074455&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDc0NDU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgzNzk5MTksImV4cCI6MTc2MDk3MTkxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HprokJ8KZ_F8QljGAKF1MPaS9tUXE5F8uE8LIyovQpU)
### Legions of conservatives and liberals alike have recently raised alarms about freedom of expression, after turning a blind eye to far worse abuses endured by their neighbors for decades
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Sep 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=174074455&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDc0NDU1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1ODM3OTkxOSwiZXhwIjoxNzYwOTcxOTE5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3YNW-CQCi88h-2IYDREASoLK-65YuNAPUYZbJZI0Wdw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=174074455&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDc0NDU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgzNzk5MTksImV4cCI6MTc2MDk3MTkxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HprokJ8KZ_F8QljGAKF1MPaS9tUXE5F8uE8LIyovQpU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/its-not-about-kirk-or-kimmel-or-colbert?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

MLK [told](https://substack.com/redirect/af6a52db-bfc2-4104-85e2-41a5507f595f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) us to expect no solidarity from what he described as "[the white moderate](https://substack.com/redirect/eb5f0ca8-5c5a-48ab-a0da-30c6579c191c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." Today's widespread indignation--from conservatives lamenting an assassination, as well as liberals responding to the cancellation of comedians, proves his point.
Responding to issues including mass surveillance, arbitrary detention, torture with impunity, offensive war, constitutional warmaking authority, and government secrecy, I wrote articles, organized direct action, led non-profit grassroots lobbying campaigns, litigated, recorded an album, ran for federal office, won a primary, and learned the hard way that most Americans can't see more than an inch beyond their own interests.
### Comedy filling in for journalism
I love Stephen Colbert. Both he, and Jimmy Kimmel, demonstrate the best facets of culture and entertainment. They're hysterically funny, incisive, and adversarially critical of power, more or less in the way that journalists are supposed to be.
They embody both comedy and journalism, in an era when institutional journalism has [abandoned](https://substack.com/redirect/f2aeb95f-7ddc-4d34-a41a-ace17abf51c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) its core principles to instead serve power. In that respect, Colbert and Kimmel--and other political comedians like [Sammy Obeid](https://substack.com/redirect/7c938ab1-6193-4c4e-a4d8-9fdb407e3014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Ronny Chieng](https://substack.com/redirect/22e10f04-4e6b-4236-b682-79590f152ff4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [Vidura Bandara Rajapaksa](https://substack.com/redirect/fa7a40ec-731b-44cb-a569-ec272897490c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--stand in the timeless shoes of pioneers including Jon Stewart, Dave Chappelle, George Carlin, and Richard Pryor.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b1f4e7df-8721-4d54-b6c2-613dec54282b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And just to be clear, I don't mean that journalism was compromised only in the recent past, in the months since media institutions began [overtly bending their writing](https://substack.com/redirect/25e704fb-9f79-4fca-b900-fd9f6d776453?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to kiss the behind of a [leader with a frail ego](https://substack.com/redirect/ae71b107-000d-4edd-b9bd-a3d167c1c67c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Long before that, corporate news outlets reduced themselves to propaganda by [building cults of personality](https://substack.com/redirect/6e21e9e6-97ec-4650-826a-106460d4f495?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) around dynasty politicians while shamelessly [promoting](https://substack.com/redirect/77cd80ae-d083-4f56-a820-4aa7b20ccfcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) every war-for-profit over the past three generations.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform --and inspire--your friends by sharing this post._
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=174074455&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDc0NDU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgzNzk5MTksImV4cCI6MTc2MDk3MTkxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HprokJ8KZ_F8QljGAKF1MPaS9tUXE5F8uE8LIyovQpU)
Whether the Pentagon or predatory billionaires, the press in the U.S. has usually served someone powerful. Rarely have professional journalists reflected the supposed values of their own profession, such as transparency and accountability.
So it makes some sense that people have a soft spot for comedians. The best among them do the doubly hard work of telling the truth, while offering the humor and sarcasm that enable many listeners who might otherwise shy away to instead confront reality.
### **Look up, for God 's sake**
Watching calls for corporate boycotts explode on social media in the wake of ABC and parent company Disney "indefinitely suspending" Kimmel's show left me wondering: where have all these people been all this time?
Why are so many more Americans moved to care about wealthy comedians losing their corporate platforms than children being murdered en masse with American weapons every day?
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication made possible by readers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QLYaKuQizbsl3Tl99WPdJfeeGPwI84pURtOyh60mOSU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=174074455)
Don't care about Palestinians?
How about the Black student and white homeless man [lynched](https://substack.com/redirect/0641976b-765d-41ef-878f-e734724b6419?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Mississippi _this week_? It's revealing that journalists have been so dramatically less willing to report on their deaths than Charlie Kirk's.
What about when [Obama decided](https://substack.com/redirect/454da971-04b1-44be-bcab-92b59925b6a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to vaporize a 16-year old born in Denver based on his father's speech?
By all means, call out [Trump's drone strikes](https://substack.com/redirect/f47de18c-9529-45f8-a7ce-cb4bd8957cb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) targeting alleged Venezuelan drug traffickers. But why were so many of today's suddenly outraged voices all-too-willing to defer to Obama's drone strikes that [murdered innocent people by the dozens](https://substack.com/redirect/b15ca0a5-3b3f-4752-b93a-a66cd081affd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over a decade ago?
### **Democrats supporting Republican policies**
Democrats paved the path for Trump, in at least two ways.
Most recently, Democrats [played key roles](https://substack.com/redirect/79f79ea3-b5ad-46bf-893d-b4fa716c8555?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in putting Trump in office--not once, but twice.
But starting long before that, Democrats in Washington [worked with Republicans](https://substack.com/redirect/aa10b7a0-3b0b-45dc-bc16-ac1f0c1f37e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) relentlessly over the past generation to empower the executive branch and diminish the power of checks & balances. Despite the rancor of partisan gridlock, serving the executive branch and degrading the constitutional separation of powers was the one thing on which otherwise warring policymakers in Washington often [agreed](https://substack.com/redirect/77cd80ae-d083-4f56-a820-4aa7b20ccfcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Few policy arenas demonstrate this pattern better than immigration.
Long before Trump deployed his ICE goon squads in cities across the country, it was President Obama who earned the title "[deporter in chief](https://substack.com/redirect/5fdfea41-89ad-471d-ac9b-b873891553de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" from the immigrant rights community. And that was [not the only way](https://substack.com/redirect/b4472322-d613-4e74-b54f-12332ef47210?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in which Obama [laid the foundation](https://substack.com/redirect/f24ea8fd-c8a2-4aab-b00c-1a3c5b5e3cf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for Trump's authoritarianism.
For over a decade, I (and many others) advocated for stronger checks & balances on executive power run amok. Responding to issues including mass surveillance, arbitrary detention, torture with impunity, offensive war, constitutional warmaking authority, and government secrecy, I wrote articles, organized direct action, led non-profit grassroots lobbying campaigns, litigated, recorded an album, ran for federal office, won a primary, and learned the hard way that most Americans can't see more than an inch beyond their own interests.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=174074455&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc0MDc0NDU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgzNzk5MTksImV4cCI6MTc2MDk3MTkxOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HprokJ8KZ_F8QljGAKF1MPaS9tUXE5F8uE8LIyovQpU)
I sounded the alarm in every way conceivable, including in a keynote address at a law symposium in Chicago in 2011. The [resulting article](https://substack.com/redirect/493c0ab1-cd06-4258-a3ae-8e35fdd8cf57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) makes clear that, while we today face an unprecedented degree of [insecurity](https://substack.com/redirect/ae71b107-000d-4edd-b9bd-a3d167c1c67c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and mendacity in the executive branch, the [structural issues](https://substack.com/redirect/3b1b49b3-0fb5-410e-a888-fa261107f1cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) enabling the Trump administration's assault on America have been in place for [many years](https://substack.com/redirect/4ecd50de-5274-4115-bf76-d40cfef577c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And it's not like I was whispering in a vacuum, either. When I ran for office to remove the Democratic Party's leader from Congress, national publications featured my concerns about civil liberties. _[The Intercept](https://substack.com/redirect/385279c1-763c-4044-94b4-de0717d4ec4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/385279c1-763c-4044-94b4-de0717d4ec4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)interviewed me at some length on a podcast observing the depth and range of my advocacy work and policy agenda. [Rolling Stone gave me the microphone](https://substack.com/redirect/c045abcb-a217-488a-ae1f-fc6c0f318563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Veterans Day. Many other outlets with substantial audiences featured my concerns.
Yet still, even professional journalists couldn't be bothered to pay attention, or even support a public debate after I won a congressional primary to challenge a leading Democrat and finally force attention to these [long overlooked issues](https://substack.com/redirect/423653b3-5355-444e-aedd-eef668dc5e1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It's great to see Americans finally getting active--but the choice among issues that seems to be animating the liberal center forces me to roll my eyes and shake my fist at the sky. Even these seemingly well-intentioned people seem to be moved neither by [history](https://substack.com/redirect/c0326d6e-50e1-4673-9372-7e2d8eea4124?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), nor by [writing](https://substack.com/redirect/408a2914-a95b-4657-bef4-dbb42dc36acf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (that even they acknowledge as canonical), nor by [empathy](https://substack.com/redirect/9b4c8157-a433-4617-97d2-f1bbd9004477?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), nor by anything beyond a [knee-jerk reaction](https://substack.com/redirect/de2c2dff-b408-4990-bd07-0dc826bb0513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to a co-opted news cycle.
### **Spare some outrage**
I really do hope that everyone participating in a media boycott responding to the cancellation of a comedian might also be moved to lift a finger for basic human rights in Gaza.
I [wrote a song in 2016](https://substack.com/redirect/527e9866-ddf9-4da0-be8b-5a4cc6a380c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) inspired by the long history of solidarity between Palestine and Black America, given their shared struggles in the face of predatory policing, among other things.
If "the white moderate" about whom MLK warned us had heeded the voices--and painfully [revealing experiences](https://substack.com/redirect/3ae8266d-6387-49f1-adc3-1c6f9325cf47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--of voices from _either_ of those communities, we could have avoided the worst of the unfolding future.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QLYaKuQizbsl3Tl99WPdJfeeGPwI84pURtOyh60mOSU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=174074455)
However late in the proverbial game it may be to finally begin acknowledging the warnings we have all been given, late is certainly better than never. One hopes that enough time remains for today's newly radicalized liberals to make a difference before the predicted results of their previous [deference](https://substack.com/redirect/bfb25ed3-a99d-4728-b7ab-18cbf2f187c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) drives us all to [early graves](https://substack.com/redirect/be71a588-2f47-4f71-9f94-035d60f614de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--or, in the meantime, [transforms](https://substack.com/redirect/abfa55be-4fa7-4fdc-8a5d-85c98288e213?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) America into the all-white country of the right wing's dreams.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Chronicles of a Dying Empire](https://substack.com/redirect/e53077b5-2d57-43cc-91af-2f5409737d82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack..QLYaKuQizbsl3Tl99WPdJfeeGPwI84pURtOyh60mOSU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QLYaKuQizbsl3Tl99WPdJfeeGPwI84pURtOyh60mOSU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

clean_body: An MSNBC liberal called me a 'Black mouth' for 'White supremacist practices'| | | An MSNBC liberal called me a 'Black mouth' for 'White supremacist practices'| | | | An MSNBC liberal called me a 'Black mouth' for 'White supremacist practices'| | | | Peter, I'm a fighter. I won't cower in the face of any attack. I will always take on the mainstream media and expose their double standards. My husband is black. Our children and grandchildren are black. I am black. The Left loses its mind when I speak the truth. The liberal media can't comprehend that I think for myself and refuse to be bound by their ideology--just because of the color of my skin! In 2021, I made history and became the first woman to be elected Lt. Governor of Virginia. That's right, I shattered a glass ceiling as a black Republican woman. Democrats and the mainstream media went BALLISTIC! All along the way, these Leftists threw nasty, racist insults at me. They simply couldn't comprehend that I'm conservative because I actually think for myself! Believe me, I've been called every awful name in the book, but the mainstream media 's vicious attacks have only strengthened my resolve to spread our winning conservative message. You may not believe it, but this is the truth: I used to be a Democrat! I thought they were the party for regular people, but I was wrong. Republicans are the ones who are fighting to lift people out of poverty, to ensure kids have access to quality education without indoctrination, to create good-paying jobs, and to keep our communities safe. Honestly, when the liberal talking heads on MSNBC started attacking me, I knew I must be on the right path! Don't hold back - No amount is too small! Fighting back against the liberal media and the entire Democrat establishment is never easy, so thank you for joining us to stop them. Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA) | | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. name: Tim Kaine
subject: re: what Trump just said about me from the Oval
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, this is just ridiculous.
Right now Donald Trump is having a meltdown about his own Justice Department not bringing criminal charges against one of his perceived political enemies.
Now he's pushing out the US attorney that he himself nominated just a few months ago — and he’s using the fact that I supported the guy to trash him .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Here’s what Trump just said to a reporter from the Oval Office when asked about firing the US Attorney for the Eastern District of Virginia, who was in charge of the investigation against New York Attorney General Letitia James:
“He was approved by two Democrat senators, who, in my opinion, are among the worst... Warner and Kaine. Two bad guys. Bad senators. They do a terrible job for the people of Virginia.”
Come on, Donald. You can do better than that!
But seriously — if we want to talk about who’s doing a terrible job for the people they’re supposed to lead, Donald Trump is #1 on the list:
His idiotic (and illegal!) tariffs are skyrocketing the cost of living for people all across the country. His party is on the verge of shutting down the government which could have disastrous effects on our economy. And he’s using the power of the presidency to trample on free speech — our most basic right as Americans!
We all know this Trump administration is a disaster. The question is, what are we going to do about it?
From the Senate, I’m using every single legislative tool at my disposal to fight back against his dangerous policies and push my GOP colleagues to either join me or get on the record.
In Virginia, we’re fighting to flip all three statewide offices blue this November and deliver a loud and clear rebuke to Trump and his cronies.
And in 2026, we need to send another message and take this reckless GOP out of their trifecta of government control. We can do it — but it’s going to take every one of us standing up and getting involved.
If you disagree with Trump that I’m a “bad guy” and a “bad senator” — please join me in this work today. Pitch in any amount today to get ready to win in Virginia in 2025 and all across the country in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=20]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Thanks for everything you do. Let’s go win.
—Tim Kaine
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. This exotic herb has been clinically proven to reduce BPH symptoms by 66% (or more) in less than 60 days. It can also help you:

* Kiss “goodbye” to embarrassing dribbles

* Fix erection quality issues

name: John James
subject: 20,000 voters decide it all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Patriot, The latest poll shows me **tied** with the top Democrat in this race. And here’s the truth: the way it stands right now, just **_20,000 voters_** will decide whether we win or lose Michigan. I know how close this can get. In 2022, I won by **1,600 votes**. That’s how razor-thin elections in Michigan truly are. **Now we have one mission: reach those 20,000 voters and bring them to our side.** That means ads in the right places. Boots on the ground in the toughest counties. [**And a surge of grassroots support to fuel every part of this campaign.**](http://links.gopwins.info/u/click?_t=98057da4e99f4c609080f212fe1184e1&_m=1a3511a33f13418fb21bf07ed5b0052b&_e=k06LxmRD-QSVIs1ydld8oIF7DfdexUzmUYUFtEqPg6IZ48qJeXP5nbm2yLxxOKSnYRDJJo0DS3_tupR2Mfn1CMncbfN57KJxd9-WNVb72wzoOMoe0CTo3QcvdVhSsXamzookvErboD3lqiibnf1wmXekz6z2yt27UT6sYWtG2CZMSV3Kyj_KCZC0sCC0ged9A5Rk2Ub9VhMxX2HQUN5QO0xbLcOwndDKfot4IkrvhhVM3LrE8m-AGAEq-tgzfIDtculzjORxJd2_xx8gD2Tj_ySP0RGXRm9F5agYnVZimj-oZhK_tnchJxxkq_qFcOeEUAzOcOGalxBVy7VGxBDDXDvBNnyAtmuQtlQH4VOPxXSEz0xPIc4TZie2sgWjN5Wazpv3CCjIG2mxGYdSVOV4q0TwoTiLBOYoLY6AhBkDsypjeervzuN2AUXB07bQiPOOroKzaSdXRYRz4aYba_LvUepV5bu1jQ8OABMwppXHezzSLDIy0lnCmUvCGhYBCKYdZ5lhUIGCO0VL7SOkSlfXrznTWpbAsjL0vb0o3rZrOETwFtqjE1KJ67RkiMTV9Gt3KuQJvAlkWbAOm1-0-339VtrV3i5LK4rl_YrsC5_VZ0Nm9KzkYr83ox3i9_UtG_HXii0K-jeOeakPj2n96RvgoSO5a7HeXBlTotQ9lfkr3-9nmE1I8j2GW4p5Kcr4iprlzlpbtJzHnSG98O_j2exXGA%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Patriot, The latest poll shows me tied with the top Democrat in this race. And here’s the truth: the way it stands right now, just 20,000 voters will decide whether we win or lose Michigan. I know how close this can get. In 2022, I won by 1,600 votes. That’s how razor-thin elections in Michigan truly are. Now we have one mission: reach those 20,000 voters and bring them to our side. That means ads in the right places. Boots on the ground in the toughest counties. This race is winnable, but only if we act now. Every single dollar today translates directly into voter contact that can flip this race. Patriot, together we can turn this margin into victory. For faith, for family, for freedom, John James | | Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312 | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for MI Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Peter, The Trump Administration didn't approve of Jimmy Kimmel's political satire, so it threatened ABC's broadcast license, and ABC took Kimmel off the air. **As you no doubt recognize: this is what happens in authoritarian states, where disfavored political speech is met with official punishment.** You mustn't offend the king! Shame on ABC and its owner Disney for capitulating to censorship. Their cowardly refusal to fight for the First Amendment will become infamous. The Trump Administration’s intent is to chill political speech and repress critics — to send the message that if you offend Trump, his Administration will use official power to attack you. This is the next step in Donald Trump’s growing, unprecedented, and deeply un-American campaign to punish and silence his critics by abusing the powers of state. We cannot allow this man even more power. _And the thing he fears most is losing his rubber-stamp Congress._ It is more vital than at any time in modern American history that the political opposition has the resources to win. **And to be very blunt, the big-money national GOP groups have more money than the big-money national Democratic groups right now.** So it’s going to come down to grassroots supporters. Are there enough Americans committed to opposing this assault on our Constitution to power a landslide Democratic victory in the midterms? I am the Democratic Senator facing the toughest reelection campaign. So if you are horrified by this latest abuse of power, one real thing you can do is send my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia resources. [Send $10. Send $100. Split a donation between my reelection campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115584979/570818469/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_092025_OSSOFFSPLIT_KIMMEL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTYwYTE4ZS0yZTk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rcqJkmij8lG20obJQ7VvTMbDZvMOjG4bfiw34t-UAv8=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115584985/570818472/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_092025_OSSOFFSPLIT_KIMMEL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTYwYTE4ZS0yZTk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rcqJkmij8lG20obJQ7VvTMbDZvMOjG4bfiw34t-UAv8=)**

name: Urgent Redistricting Update via Our Revolution
subject: Missouri Just Gave GOP a New House Seat – Help Us Reverse It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1011&refcode=email-20250920_v&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

This is urgent: Missouri's Republican supermajority just rammed through a
new congressional map that all but guarantees another House seat for the
GOP. Their goal is clear: help Trump and MAGA Republicans rig our
democracy to lock-in control of our government for years to come.

But we CAN stop them – if we act now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?source=email-20250920&t=1061&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Headline: GOP nets 1 more House seat as Missouri passes gerrymandered
map

Here’s how: in Missouri, a bill can be put up for a statewide vote if
enough signatures are gathered. So our organizers are already working
hand-in-hand with local groups to hit the streets and get the 100,000
signatures we need to put Missouri’s horrific new map in front of the
voters, not the politicians.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250920nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]This is our chance to organize on the ground, fight back, and draw a line
in the sand to stop Trump from stealing another seat. But we need to move
quickly. Will you urgently donate today so we can mobilize the grassroots
in Missouri to stop Trump?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250920nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250920nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250920nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250920nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250920nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250920nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

It’s not just Missouri. Next comes Ohio, where the GOP is racing to redraw
district lines – again – after voters already rejected their last scheme.
Florida, Indiana, and Kansas could all be next. If we don’t hold the line
in Missouri, Republicans will see it as a green light to steamroll voters’
rights everywhere.

We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines. Which is why we’re rapidly
ramping up our organizing machine to gather enough signatures in the next
90 days to use this window of opportunity to force a statewide vote to
stop Trump from rigging the elections in Missouri, too.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?source=email-20250920&t=1060&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Headline: Missouri Senate passes redistricting and initiative petition
plans — voters may get final say

Texas and California have captured most of the attention around
redistricting, but control of the House could come down to just one seat –
and we can’t afford to let Missouri go under the radar. Statewide fights
like this require hiring organizers, training volunteers, and launching
massive public education campaigns to make sure everyone knows what is at
stake.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34020?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250920nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]This battle is in our hands. Missouri voters can block Trump’s map – but
only if we show up, organize, and outnumber them. Can you donate now to
fuel this grassroots surge, help us deploy canvassers, and collect
signatures day and night to defend our democracy?

Grassroots movements have stopped rigged maps before. This is our moment.
Let’s make history – again.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Sign Up

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22266?t=1010&akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9403%2E5885482%2EMUxSGi

| |

Dear Fellow American,

As we approach the landmark 250th birthday of our great nation in 2026, my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation are proud to offer a new eBook:

American Founders: Leaders at the Creation of the Republic
---
|
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/ZAbtSMSb4hwW6ptgWHIj6aC6kyHKm-0A0L70-SejOTmpwNxniYRcdH5yyDtCZt3x7bw5-Wxm2FfmYydiisjKAVJjBStINoNIV7Gt1L0hMgQ2SuyQdBLmtwLLZVVdfLhc_L-8Lik4RnMadpPJyl3-8FzpVhyiLz4TbIVVu78y63qds9fmgV_Q5l0NgI_pDbdolgWjGii19ckAcCmnGRfNJHytF_0KgcEBgPCeY_SUBP01SV-S26Ficg-zSd1H--PZdgTHgScZ21qGD19w3NU1mXDyUO65tQd9x6Hk-R1DBZZiJdAmHbvfnE5XtIAmk_BeQ-pejrLEMMgjpMqeycZu0NCDcDIjvUAhvB3xw0S6cjmV8-rU78MEdn1Xj8tkhxrQsFh4HD0gTIzNl4Ek87rl8dp95uPOvRx9dfaJpfiRaHBpGLRiojL0BGH8Jk-IgfTXjcMn_uS64H2RENSBNnkIWk6WsHr4uutHFu4r9r1Ls5jC3gOSrjQsxxT0h9ZMySgP8RzSA27zL-_a21ntSqEoEbQJd5vNBsvP5nE1cEVZ4_icOxhIlPgDhRRVj6541aGVWAJMHiiriewCULwHCGv6XPN7XjJbO5V7kFZffw1gVrJRQzu1hl_QGJZdFOOP6ThDhhO0Mn9VvOEoSKfYJbR1Wnm4phYFER726h29/IvK5xpEmEkzNpAtODIyOciNoT5BY9A7k/13)
---
| | This comprehensive 300+ page guide brings to life 16 of the nation's most influential Founders--not as mythical figures, but as real statesmen confronting the immense political challenges of their time. From George Washington to Thomas Jefferson, you'll explore their pivotal decisions that laid the foundation for American liberty and self-government.

I invite you to claim your FREE copy of this insightful eBook by following the secure link below:

[**https://secured.heritage.org/american-founders-ebook/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/6syaQbikvCQXc82aS9AhW3DhNWyq7DJ4C6x-ndeNSqW0JbMRkpQZIqlIQhY2iw__rV0_iRV7pweWUqZmikYM9OxiwEfiueV9wDnO2_v6r28nqa1BH62XDLSSHP8a2PXh2bxiI3prac0_l9XRs7hmx2ygOMOu6XhJMGjk6VQW-5f8kAi9uc04T9M9ShB-F7T01h1Wy07XTuTsZo3qlp7OVziCtCkGKql5ZfJXKHo_aLZ0uZB0UQkOhq0BkgP__pGBisbb0ncUQu3ULALy8dezfwT1iJrESPA5Lb9LH-IkhcgL46HWOk9fgOUal00BvfRYgT4GO5fITJsLbOMDEFqBTvUv_y7kUm-5ZUn68poeZlDSFSSKJ-YGd5QEn5KFvSjMhWLJeVlTA1R0xwPwq7Sa6e-U4b_33V_U9GraB4Us0ZlHUdii4_DKrgBiQjjCx1ad_ixkUmLGFWi9sgzdior-w5fE5nyNdgcPtvFpfim4GZJ7d5ObI8anTQ65OKWrXx7VSO_oFfwQmPhYvXzIVWtbYyoZODR3245Xyo3hP9Hr9DsF1OElRwN9vTkOC7QJsKT8OUf_7Bsz2RBxVGNWK8ccvaYIGkSD_zvRFjG7yAPCvKXoljlBuzCKHsZmiWzmmH1JPIxJlw8OSlDfVc8nYFfVwORn4SYecLr-6Odw/Pyk5Kt7BF8OM8PDlfrFASlkWudA58InB/13)

May this guide deepen your appreciation for the patriots whose vision and sacrifice gave us the inheritance of freedom we enjoy today.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Get your free digital copy of The Heritage Foundation 's new book, _American Founders: Leaders at the Creation of the Republic_ at this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/american-founders-ebook/](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/LyyeR60FNqqU7wGcKE0IRbr8M3-ZkVJN5Bo3lukY8yCqRunKYqwoVPtrS3qgf6NGI_Y5WxYdE2ualSkE6EFpZV77eqN6-csp-FJWmy5FMYNPYk2zks04hvEDD1SZ3pAaAoREeghahHRTv1slcYw_ZAR5Scz6zwpkgZxVI2xhwjvnlZTYdUT4R3fGJw7C9XPfoDavDFu8Er-A5zWpakrQ6yErrI25Je-3ZTan84yxzvVQtpd2GQyhd-m18-7919rsKOoCaLV7h5VyOgBWrUlr48WiUXDRXOmRfGRUSn9e1IzycN4xvza8-pYbkgMAuGT2jUyuTFJPb2Ftx6KtJXwValAyIWNLjw7MSMekXu1GMhxpDxV9AadoNSpwOGXOuz6pAhOUNlh-ZoQJAQLP0sjhsDrhyLmWtGkj4hFNbNM3A0QO-S2Xa2OtZpfwRGAegjQqG2J6V1CoaUQTi8zKnig5Rp1V9kepk4qr1vW7Jkb69vF-fK8YR9mWlmp9ADFzpRhxktzU3RlQKjDJU5EfssJHZBu4kO1zgcx9ETo8iM-sX_SzrMust0tz7IRScWpDZ_LNXzZweJp2VoY3T1qEGH39GHG3ZutPwjD8N2o18OnvxM0LmN5N5VauzPu8xOE5vvKFcTrQEtrYjgX8-AwEpL1WFNMEwH2t54TJLI1-/zcDoJSbTAHtfWCy1V2DORPekunXN6Ix3/13)**

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Trump officially endorsed my opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
He knows how important MI is to the Senate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6027?t=2&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)
---
null, it’s Haley Stevens.
It’s official: **Donald Trump has endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, in Michigan’s battleground Senate race.**
This isn’t a surprise – Rogers has spent years kissing up to Trump. MAGA megadonors even spent nearly $80 million last year trying to buy a Senate seat for Rogers. And now with Trump’s backing, we know what’s coming: a flood of GOP dark money and billionaire-funded attacks.
**We can fight back, but I need your help.** The deadline to hit our critical $15,000 daily fundraising goal is hours away, and we need the resources: _[**Will you rush $5 to help me compete against Rogers’ war chest and keep Michigan blue?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6028?t=3&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)_
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6029?t=4&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)
---
null, keeping Mike Rogers out of the Senate isn’t just about our race in Michigan. It’s about flipping the Senate blue and stopping another MAGA loyalist from rubber-stamping Trump’s chaos agenda: gutting Medicaid, raising prices with reckless tariffs, and forcing working families to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan – from helping save 200,000 auto jobs during the Great Recession to flipping a red House seat blue and delivering real results for working people. I’m in this race because Michiganders deserve a senator who fights for them, not someone who takes orders from Donald Trump.
**Here's the truth: Polling shows****I’m the Democrat with the best chance to beat Rogers.** GOP operatives even told _The Hill_ __ that __ I’m their **_toughest_** general election opponent. But to keep this lead – and win – I cannot miss this $15,000 fundraising goal.
**[I’m personally asking, null: Will you chip in $5 before midnight to help us reach our goal, keep Michigan blue, and defeat Trump’s handpicked candidate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6028?t=5&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6030?t=6&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6031?t=7&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6032?t=8&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6029?t=9&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)
---
Thanks for standing with me.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6033?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6027?t=11&akid=805%2E49239%2E9Fjzzo)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie ran his race — now we run ours
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166j32nk1khhb3dzwpapwyqkpzsugsbp27z8tk23i6t443h2ae91yhd1iya17hcf7j8xkd44hwqju03kj3egn1p&__stmp=t2w667&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor Turning Point USA.
* * *
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit" | | | | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w667&__onlt=h)
---
Friend,
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can't stay quiet._ **Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w667&__onlt=h)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie. America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on.** _We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don't you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth. That's what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight. **And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible.** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right. Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn't just start a movement... _he started a revival._** And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision... **_Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today._** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w667&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w667&__onlt=h)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w667&__onlt=h)
---

**Support Turning Point USA**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w667&__onlt=h)

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: DASS Legal
subject: The fight for voter privacy just escalated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115586360/570821419/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUzMTBmNC0yZjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80MfzEVSSIL8WHIbKtNtSHp6D2k80AIvsVAs69S8Fe4=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s DOJ sues Maine and Oregon for refusing to hand over voter data** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115586363/570821421/-1876887045?refcode=em-9.20.25-all-rs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUzMTBmNC0yZjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80MfzEVSSIL8WHIbKtNtSHp6D2k80AIvsVAs69S8Fe4=)**
* * *
Friend, The Trump administration just launched lawsuits against Maine and Oregon, accusing them of “noncompliance” because their Secretaries of State refused to turn over full voter registration rolls, including private data. **Let us be clear: this is not normal. This is not business as usual. This is a full-blown authoritarian tactic to consolidate control and intimidate election officials.** Both Secretary Shenna Bellows (ME) and Secretary Tobias Read (OR) have stood firm in the face of Trump’s threats. They’ve upheld state law and protected the privacy of every voter in their state. And now they’re being dragged into court**for doing their job.** Shenna Bellows said it best: **“They really need to stay out of trying to interfere with our safe, free and secure elections.”** This is about revenge, control, and dismantling the independence of our elections state by state. **Trump’s DOJ will not stop with Maine and Oregon.** East or West, from corner to corner of this country, Trump and his administration will not stop. Other states will be next. And unless we push back immediately and forcefully, this authoritarian playbook becomes the norm. That’s why DASS is going all-in to support the leaders on the front lines. But legal fights like this are expensive, and time is critical. **[This is an URGENT development, friend. Will you rush a $3 or whatever you can to help DASS support Secretaries of State who refuse to back down, who defend voting rights in defiance of this suppression campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115586365/570821424/957523928?refcode=em-9.20.25-all-rs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUzMTBmNC0yZjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80MfzEVSSIL8WHIbKtNtSHp6D2k80AIvsVAs69S8Fe4=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115586367/570821426/957523928?refcode=em-9.20.25-all-rs-b&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDUzMTBmNC0yZjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80MfzEVSSIL8WHIbKtNtSHp6D2k80AIvsVAs69S8Fe4=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s DOJ sues Maine and Oregon for refusing to hand over voter data = Friend, The Trump administration just launched lawsuits against Maine and Oregon, accusing them of “noncompliance” because their Secretaries of State refused to turn over full voter registration rolls, including private data. Let us be clear: this is not normal. This is not business as usual. This is a full-blown authoritarian tactic to consolidate control and intimidate election officials. Both Secretary Shenna Bellows (ME) and Secretary Tobias Read (OR) have stood firm in the face of Trump’s threats. They’ve upheld state law and protected the privacy of every voter in their state. And now they’re being dragged into courtfor doing their job. Shenna Bellows said it best: “They really need to stay out of trying to interfere with our safe, free and secure elections.” This is about revenge, control, and dismantling the independence of our elections state by state. Trump’s DOJ will not stop with Maine and Oregon. East or West, from corner to corner of this country, Trump and his administration will not stop. Other states will be next. And unless we push back immediately and forcefully, this authoritarian playbook becomes the norm. That’s why DASS is going all-in to support the leaders on the front lines. But legal fights like this are expensive, and time is critical. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** We stand with Shenna. We stand with Tobias. And we’re asking you to stand with them too. name: Team Kelly
subject: 🇺🇸 To ALL of Mark Kelly’s supporters: Please, don’t scroll past this email 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark Kelly’s most important supporters aren’t the people who write the biggest checks.
#

Friend —
Mark Kelly’s most important supporters aren’t the people who write the biggest checks.
They’re the people who were there when it mattered most.
People like you.
---

Your support has been critical in helping Mark combat MAGA extremism.
Because of you, Mark Kelly is one of the leading voices speaking out against Trump in the United States Senate.
---

But here’s something we thought you should know: Out of all the people who read these emails, only a fraction of them have made a donation to support his work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that special group of people.
---

Mark’s average donation online is around $19. Some give more, many give less. But with Donald Trump pushing our democracy to the brink, all that matters is that you’re supporting Mark at a time he needs it most.
We’ll put that donation right to work not just in Arizona, but around the country. Mark is on the frontlines of this fight, and he doesn’t know the meaning of quit.
---

[**If any of that sounds worth a donation to support Mark, please: We’re humbly asking that you chip in $3 before midnight tonight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept25.8HUEZn&refcode=em250920-1-f&t=1&akid=6191%2E6688874%2EqLxY9P)

---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-sept25.c0Wk5k&refcode=em250920-1-f&t=24&akid=6191%2E6688874%2EqLxY9P)**

Now, more than ever, we need this team.

Thank you,
Team Kelly

Take a look at this headline: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115586858/570822987/-8077494?refcode=email_092025_public-lands&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFiODY2MS0zMDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMgtv8Hcu3kDIQs9CH6-XoZTLpQwqnuD3d9APs6DoKw=) **The Trump administration just proposed ROLLING BACK conservation protections for public lands — to open up more taxpayer-owned land for private development.[Can you rush a donation today to help John Hickenlooper continue standing up against the rising attacks on Americans’ public lands?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115586859/570822988/-984874665?refcode=email_092025_public-lands&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFiODY2MS0zMDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMgtv8Hcu3kDIQs9CH6-XoZTLpQwqnuD3d9APs6DoKw=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115586860/570822989/-984874665?refcode=email_092025_public-lands&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFiODY2MS0zMDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMgtv8Hcu3kDIQs9CH6-XoZTLpQwqnuD3d9APs6DoKw=)

This isn’t anything new. **Ever since Trump returned to office, he and Washington Republicans have plotted to auction off our public lands to the highest bidder:**
Republicans in Congress cooked up a scheme to sell off millions of acres of public lands — _including our parks and forests here in Colorado_ — before John helped strip it from the final budget, sending the GOP back to the drawing table.
**Now, the Trump administration is aiming to bend federal policy to de-prioritize conservation and elevate commercial uses of public lands — _affecting over two hundred MILLION acres of land under the Bureau of Land Management's authority._**
Listen, Trump and the Republicans might just want to exploit Colorado’s forests and grasslands to turn a quick buck, but to Coloradans, our national forests, parks, and public lands are truly priceless. [_**If you agree, then please, chip in a couple bucks to John’s reelection campaign and help him keep up the fight to leave public lands in public hands! →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115586861/570822990/-984874665?refcode=email_092025_public-lands&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFiODY2MS0zMDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YMgtv8Hcu3kDIQs9CH6-XoZTLpQwqnuD3d9APs6DoKw=)

clean_body: We warned that Washington Republicans weren’t done attacking our public lands. Take a look at this headline: Team, we warned that Washington Republicans weren’t done attacking our public lands. Take a look at this headline: = The Trump administration just proposed ROLLING BACK conservation protections for public lands — to open up more taxpayer-owned land for private development.= | | = This isn’t anything new. Ever since Trump returned to office, he and Washington Republicans have plotted to auction off our public lands to the highest bidder: Republicans in Congress cooked up a scheme to sell off millions of acres of public lands — including our parks and forests here in Colorado — before John helped strip it from the final budget, sending the GOP back to the drawing table. Now, the Trump administration is aiming to bend federal policy to de-prioritize conservation and elevate commercial uses of public lands — affecting over two hundred MILLION acres of land under the Bureau of Land Management's authority. Listen, Trump and the Republicans might just want to exploit Colorado’s forests and grasslands to turn a quick buck, but to Coloradans, our national forests, parks, and public lands are truly priceless. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you — every bit helps. Hickenlooper HQ | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 300007 Denver, CO 80203 United States

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Please help save refugees’ lives today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We’re now in National Hispanic Heritage Month, a time to honor Latin American immigrants and push back against xenophobic attacks. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWvTELFmyPq9Mcs_orRRQ2fmJ16CdSylYvn4MndcMMfPGFTD2BpGZrAxar-kY7clf67f9f3KmeEZdP5hkCrpZcKvJnf8504qpr6JEnhxBnt1Q7LSSZe_wGlAVXL30w1F2D2_226VhNgCgKPyDJ4Tt5G5RyLawZhr_FiS_o9lSVCsaxyNxXzazV4jHwJ-nywBXu/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h0/h001.-PcjMlIIZ52lVyo5lLQQ1uobCM66R8iAv6dpVXWL0dg)
---
Friend, It’s Hispanic Heritage Month, and I want to lift up an incredible organization I met while on a congressional delegation trip to Mexico City last month. My progressive colleagues and I joined the PanAmerican Congress gathering in Mexico City, where elected officials from over 10 countries came together to fight against fascism. Because the U.S. border is essentially closed, millions of refugees and migrants come through the city and find themselves stuck in Mexico for years. **Every year, the shelter**[**Casa Tochán**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOz3gIZxkAXhM4p4KJCYmDzoqaFlEdG-Jr2VUc5mMEqjNcBnk1BsGyEY7dpZG_tsr4F5PGrfz8DNk-Ixs6ZXM2yJK7VYnqh1q9fYhO8c2UrmcRhNl5MafgYonbZCEOU6XdEO303LScDqURlo07-pGB42pyr13s7rLFwKMy2BgQVltDlrSnNI9Q59YP9ZwEqHB34JZEEDtUCBPNGGAlvpllkrv2WQ3n9TBuQ9u3aV7LELINPdCvbiChv8eBNRMKvCJQ0xM9EPPsItAO2ZzBr1Ty_A/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h1/h001.aTgmsnaq7fkQEkUOnOEg0gYvqrIiELsmpviRJPrMrJ0)**houses and feeds hundreds of people.** The organization **also** secures **medical attention** for residents by regularly bringing in doctors and psychologists, supports residents with **building skills and finding jobs** , and provides**legal support** for people’s migration cases—including enabling them to stay in Mexico. But with rising inflation, increased restrictions at the U.S. border, and the sudden closure of the U.S. Agency for International Development,******Casa Tochán urgently needs our support** to fill their food pantry and make badly needed infrastructure and safety upgrades to their shelter. [**Could you chip in to help migrants and refugees who can’t cross through to the United States? Our support is urgently needed as Trump ramps up his attacks in Latin America and against U.S. residents with Latin American ancestry.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOul5CkbqCO7XJhTEzcRN-U1inSKzgIOWxA5_xDJehHxuwwXckG8615UVJ2A6hj1uK_Emim9kl9O-S9aQ7q3nNKCtz7a_bHCp_szMLO27ww00N6YSMW5UqPi6mj75suqvEb27FeVCVFZ7gR2nO4qXrPgtfTMwPzf27m45Bi-Fn-htasLFFPXEt6K7m3gASqIHasUw0-eCfdZTmteM4bpHYeffujexKgJ5g4mzKTzioJEaoWrAI7MWUIf02plgvKeTV7Lp1cTxUsp-IinS72Q0ykg/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h2/h001.JFEZCy1bJbgnXoXsGvZC8vahRTTyQMSM81fFQDwo3tU) | [PLEASE CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOZip3GVzSHrv_Z415BDpj_VpiOodXELUvn0ksA6EWn6S4giEzD3RYWLlVtCw6AWrrPkcSNuYLQOZltciNA_exGA-qSWAVB1Wwvh0kk2cdcsVdZsVVIy6ShRJ7DSdaSBuIs2IxtBNaaB885HJYiA_jZVVRpQEOceWNlfSfvJtjoy1GEaUMCccozyGrd8ZDpUA7EV99Li9f9gNhh8AZdtp1jx0lhVXLTfOAKVYktflLET_uTjydyep0ogR4WPZcENjAA-_6VkYn6oOdEJKHDqeIoQ/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h3/h001.2r1dzvMrTkyyQrNcAct5zxQQuxYPFJqmeR4tchFNt8A)
---
On my trip to Mexico City during August’s congressional recess, I met people who work at the Unitarian Universalist Service Committee (UUSC) and partner with Casa Tochán.
We went together to tour the facility, and talked about raising money for the shelter. The above donation page is run by the U.S.-based UUSC, with 100% of the funds going to Casa Tochán.
Over the years since Casa Tochán began, residents and volunteers have covered the shelter in artwork. I got to witness these beautiful murals with supportive messages, including “Dreams are not illlegal”:
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOVH0owLfobtN4UtkMgbIDF_JE2DGtMItU93oaS3_uRMv2tpIjq5gmnmavJxDrcl7AYNV6KwKuqA6ZzElXxTxC0opne45J74K-HMCV2arh656UQa-feMa8pOuDm1JmKw8jlRei4evt9XfFifr4FHTuYkPVaY-2KbEo-iYX_MDNT0_XSUiYSE1mcvduXDtQCb-4Zcm30R-UGC8NOcx0Wn7b1cbawt3Vf094JzLBNujolZxgVXTW_UUpa2n1ACe8nb4ircw7-pDvbq0IA-5NEgt1vg/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h4/h001.kqYqpgVc_JlKBqxbYw0R01e6CeReAYYeyUmTX8IusbY)
A poem painted on one wall includes these lines:
> _I leave my homeland, my friends, my family._
> _I leave my town and my culture._
> _I do not have much left, I carry only my backpack, but I carry it full of faith, of dreams, of hope._
[**Could you chip in to help refugees in Mexico City survive and reach their dreams?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOOdQRdHPQv6hZtPoFHljuWzijawrqjBDdqkHsoHJOOH-dORxhWwZajl7s4NqYpolrHdC7gal9szjQKkARvKl9BV3ZO_B5ds9AUfx0TBKmF6NyBGcl_ei20AzQWlZIPYSb1DASdTC_PAnZYmeYPjE8TA3hWyizjeBiWFdFb6_8G4TmEF29-fGjxY5AHoYJKo708xdDpVwbnZyz9fRZnydQlDDDf0ABL0j8XViaBsR7amCxnFQoeeCr3Wyz60jMvi2wZjc4TxKOoNz8PeZWRN7dAQ/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h5/h001.-MRheb1NSWQV4oVlRzwdfpPtk1gn_ITbDsDqNCx_e7A)
[PLEASE CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOWIUSuTXFZOE9mj6finxWqqHK-UssxLwzEvkISizDBZlHQYqYpEkCEnNGWDHYzvkp3TL_umCBCgNapwxsO0jmuYNKWQiFEVAGm4SHY3NDbutTzbKd_Im7wBx042TVUp_ebvLI4U-uPbyU6175azAGHBPGaXzoTa8fMFu6ePAHKLrmZCiQ3j3gE203EfVC3QNY7T83bV-CTz9D7zBDIC6hHrkoo4670vFDY25cikDWyQ-e4o3w4wYNZUpZgPyUlIr1dxHvGKL1zVrVcHU-Ubxsow/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h6/h001.tH9jYoQD6WbVWFShTGRHfyaBHFo4_34AW_KF9LfwKT0)
---
Thank you so much for standing up for migrants, who deserve the same safety, dignity, and stability as the rest of us.
Together we’ll keep pushing back against dehumanization and pushing for U.S. immigration policies that welcome asylum-seekers and provide paths to citizenship for people who come here seeking a better life.
With you in the fight for a better future,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Sep 19, 2025
Subject: Please help save refugees’ lives today:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
We’re now in National Hispanic Heritage Month, a time to honor first-generation Latin American immigrants and Americans whose ancestors came from Latin America.
**As Trump attacks Latin American immigrants in the U.S. and fuels deadly violence in Latin America, I want to lift up an organization I connected with while visiting Mexico City** last month**** for the**** PanAmerican Congress gathering to fight fascism.
**Casa Tochán provides life-saving support for refugees and migrants coming through Mexico City** , who find themselves stuck in Mexico because the U.S. border is essentially closed.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOES0pbhIYcbgioQVj7nAl20JB2hZNjqTkwhIzjqtqv59aEbK1XQO65VGijrN5DtezLGys7dT3nJgE4_KqWI4HnEFte6TjMyT-xgkGVAv8mIXVv-E7PfFhG1X-pfDZ7cEUkfPPNK_Y7Mh2EwxhDl7fTyQzMf6F-vpfr1vK3UrZ_Wtn0hog-BoRlg4xlS0h_w-Vm1qkdBHMNDlUhx1P93EDNn79oMXPQNjrukS3AI3g1Yunr5YlSsePkcaMT32Nms_kr6Gk6N9xI8KIKXajgfErZg/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h7/h001.sK-417GFuvdAiqXsof2YGu7VVfqBdVJ18N9gCY6rMRg)
The organization **houses and feeds** people, secures **medical attention** for them by regularly bringing in doctors and psychologists, provides**legal support** for people’s migration cases, and supports residents with **building skills and finding jobs**.
[**Could you chip in today to support Casa Tochán’s life-saving work for refugees?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWyvZ6qHcZVKAtCcVrjLQS2MnUA8qZltJLpHQsO4-4ajOZWTjkceJSerf4oPnCCnbulsD3vrmHlbnNyOtTD5Uc97WeNA5WkWGS_bu0bUMGVARxDvm30JJBj9FPKNYCTBKUAL6pKsDPOL9Mc9TFrJue_r84WSr5Zl0u35x_pCU7XLydDglZXeTdI_FBizNDyc1KOzDJmFm2GZWay-gvOfeKBMVsExn5G1Y9Kyf_HfMQ41VLAin-av6RXcK_OR775H9-gur7vwcn1GruqOCpnU4mNCEpWby6UFGU8eaxoEPSKMby7JTvT0g4_wu1g3aN9_mWg/4k2/tzo4qE-DRMqww8KXSKwVhA/h8/h001.WGZqGfVdZWIoPXGxkEIGQxLGxliS4jt_R2-MxXk8604)
