Casa Tochán is a grantee of the U.S.-based Unitarian Universalist Service Committee (UUSC). UUSC runs the above donation page, with 100% of the funds going to Casa Tochán.
The shelter used to have a full-to-overflowing food pantry, which was enough to regularly share with other Mexico City movements and organizations.
But inflation and the sudden closure of USAID decreased locals’ ability to donate food or money, so most days the shelter only has just enough rice to make it through the day. Because of increased restrictions at the U.S. border, the shelter is also extending the standard length of time migrants can stay there.
Casa Tochán needs support to refill their food pantry and make much-needed infrastructure maintenance and upgrades so the house can continue to support those who live there.
With increased donations, the shelter would also be able to complete their screenprinting and carpentry workshops, where residents share their knowledge, learn skills, and produce items that provide needed income for residents and for the shelter.

clean_body: We’re now in National Hispanic Heritage Month, a time to honor Latin American immigrants and push back against xenophobic attacks. | | | Friend, It’s Hispanic Heritage Month, and I want to lift up an incredible organization I met while on a congressional delegation trip to Mexico City last month. My progressive colleagues and I joined the PanAmerican Congress gathering in Mexico City, where elected officials from over 10 countries came together to fight against fascism. Because the U.S. border is essentially closed, millions of refugees and migrants come through the city and find themselves stuck in Mexico for years. Every year, the shelter and feeds hundreds of people. The organization also secures medical attention for residents by regularly bringing in doctors and psychologists, supports residents with building skills and finding jobs , and provideslegal support for people’s migration cases—including enabling them to stay in Mexico. But with rising inflation, increased restrictions at the U.S. border, and the sudden closure of the U.S. Agency for International Development,****Casa Tochán urgently needs our support to fill their food pantry and make badly needed infrastructure and safety upgrades to their shelter. | On my trip to Mexico City during August’s congressional recess, I met people who work at the Unitarian Universalist Service Committee (UUSC) and partner with Casa Tochán. We went together to tour the facility, and talked about raising money for the shelter. The above donation page is run by the U.S.-based UUSC, with 100% of the funds going to Casa Tochán. Over the years since Casa Tochán began, residents and volunteers have covered the shelter in artwork. I got to witness these beautiful murals with supportive messages, including “Dreams are not illlegal”: A poem painted on one wall includes these lines: I leave my homeland, my friends, my family. I leave my town and my culture. I do not have much left, I carry only my backpack, but I carry it full of faith, of dreams, of hope. Thank you so much for standing up for migrants, who deserve the same safety, dignity, and stability as the rest of us. Together we’ll keep pushing back against dehumanization and pushing for U.S. immigration policies that welcome asylum-seekers and provide paths to citizenship for people who come here seeking a better life. With you in the fight for a better future, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Sep 19, 2025 Subject: Please help save refugees’ lives today: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, We’re now in National Hispanic Heritage Month, a time to honor first-generation Latin American immigrants and Americans whose ancestors came from Latin America. As Trump attacks Latin American immigrants in the U.S. and fuels deadly violence in Latin America, I want to lift up an organization I connected with while visiting Mexico City last month for the PanAmerican Congress gathering to fight fascism. Casa Tochán provides life-saving support for refugees and migrants coming through Mexico City , who find themselves stuck in Mexico because the U.S. border is essentially closed. The organization houses and feeds people, secures medical attention for them by regularly bringing in doctors and psychologists, provideslegal support for people’s migration cases, and supports residents with building skills and finding jobs. Casa Tochán is a grantee of the U.S.-based Unitarian Universalist Service Committee (UUSC). UUSC runs the above donation page, with 100% of the funds going to Casa Tochán. The shelter used to have a full-to-overflowing food pantry, which was enough to regularly share with other Mexico City movements and organizations. But inflation and the sudden closure of USAID decreased locals’ ability to donate food or money, so most days the shelter only has just enough rice to make it through the day. Because of increased restrictions at the U.S. border, the shelter is also extending the standard length of time migrants can stay there. Casa Tochán needs support to refill their food pantry and make much-needed infrastructure maintenance and upgrades so the house can continue to support those who live there. With increased donations, the shelter would also be able to complete their screenprinting and carpentry workshops, where residents share their knowledge, learn skills, and produce items that provide needed income for residents and for the shelter. Thank you so much. Together, we will continue demanding safety and dignity for all, including immigrants and asylum-seekers fleeing their homelands. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: A short note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter -- we know it’s the weekend, and like our team, you probably have a busy day ahead. So we’ll keep this short.
This campaign started with a huge amount of energy. James has been barnstorming Texas to hold huge rallies. Tens of thousands of folks just like you have chipped in to make that possible.
Naturally, things have started to slow down on the fundraising side. And it makes sense. A lot of people gave recently, and James doesn’t expect people to give every time we ask.
But we need to keep up our momentum as much as possible. Slowing down too much would limit our budget — preventing us from going everywhere and talking to everyone in our state.
The magic of this campaign is that if enough people give, then it adds up quickly. Just whatever you can and only when you can afford it.
[**So if you can give $5 or a donation of any amount that makes sense for you today, it would go a long way. It’ll get put to work immediately organizing in every corner of Texas**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250920-ak&t=1&akid=51%2E1347274%2Et_CCTY)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250920-ak&t=2&akid=51%2E1347274%2Et_CCTY)
All of us coming together in this fight is how we take back Texas.
Team Talarico

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=51%2E1347274%2Et_CCTY).

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: A future where dignity, justice, and equity aren’t just buzzwords
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250920-1528-foote&t=1001&akid=1528%2E342411%2EaMfBv5 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Squad isn’t here to play politics as usual — we’re here to fight for
bold, transformative change.

That means standing up to corporate greed, rejecting the influence of big
money in politics, and putting working people over wealthy donors — every
single time.

Whether it’s fighting for economic justice, affordable housing, student
debt cancellation, or human rights for all — Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and
AOC are leading with moral clarity and unwavering courage.

But they can’t do it alone. This progressive movement is only as strong as
the people powering it.

That’s where you come in. The Squad Victory Fund doesn’t take a dime from
corporate PACs. Our work is fueled entirely by grassroots donors chipping
in what they can, when they can.

And that people power? It’s how we win.

We’ve already proven that you don’t need corporate cash to build strength
— you need community, conviction, and a movement that refuses to back
down.

So if you believe in a future where dignity, justice, and equity aren’t
just buzzwords but realities — now’s the time to take a stand.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250920-movement.G3r4Va&refcode=em20250920-1528&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1528%2E342411%2EaMfBv5 ]Will you chip in $3 today to power the Squad’s fight for
a progressive future?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250920-movement.G3r4Va&refcode=em20250920-1528&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1528%2E342411%2EaMfBv5 ]Contribute ››

Thank you for being part of this movement — we’re stronger together.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1528%2E342411%2EaMfBv5

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Did you see? Democrats lining up against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | Friend, It’s official: the Minnesota DFL establishment has lined up behind my liberal opponent to take me out. That means one thing — national Democrats are about to flood southern Minnesota with cash to flip this seat. We can’t let them buy this race. I need you on my team right now to fight back.
---
| | [Contribute Today ➞](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Let’s show the DFL machine that southern Minnesota won’t be sold to the highest bidder.

-Brad
---
| \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Brad Finstad <info@finstadforcongress.com> Subject: Minnesota Democrats have picked their guy To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, The Minnesota Democrat establishment has made their choice: they’re lining up behind my liberal opponent to take me down.
They can’t stand my record of fighting for southern Minnesota families, rural communities, and the conservative values that have traditionally made our state strong. So they’ve picked a loyal, liberal foot soldier to do their bidding in Washington.
Here’s the truth: when the Democrat machine rallies around a candidate, it means one thing— _**big money from national Democrats is about to flood into this race.**_ My _leftist opponent won’t be working for you_. He’ll be working for Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and the liberal elites who want to raise your taxes, crush family farms with regulations, and put the government in charge of every part of your life. I’ve always been willing to stand up to the Left, to protect our farmers, defend our values, and fight for common sense in Washington. But if we don’t match their resources, we risk being drowned out by their attacks. This is where you come in. Can I count on you to chip in today to help me be prepared to fight the Democrat establishment and their hand-picked candidate? Every dollar you give makes sure our conservative message reaches voters across southern Minnesota.
---
| | [Contribute Today ➞](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Let’s show the DFL machine that southern Minnesota won’t be bought and sold by their big coastal donors. Thank you,
Brad Finstad

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Our public lands need us more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Your story can help protect the places we all love.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115589373/570830294/1328794144?refcode=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWQzN2VlLTMxOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y7UpgSAwiY0P8AS7xERapNyeS8Nw0iCbjF6t7ofGLIw=&emci=bed719a3-8795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
There's something profound you feel when you're alone in the wilderness. I've felt it listening to meadowlarks and mourning doves in the California hills of my childhood. I've felt it climbing high into the mountains. I've even felt it spending that unexpected night alone in Sequoia National Park in the 80s, where I realized how small we are in nature's presence. That connection to nature fuels my climate activism today. But Donald Trump is destroying the very places that inspired me, and that belong to all of us. He's opened millions of acres of our public lands to drilling and mining since taking office. He's gutted protections. He's even pushed to sell our public lands to corporate polluters. **That's why speaking up for our public lands is more important than ever.[National Public Lands Day is coming up on September 27, and I want to hear directly from JanePAC supporters. Why do our public lands matter to YOU?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115589386/570830319/-211597388?refcode=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWQzN2VlLTMxOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y7UpgSAwiY0P8AS7xERapNyeS8Nw0iCbjF6t7ofGLIw=&emci=bed719a3-8795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)** It could be because these are the places where families create lifelong memories around campfires under star-filled skies. Or because they're the last refuges for endangered species fighting to survive. Or because they're the classrooms where children learn to love and protect our planet. There's no right or wrong answer. Whatever your reasoning, I want to hear it. **[Will you take a moment to share your story with me about why public lands matter to you? My team will select a few stories to feature on our social media accounts so _everyone_ can see what our precious spaces mean to us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115589394/570830330/-211597388?refcode=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWQzN2VlLTMxOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y7UpgSAwiY0P8AS7xERapNyeS8Nw0iCbjF6t7ofGLIw=&emci=bed719a3-8795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)** | [**Message Jane →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115589404/570830342/-211597388?refcode=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWQzN2VlLTMxOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y7UpgSAwiY0P8AS7xERapNyeS8Nw0iCbjF6t7ofGLIw=&emci=bed719a3-8795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
When we speak with one voice about what we love, even the most powerful politicians have to listen.
Together, we can protect what belongs to all of us.
xx Jane
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115589414/570830353/-211597388?refcode=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZWQzN2VlLTMxOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=y7UpgSAwiY0P8AS7xERapNyeS8Nw0iCbjF6t7ofGLIw=&emci=bed719a3-8795-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d7ed37ee-3196-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: Your story can help protect the places we all love. | There's something profound you feel when you're alone in the wilderness. I've felt it listening to meadowlarks and mourning doves in the California hills of my childhood. I've felt it climbing high into the mountains. I've even felt it spending that unexpected night alone in Sequoia National Park in the 80s, where I realized how small we are in nature's presence. That connection to nature fuels my climate activism today. But Donald Trump is destroying the very places that inspired me, and that belong to all of us. He's opened millions of acres of our public lands to drilling and mining since taking office. He's gutted protections. He's even pushed to sell our public lands to corporate polluters. That's why speaking up for our public lands is more important than ever. It could be because these are the places where families create lifelong memories around campfires under star-filled skies. Or because they're the last refuges for endangered species fighting to survive. Or because they're the classrooms where children learn to love and protect our planet. There's no right or wrong answer. Whatever your reasoning, I want to hear it. | When we speak with one voice about what we love, even the most powerful politicians have to listen. Together, we can protect what belongs to all of us. xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Tim Walz
subject: This is why I’m running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I’m officially running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95485?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj)
Peter, I wanted to reach out personally to share this news with you:
**I’m officially running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota, because our work to make our state the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family isn’t finished.**
**[If you’re with me, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today? Knowing I have your early support in this race would mean the world to me.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95485?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95486?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95486?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95486?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95486?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95486?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95486?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95485?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj)
---
I grew up in Butte, Nebraska – a town of 400 people. There were 24 kids in my high school class. Living in a small town, you learn early on what it means to look out for your neighbors and to serve others.
That call to service is what led me to enlist in the Army National Guard just two days after my 17th birthday. I was proud to wear the uniform of this country for the next 24 years.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95485?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj)
My drive to serve others eventually set me on a new path: teaching. My wife Gwen and I met while teaching high school. Kids carry their whole lives with them into the classroom and Gwen and I got to know our students and see the obstacles they faced. **It was my experience as a teacher and my passion for education that led me to run for governor.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95485?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj)
Serving as Governor of Minnesota has been the honor of my life, and I couldn’t be prouder of the progress we’ve won. From providing universal free school meals for students, to protecting reproductive freedom, and cutting taxes for the middle class, we’ve secured tangible results that Minnesotans can actually feel.
The values that inspired me to serve our country in uniform, become an educator, and run for governor are the same ones I still carry with me each day as I work for the people of Minnesota. I still believe in helping our neighbors, protecting our freedoms, and investing in the future for our next generation. And I believe that, despite Donald Trump and MAGA’s attempts to tear us apart, we are still all in this together.
**Right now, we have an opportunity to continue delivering progress for Minnesotans – but only if we hold onto this Governor seat.** That’s why I’m asking you to have my back today, Peter.
**[Would you split a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee? Thank you in advance for your support.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95485?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95485?refcode=em20250920-9451&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=9451%2E614464%2EjIBzvj)**
I’ll be in touch soon,
Tim Walz

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Tim Walz
subject: The next chapter starts now
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
We have some unfinished business to attend to — and as you know, I’m not going to quit on a job before it’s done.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115590443/570833176/2117835781?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGIwNjM0Zi0zMzk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y48x0r3mLarzzdSFPwTYGWsYB3S0i5aQfyAVsF2c_bc=)
---
Peter,
We have some unfinished business to attend to — and as you know, I’m not going to quit on a job before it’s done.
We can be damn proud of the progress we’ve made to build the good life here in Minnesota. We’ve got more kids in Pre-K and fewer in poverty, helped ensure families have dignified care for their loved ones, strengthened our roads and bridges, and provided more jobs with better pay and the strongest labor protections in the country — delivering real results that improve lives.
**Together, we’ve built one of the friendliest states to start or grow a business, one of the free-est states to live your life however you choose, and the best place to raise a child in the whole country. **
But the next chapter of the Minnesota story still remains to be written. And the truth is Donald Trump and his fellow MAGA extremists would love nothing more than to tear apart what we’ve built.
I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect this state from Trump’s corruption and cruelty. And I’ll continue working to deliver security, opportunity, and freedom to every Minnesotan. But I can’t do it alone.

clean_body: We have some unfinished business to attend to — and as you know, I’m not going to quit on a job before it’s done. | = Peter, We have some unfinished business to attend to — and as you know, I’m not going to quit on a job before it’s done. We can be damn proud of the progress we’ve made to build the good life here in Minnesota. We’ve got more kids in Pre-K and fewer in poverty, helped ensure families have dignified care for their loved ones, strengthened our roads and bridges, and provided more jobs with better pay and the strongest labor protections in the country — delivering real results that improve lives. Together, we’ve built one of the friendliest states to start or grow a business, one of the free-est states to live your life however you choose, and the best place to raise a child in the whole country. But the next chapter of the Minnesota story still remains to be written. And the truth is Donald Trump and his fellow MAGA extremists would love nothing more than to tear apart what we’ve built. I promise you this: I’ll never stop fighting to protect this state from Trump’s corruption and cruelty. And I’ll continue working to deliver security, opportunity, and freedom to every Minnesotan. [First, ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115591579/570836486/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250920_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDlhNDYxNy0zMTk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=stSqoKJq5_CG0OSv4sRFLLMvd8K0rB3LTq2Uy45pU3A=)Trump ordered Republicans to GERRYMANDER Texas – in violation of the Voting Rights Act – to try to rig seats in their favor.

[Now, ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115591581/570836490/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250920_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDlhNDYxNy0zMTk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=stSqoKJq5_CG0OSv4sRFLLMvd8K0rB3LTq2Uy45pU3A=)news is breaking that Trump has raised a whopping $1.5 BILLION to buy another MAGA Majority.
[If we let Republicans get away with this, it will END our hopes of flipping the House in the midterms. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115591582/570836491/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250920_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDlhNDYxNy0zMTk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=stSqoKJq5_CG0OSv4sRFLLMvd8K0rB3LTq2Uy45pU3A=)

name: Team Schiff
subject: Our broken campaign finance system
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9000%2E5257348%2E-flJbC)
Earlier this week, Adam reintroduced a constitutional amendment to undo the damages of _Citizens United_.
This might sound familiar — after all, Adam has introduced his constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ since _2013_ and has been a strong proponent of fixing America’s broken campaign finance system since he was first elected in 2000, after a race that was at the time the most expensive in the history of the House of Representatives.
Derek, the first bill he cosponsored in Congress was the bipartisan _McCain-Feingold Act_ to regulate the financing of political campaigns, which was later passed and signed into law.
**For decades, Adam has fought to fix our broken campaign finance system. He knows what we do: Super PACs, billionaires, and mega-corporations shouldn’t be able to buy influence in our elections.**
While Adam rejects corporate PAC dollars for his campaign and fights to level the playing field, **[will you show your support for his work to repair and restore our fragile democracy?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250920_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9000%2E5257348%2E-flJbC)**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Violence can never be what happens when we disagree with each other
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is about the future of our democracy.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250920-1-b&t=1&akid=10883%2E3935704%2EYsxUjI)
Team,
It’s Emma Brown, Executive Director at GIFFORDS. Since Charlie Kirk’s shooting, we’ve sounded the alarm about the rise in politically motivated violence and the need to stand up against these attacks together.
**Here’s what I said: We might not see eye-to-eye on issues, but violence can never be what happens when we disagree with each other.**
At GIFFORDS, we know the horrors of politically motivated violence far too well. Gabby was shot in the head at a constituent event in 2011 by a gunman hoping to silence her voice. Unfortunately, since then, we’ve seen a rise in politically motivated violence across the country.
These attacks aren’t just about gun violence. They are about the future of democracy.
Our country is stronger when more people can participate. If violence like this causes people to think twice about going to a political rally or running for our office, then that hurts our democracy. We must stop this now.
We must make it harder for dangerous people to use deadly weapons. There is a lot we can do to prevent this type of violence — including commonsense solutions like red flag laws and universal background checks. That is the mission at GIFFORDS.
This is a moment where all of our leaders must get the courage to keep our communities safe. And if we can save even one more life from being lost to political violence, then our work is worth it.
Thank you,
Emma Brown
Executive Director, GIFFORDS

**Please, take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $17](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&amount=17&refcode=em250920-1-b&t=2&akid=10883%2E3935704%2EYsxUjI)**
---
****
| **[OTHER AMOUNT](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&refcode=em250920-1-b&t=3&akid=10883%2E3935704%2EYsxUjI)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Here’s what I said: We might not see eye-to-eye on issues, but violence can never be what happens when we disagree with each other. At GIFFORDS, we know the horrors of politically motivated violence far too well. Gabby was shot in the head at a constituent event in 2011 by a gunman hoping to silence her voice. Unfortunately, since then, we’ve seen a rise in politically motivated violence across the country. These attacks aren’t just about gun violence. They are about the future of democracy. Our country is stronger when more people can participate. If violence like this causes people to think twice about going to a political rally or running for our office, then that hurts our democracy. We must stop this now. We must make it harder for dangerous people to use deadly weapons. There is a lot we can do to prevent this type of violence — including commonsense solutions like red flag laws and universal background checks. That is the mission at GIFFORDS. This is a moment where all of our leaders must get the courage to keep our communities safe. And if we can save even one more life from being lost to political violence, then our work is worth it. Thank you, Emma Brown Executive Director, GIFFORDS Please, take a second to read this... Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone. If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can. If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

| Peter,

We just wrapped up a meeting with Carol and the team, and we wanted to update you on some good news and some bad news.

Let’s start with the **good news!**

Carol has built quick momentum since launching her campaign. She’s gained massive endorsements from Rep. Susan Wild, EMILYs List, Latino Victory Fund, BOLD PAC, and local leaders across the district. We’re powered by an incredible grassroots network that knows Carol has what it takes to flip this seat.

Now here’s the **bad news...**

At the end of this month, our campaign is met with our second public FEC filing deadline, and we've still got a long way to go to hit our goal. National Republicans are watching to see if we have what it takes to win.

But we’re still in it to win it...

**Ryan Mackenzie was just ranked one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the country.** MAGA Republicans are ready to do everything in their power to keep him in office.

This race will come down to the wire. Our campaign has to remain laser-focused on remaining competitive, and every contribution gives us the resources we need to fight back against the GOP’s extremist attacks.

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: This should be front page news:
body:
|
#
Friend,

I know the news cycle has been chaotic, but I want to highlight a drastic change to our health care that’s being overlooked.

**The Affordable Care Act (ACA) enhanced premium tax credit is set to expire at the end of this year. If Congress doesn’t act, working families will be hit hard. Health insurance premiums will skyrocket -- and many will be priced out entirely.**

Here’s what that looks like in MI‐08:
* Working families in our district who buy insurance on the ACA Marketplace will face __average premium increases of about $730 – that’s real money!__

* Rural hospitals and clinics, already stretched thin, will feel the pain in every prescription not filled, every visit delayed, every bill passed on.

* 4 million Americans will lose their heath insurance.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115592226/570838268/1362877131?refcode=em-9.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGRhODNjOS0zNTk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpUAG480ALJlQYaG9I2N5eXC8nL0T7nBW06VqU5TTAs=)
I’ve been pushing back. Earlier this week, I led more than 30 of my Battleground Democratic colleagues demanding a renewal of these credits before open enrollment on November 1st.

But this fight needs more fuel.

There's a lot of political noise out there right now, but it's the less glamorous work like this that often matters most. It may not grab headlines, but it’s what keeps people healthy, what protects families, and what lets you sleep easy at night.

**[With our end‐of‐quarter deadline coming up, I’m asking you to stand with me again. Your contribution sends a message: we demand that working families come first, and we won’t let these tax credits expire without a fight. Can you chip in $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115592228/570838272/1362877131?refcode=em-9.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGRhODNjOS0zNTk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpUAG480ALJlQYaG9I2N5eXC8nL0T7nBW06VqU5TTAs=)**

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: No Kings in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
“Do we understand what the difference is between a king and a president?” | |
---
Peter, **Even Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor is raising the alarm about kings in America and attacks on our democracy.** At a recent appearance, she asked, “Do [Americans] understand what the difference is between a king and a president?... I think if people understood these things from the beginning, they would be more informed as to what would be important in a democracy.”1 **Too many of us aren’t seeing Trump’s attacks on democracy for what they are. clean_body: “Do we understand what the difference is between a king and a president?” | | Peter, Even Supreme Court Justice Sonia Sotomayor is raising the alarm about kings in America and attacks on our democracy. At a recent appearance, she asked, “Do [Americans] understand what the difference is between a king and a president?... I think if people understood these things from the beginning, they would be more informed as to what would be important in a democracy.”1 Too many of us aren’t seeing Trump’s attacks on democracy for what they are. And a lot of us are paralyzed, unsure of what to do about it. That’s why United for Democracy is joining Americans across the country to stand up and fight back. Thousands of people in communities across the United States are coming together for another day of No Kings rallies on October 18th. Trump has the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives. He has ICE detaining and deporting legal residents. He has the Department of Justice prosecuting his enemies. He has news networks bowing to his command. And thanks to the Supreme Court, he has sweeping immunity for any illegal action he takes while in office. But there’s one thing that Trump doesn’t have—the power of the people. We the People can keep our democracy alive, but only if we fight for it. Thank you for making your voice heard, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy 1 P.S. Don’t see an event near you?**** Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Real leaders get real results.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Our government doesn’t reflect the people. We need your help to fix that.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250920-1&t=1&akid=2673%2E587540%2EMHVSOJ)
Peter,
At Leaders We Deserve, we believe our democracy can deeply benefit from young, progressive leaders who know their communities and are ready to fight for them in public office. But systemic barriers are stopping them from running in the first place.
And it’s not just about age — it’s about wealth, too.
Take Texas, a state with a GDP larger than that of most countries.**State legislators are only paid $7,200 a year** and are part-time employees, only working for a few months a year. So unless you’re extremely fortunate and can take months off or quit your job for a salary below the poverty line, running isn’t an option.
So who ends up in office? Established lawyers and doctors, retired corporate executives, and those with inherited wealth or who’ve made millions as business owners, landlords, or lobbyists — people who aren’t typically worried about making ends meet.
Young folks and working-class people want to fix the struggles plaguing their communities. They’ve lived them and know what needs to change. But they’re forced to choose between paying their bills, feeding their families, and saving up for their kids — or running for office to change the system holding them back.
It’s not an accident. It’s a cycle designed to keep average Americans powerless while the wealthy can run, win, and write laws that make them even wealthier. And the rest of us are stuck paying the price.
State legislatures across the country are failing to lead when their constituents are desperately asking for help. Instead, lawmakers are chasing cultural issues, trying to get interviews on Fox News, and doing Trump’s bidding.
Meanwhile, young leaders like AOC and Maxwell Frost — who actually reflect their communities — struggled to afford rent and worked extra jobs just to make ends meet while campaigning.
Teachers, baristas, nurses, small business owners, and farmers are just as — if not more — qualified to lead as the wealthy and well-connected establishment types.
**That’s why Leaders We Deserve makes running easier.** We can’t raise legislator salaries, but we _can_ reduce the massive financial burden of campaigning by providing tools for fundraising, budgeting, organizing, and more.
But we can't do it alone. We’re up against a massive wealth gap. Time is running out to get young, working-class progressives running ready for the midterms.
**[Will you chip in $5 to help a new generation run for office — and win?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250920_1_legislators?refcode=em20250920-2673&amount=5&refcode2=2673_587540_MHVSOJ&akid=2673%2E587540%2EMHVSOJ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250920_1_legislators?amount=5&refcode=em20250920-2673&refcode2=2673_587540_MHVSOJ&akid=2673%2E587540%2EMHVSOJ)**
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250920-1&t=2&refcode2=2673_587540_MHVSOJ&akid=2673%2E587540%2EMHVSOJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2673%2E587540%2EMHVSOJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2673%2E587540%2EMHVSOJ)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003

PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Erika Kirk
subject: Charlie gave everything. Now it’s up to us.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvprzjltwlb5s1c2bystzzay2fj98jx1io1cgps2smv2oo5xb57lih819hn0zv0w2hpgtkwenx7ynz1c&__stmp=t2w8ri&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
We will never surrender. Ever. p; | | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w8ri&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done.** They didn’t just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before...****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w8ri&__onlt=h)
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w8ri&__onlt=h)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w8ri&__onlt=h)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w8ri&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _“Never surrender.”_ He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision die...
---
[ **Give in Charlie’s Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w8ri&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvprzjltwlb5s1c2bystzzay2fj98jx1io1cgps2smv2oo5xb57lih819hn0zv0w2hpgtkwenx7ynz1c&__stmp=t2w8ri&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwikcdu20az00xg9jog9fqavlsmbocsaq6w9s308j8e4flku9fwy9w3vr9iwsyj8t5weq0kpuowp2aye5vqq1hh9leg4k8djuprkikr8rvrbgumts9mjmz16senlzup9uxt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w8ri&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfkldv99zd94j2p9bxvydjds4pxcuefwjbdmc8u30tj0h2z0xw3slm4t6p6e56nxtd5mgxq18jd6u258a2kzvnj8fvf691vmhur35fx3ocsptdkdz1e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2w8ri&__onlt=h)

name: ChrisForJustice.com
subject: If this is the new normal, we can’t wait until an opponent enters the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Last April, right-wing special interests, including Elon Musk, poured over $50 million into Wisconsin to try and buy a seat on our highest court.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250920-594&t=1&akid=603%2E294397%2EsiAvp-)
Everyone who pays attention to Wisconsin politics is asking the same question:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250920_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250920-594&refcode2=603_294397_siAvp-&akid=603%2E294397%2EsiAvp-)
Last April, right-wing special interests, _including Elon Musk,_ poured over $50 million into Wisconsin to try and buy a seat on our highest court.
**It became the most expensive judicial election in American history.**
We beat them back because Wisconsinites built a grassroots campaign strong enough to withstand their flood of money.
But if this is the new normal, we can’t wait until an opponent enters the race.
**We need to prepare now.**
All eyes are on us. The moment right-wing special interests prop up their next candidate, they’ll spend millions to get them in front of as many eyes as possible.
If we’re going to elect Judge Chris Taylor — a lifelong advocate for justice, fairness, and the rights of all people — we have to start building our defenses today.
[**Chip in $10 before midnight to help us build the grassroots momentum it will take to stand up to right-wing special interests and elect Judge Chris Taylor.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250920_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250920-594&refcode2=603_294397_siAvp-&akid=603%2E294397%2EsiAvp-)

Thank you,
Team Taylor

| Peter, it’s Maxwell. I first need to thank you. I know there’s a lot of campaigns reaching out to you, so I’m beyond grateful for people like you who’ve paid attention and resonated with our message.

As the first Gen Z member in Congress, it's been the honor of a lifetime. The GOP establishment never expected us to be here, and since we got here, they've been relentless in trying to silence our youth-powered movement.

**So today, I’m asking you for $1. Yup. Literally just a dollar.**

I hate to have to ask but there is too much on the line - taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and the bold change my generation is demanding - to give up now.

An astounding, and profoundly humbling, 107,394 people have donated to this campaign. If everyone reading this chipped in **just $1 as their very first contribution to my campaign,** we’d blow past our weekly fundraising goal, but we only have until midnight.
**[_Can I count on you to chip in just $1 as your FIRST donation to my campaign before time runs out?_](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/0GoAfN_7GjWqY1SIeLX3ow~~/AAPPABA~/jcyKFCEgJIfy0S3cdJo8DNOeRE-G9zgMG0-SYgU6iXHttZVX-eg0UGTqeuQIt9mKmDILSPnvS-vxbiXA55UaImNDPOOJGBHgL110h7FiCblBjePhmDEcp-Xbe7AazrM4juU_CVx9v9nLRRQtLy4cj-lVzHE8Y4i9eEy2igejXtqpGxQiy33aN9bsuUwubRtOoqRDzbFSSxc9O1ntIkOWoHF-eTLoQ_Gp5UGBJNRbgABn0qH8KWJu4Z2hwRuROqnyxhvcH0-lldNh-egfLTyYINTMG24xDwtbDjllNIbSTIntxInHRpwQ6Wxhqb9k-rNR9mhD7IzIexU5uSaHY41X7Tm8sqJoghdjz3T1WPtW7DE~)**

I know there’s a lot of campaigns reaching out to you, so I’m beyond grateful for people like you who’ve paid attention and resonated with our message. As the first Gen Z member in Congress, it's been the honor of a lifetime. The GOP establishment never expected us to be here, and since we got here, they've been relentless in trying to silence our youth-powered movement. So today, I’m asking you for $1. Yup. Literally just a dollar. I hate to have to ask but there is too much on the line - taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and the bold change my generation is demanding - to give up now. An astounding, and profoundly humbling, 107,394 people have donated to this campaign. If everyone reading this chipped in just $1 as their very first contribution to my campaign, we’d blow past our weekly fundraising goal, but we only have until midnight. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ I can't thank you enough, Maxwell | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: We have to draw a line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
Defend American Values NOW

Peter,

Jimmy Kimmel was fired for making disgusting and false comments about Charlie Kirk after his assassination. Democrats are claiming it was free speech.

**Let 's be clear: Free speech is a value we fight for and defend.**

But what is happening in America right now is not an issue of free speech, but rather an issue of spreading hateful and violent rhetoric that's already led to at least two assassination attempts on President Trump and an ACTUAL assassination of someone expressing his political beliefs, not to mention the death threats I've received.

_If we do not defend our nation's principles of free speech and hold those who respond to free speech with violence accountable, we must reassess our country's identity._

Help us defend the Conservative voices who stand up for what is right. Help us weed out the sick, evil, disgusting individuals who want to divide our country.

body:
RFK Jr. is inflicting devastating harm on the health of our country, and I need your help to build a movement powerful enough to right the ship and elect candidates driven to hold him accountable.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. ---
| Team, Mandela Barnes here.

RFK Jr. is inflicting devastating harm on the health of our country, and I need your help to build a movement powerful enough to right the ship and elect candidates driven to hold him accountable.
---
[_**Will you contribute to The Long Run PAC today to help elect changemakers who will advocate for science and public health?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4852?t=3&akid=5609%2E196590%2EZOeJBi)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4852?t=4&akid=5609%2E196590%2EZOeJBi)

Recently, more than 1,000 Health and Human Services employees signed a letter calling on RFK Jr. to resign. He’s gutted the Center for Disease Control and spread dangerous misinformation about life-saving vaccines, all while making them more difficult to access.

Let’s be clear: _**there’s no doubt that needless lives will be lost as a direct result of RFK Jr.’s harmful campaign.**_

HHS employees are right to call for his resignation, and I’m fighting to help elect candidates nationwide who agree that we should let science and the facts drive our medical decisions. It’s the best way to keep our nation healthy.

[_**But I need your help to do it. Will you contribute to The Long Run PAC today so we can support as many changemaking candidates as possible?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4852?t=6&akid=5609%2E196590%2EZOeJBi)

Mandela Barnes

name: Michael Bennet
subject: this email is a little different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Above all, thank you for believing in me.
| | |
---
Michael here, folks – and I just wanted to take a moment out of my day to thank you for being a part of this extraordinary grassroots team.
**Thank you** for giving your time, money and energy in support of our shared responsibility to build opportunity for one another, and for the next generation.
**Thank you** for your commitment to doing everything you can to help me make Colorado the best place to live and raise a family.
**And above all, thank you for believing in me.**
But with the clock steadily ticking toward my biggest reporting deadline to date in this race, I need your help now more than ever.
After 11:59 p.m. on Sept. 30, we close our books on the last three months, and submit our fundraising data to the Colorado secretary of state. Two weeks after, our numbers will go public for all to see, including the GOP.
**So especially now that a competitive Republican candidate has entered the race, showing the strength of our campaign is key ****–** **[and the best way we do that is by reaching our $100,000 goal in time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115594505/570844944/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk919-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjYzNmM4Zi0zYjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJOJ-dAsKzNAskAplbVs3tprRNoPGCc7Jwm6MV8OH8Q=)**
Otherwise, national Republicans _will_ sense weakness. And, they _will_ direct their ultra-wealthy donors to flood the airwaves with dishonest, division-sowing attack ads in an effort to stop us and take the lead.
**And as Donald Trump tries to bully our state into compliance with his far-right agenda, we cannot afford to elect someone who will govern for billionaires like him – because it _will_ come at the expense of Colorado's working families.**
To ensure that doesn't happen, we'll need all hands on deck in these last 10 days before the end-of-quarter deadline on Sept. 30. **So while there's still time to get back on track, friend, I'm humbly asking:**
**_[Will you please chip in $5, $25 or whatever you can today to help me keep up the momentum and win this thing?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115594510/570844950/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk919-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjYzNmM4Zi0zYjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJOJ-dAsKzNAskAplbVs3tprRNoPGCc7Jwm6MV8OH8Q=)_**

subject: GOP is counting on slick ads and scare tactics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Face-to-face discussions |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115594985/570846589/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWRiNmJkNi0zYjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zg3bNTLGLQLqEn4_-ycRFptvsilns-BGNGpFIv_Rp1g=)

| Hi everyone, **This weekend is a make-or-break moment in the fight to pass Proposition 50.** Our organizers and volunteers are gearing up for a massive **Walk Weekend** — canvassing undecided voters across California and making the case for YES on Prop 50 at their doorsteps. _But here’s the challenge:_ ➡️ Donald Trump’s dark money allies have already flooded California with deceptive ads and mailers. ➡️ The only way to fight back is face-to-face conversations with voters. **[➡️ To expand our walk turf and reach every undecided voter, we must raise $8,000 before midnight tonight. Will you chip in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115594988/570846592/-1861291874?&refcode=20250920_FR_45DO_WalkWeekend&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWRiNmJkNi0zYjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zg3bNTLGLQLqEn4_-ycRFptvsilns-BGNGpFIv_Rp1g=)** [CHIP IN $35 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115594990/570846596/-1861291874?&refcode=20250920_FR_45DO_WalkWeekend&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWRiNmJkNi0zYjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zg3bNTLGLQLqEn4_-ycRFptvsilns-BGNGpFIv_Rp1g=) This is what your donation powers: **(1)** Printing literature so voters hear the truth about Prop 50, not MAGA lies; **(2)** Funding more canvassers to knock on doors in battleground neighborhoods; **(3)** Expanding our turf so no undecided voter slips through the cracks. Republican dark money groups are counting on their slick ads and scare tactics to confuse voters. But they can’t compete with the power of one-on-one human conversations. That’s why this weekend’s Prop 50 **Walk Weekend** is so critical. clean_body: Face-to-face discussions | = | Hi everyone, This weekend is a make-or-break moment in the fight to pass Proposition 50. Our organizers and volunteers are gearing up for a massive Walk Weekend — canvassing undecided voters across California and making the case for YES on Prop 50 at their doorsteps. But here’s the challenge: ➡️ Donald Trump’s dark money allies have already flooded California with deceptive ads and mailers. ➡️ The only way to fight back is face-to-face conversations with voters. = = This is what your donation powers: (1) Printing literature so voters hear the truth about Prop 50, not MAGA lies; (2) Funding more canvassers to knock on doors in battleground neighborhoods; (3) Expanding our turf so no undecided voter slips through the cracks. Republican dark money groups are counting on their slick ads and scare tactics to confuse voters. But they can’t compete with the power of one-on-one human conversations. That’s why this weekend’s Prop 50 Walk Weekend is so critical. Our organizers and volunteers are fanning out across the state to knock doors, listen, and share the truth about Prop 50. = = = = = = Thank you so much, \- The entire team at the California Democratic Party P.S. subject: My new anti-corruption bill
body:
Washington is broken. Here’s my plan to fix it. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115595027/570846655/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTE2NTU5ZGItM2E5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lUoqnurOWjXzD2EQGTMkNI7X1pP9m96_JF_fBuTkT20=) | Peter, I’ll be the first to tell you: Washington is broken. Corruption has seeped into every corner of our politics, and too many politicians are lining their pockets instead of serving the people. Heck, our President is taking gifts like a Qatari jet and cashing in on meme coins, for crying out loud! **That’s why I just introduced a landmark bill: the No Bribes for Politicians Act.** Here’s what it would do: ❌ Ban politicians from making money off the presidency
❌ Stop politicians from accepting gifts from foreign countries
❌ Prohibit shady foreign business deals while in office It’s a simple idea: public service should be about serving the public — not yourself. But here’s the truth: the politicians and special interests who benefit from this broken system will fight tooth and nail to stop this bill. [_**That’s why I need you with me. Will you add your name right now to demand Congress pass the No Bribes for Politicians Act?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115595028/570846656/571893256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTE2NTU5ZGItM2E5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lUoqnurOWjXzD2EQGTMkNI7X1pP9m96_JF_fBuTkT20=&emci=2fee7aa4-c594-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a16559db-3a96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115595029/570846684/571893256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTE2NTU5ZGItM2E5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lUoqnurOWjXzD2EQGTMkNI7X1pP9m96_JF_fBuTkT20=&emci=2fee7aa4-c594-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a16559db-3a96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6455652) Every signature shows that the American people are fed up with corruption — and that together, we’re ready to fight for change. Thank you for standing with me, Josh

body:
Trump wants a blank check to go to war with drug cartels. He wants to use the US Military to police the world, again.
#
Peter —
Pop quiz: Which party kicked off the Global War on Terror?
If you answered “The Republican Party,” bingo! Correct.
We lost thousands of American lives, trillions of dollars, and twenty-plus years fighting wars of choice with no exit plan. One of the biggest critics of those wars was actually Donald Trump. He built his first presidential campaign in large part on bringing the Troops home — and then he broke that promise when he actually took office.
Now, question number two: Who is pushing for another open-ended war of choice with no exit plan?
If you answered “Donald Trump,” bingo! Right again.
Trump wants a blank check to go to war with drug cartels. He wants to use the US Military to police the world, again. He wants another forever war that’s going to cost countless brave Americans their lives and waste trillions of dollars that could be spent on health care, education, feeding the hungry — or literally ANYTHING else.
Department of War? They want the Department of Forever War.
This can’t be allowed to happen. We need you speaking out on this and getting your family and friends on board, too. We fought through the last twenty years of needless war, and we’re not going to let the next generation get blown up around the world for Trump’s bloodlust.
**[Please, join VoteVets and add your voice: NO NEW WARS. Stop this before it starts, and before thousands of our best and brightest are maimed and killed in another Republican forever war.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250920_vv_no_new_wars/?source=em250920-1-120&akid=34628%2E3013755%2Ev9B0GT)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250920_vv_no_new_wars/?source=em250920-1-120&akid=34628%2E3013755%2Ev9B0GT)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

Patriot - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start.

As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today.

_**If every person reading this email could give just $1.75, we would hit our major fundraising goal and be one step closer to winning this toss-up race.**_ It's a small ask, but it would make a huge impact.

You see, my father's story isn't just about him - it's about the opportunities that America provides. It's about the chance to build a better life, to work hard, and to succeed. And that's exactly what I'm fighting for.

As a Marine, a businesswoman, and a public servant, I've seen firsthand the positive impact that conservative policies can have on our communities. I've fought for education reform, economic growth, and individual freedom. _**And I'm just getting started.**_

[**So I'm asking you to join me in this fight. Will you give $1.75 today to help us reach our goal? It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start. | | | | Patriot - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start. As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today. If every person reading this email could give just $1.75, we would hit our major fundraising goal and be one step closer to winning this toss-up race. It's a small ask, but it would make a huge impact. You see, my father's story isn't just about him - it's about the opportunities that America provides. It's about the chance to build a better life, to work hard, and to succeed. And that's exactly what I'm fighting for. As a Marine, a businesswoman, and a public servant, I've seen firsthand the positive impact that conservative policies can have on our communities. I've fought for education reform, economic growth, and individual freedom. And I'm just getting started. Together, we can keep the American Dream alive for our kids and grandkids. We can build a brighter future, and we can show the country what it means to lead with conservative values. Thank you for your support, and let's do this! Winsome Earle-Sears . Marine. Mom. name: Erika Kirk
subject: Charlie’s mission didn’t die. It just got LOUDER.
body:
We will never surrender. Not now. Not ever.

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUPL69615&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUPL69615>

Peter,

I want to thank you for loving my husband.

For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For
mourning. For remembering.

But now, I need you to listen closely...

Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they
have done.

They didn’t just try to silence a man...

They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of
God’s merciful love.

Instead, they ignited something even greater.

If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before... They have NO idea
what they have just UNLEASHED.

Not just across this country... But in me.

They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife.

And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my
husband built will not die.

I refuse to let that happen.

And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too.

Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever.

I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the
love of my life.

I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want
you to hear what comes next:
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUPL69615&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUPL69615>

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUPL69615&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUPL69615>

Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his
name.

We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever.

For Charlie,

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUPL69615&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUPL69615>

Erika Kirk

On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family

<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUPL69615&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUPL69615>

P.S. Charlie always said: “Never surrender.”

He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward.

If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision
die...

Give in Charlie’s Honor
Support Turning Point USA
<https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/f8f86882-401a-4702-8c9b-df5abce81f1f?source_code=SUPL69615&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ek&utm_term=SUPL69615>

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: First Stephen Colbert, then Jimmy Kimmel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115596448/570852255/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.20_Free-Speech_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmI3YWQ4Y2EtM2Q5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XV8XdKRjA31KYx57wpdHQAf-1V0yozZ7tpeFhH_AtGE=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115596449/570852256/-74077192?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.20_Free-Speech_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmI3YWQ4Y2EtM2Q5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XV8XdKRjA31KYx57wpdHQAf-1V0yozZ7tpeFhH_AtGE=) Listen: I spent 25 years of my career as a broadcast journalist calling out corruption. The Trump administration’s censorship of Stephen Colbert and now Jimmy Kimmel is deeply disturbing to me. I know all too well what silencing political dissent looks like — my parents fled Cuba to escape a dictatorship that was using the exact same tactics as Trump to silence political opponents. **[_If you were not paying attention, now is the time to start. We are witnessing our very right to free speech be taken away by this White House, and we have to do everything we can to elect leaders who will stand up to Trump’s abuses of power. body:
