| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8f4c5d828d&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | We got our hands on polling data that Tim Keller probably wishes stayed buried forever. [The numbers are absolutely brutal](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e8a6e3fe65&e=567664f14c), and they explain why this mayor's race is about to get very interesting.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=8a231118fa&e=567664f14c)
| | **🔥 MAYOR KELLER’S DEVASTATING POLL NUMBERS
** Here's what the leaked data reveals: Most voters think Albuquerque is heading in the wrong direction, and when asked directly if Tim Keller should be reelected, a whopping 60% say NO.
Even worse for Keller - his unfavorable rating has hit toxic levels, and crime dominates as voters' top concern. This spells disaster for a mayor whose biggest weakness is exactly what voters care about most.
Darren White currently trails Keller, but here's the kicker - nearly a third of voters are still undecided, and many have never heard of White. Translation: White has room to grow while Keller's already maxed out his negatives.
We break down why this race will come down to one question: Will voters choose the mayor they know has failed, or send a message despite Trump's deep unpopularity in Albuquerque?
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=dcbefb7684&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🚨 **IS THE DEMOCRAT GOVERNOR'S RACE IS OVER?**
New polling shows Deb Haaland crushing Sam Bregman 55% to 19% - and it's even worse in the crosstabs. Liberal Democrats choose Haaland 65% to 11%, but even "moderate" Democrats prefer her 45% to 29%.
Spoiler alert: We reveal why socialism's +36 favorability among Democrats nationally means Bregman's "centrist" strategy is DOA. The party has moved left, and primary voters aren't coming back.
💰 **ECONOMIC BRIGHT SPOT**
Mortgage rates dropped to 6.13% - the lowest in three years ahead of expected Fed cuts. This could be crucial for the Trump administration's economic messaging.
🎯 **CHARLIE KIRK CASE GETS WEIRDER**
Tyler Robinson's text messages to his roommate reveal a chilling disconnect. While confessing to the attack, his main concern was retrieving his grandfather's rifle from the bushes. Meanwhile, ABC's Matt Guttman called the messages "touching" because Robinson used the phrase "my love."
We explain why this completely misses the point about the suspect's disturbing lack of normal human emotion about committing violence.
⚠️ **FREE SPEECH WARNING**
Attorney General Pam Bondi said they'll "target you" for "hate speech" - but hate speech is constitutionally protected. We break down why this needs immediate clarification before we head down the UK's dangerous path.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d825df4ed6&e=567664f14c)

subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207moki5nn2we8wde0yt0o59d7b2zh353czlwk7jjl128ba58irmsp3fbr1unteanzpcbedtitu0ca8adjd&__stmp=t2wb6b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wb6b&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3a0pq5nfjjrrnrdho9bloe0toiqkco8e296i16idtv4jz5a1uclva6si6qix8kjn46ywpg82fz0lm59mslq4gt6ksnxku0ibxh7igupbdadkgisj6u6pa1aky8609i99p6ro625bbg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wb6b&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wb6b&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wb6b&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wb6b&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3a0pq5nfjjrrnrdho9bloe0toiqkco8e296i16idtv4jz5a1uclva6si6qix8kjn46ywpg82fz0lm59mslq4gt6ksnxku0ibxh7igupbdadkgisj6u6pa1aky8609i99p6ro625bbg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wb6b&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wb6b&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

I'm reaching out with a last ditch request before our first official campaign finance deadline ends at midnight.

I'm reaching out with a last-ditch request before our first official campaign finance deadline ends at midnight.

[**So I am asking: can you make one more contribution before midnight? It really does add up when so many people are contributing what they can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250920-1&refcode2=2576_4767699_xcn7w-&akid=2576%2E4767699%2Excn7w-)

In the dim glow of a Charlotte light rail car on August 22nd 2025, Iryna Zarutska, a 23-year-old Ukrainian refugee who had fled war for a chance at American safety, sat listening to music through her headphones.
Surveillance footage captured the horror that unfolded next: an unprovoked knife attack from behind, fellow passengers ignoring her in her last moments as she cried, bleeding out, before she slumped on the to the dirty floor and died. Her assailant, Decarlos Brown, a 34-year-old man with a history of mental illness and arrests, had stabbed her repeatedly, before fleeing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc089a89-106d-4226-b262-ac13fad3aee6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Zarutska's death was not just a tragedy; it became a symbol of a nation unraveling, where vulnerability meets indifference.

**That 's why we built Freespoke.**
Freespoke puts you back in control. One tap shows you the consensus, the divide, and expert insights from podcasts, so you see the truth, not the propaganda. It's private, clean, and uncensored. No tracking. No porn. No data harvesting. Just clarity.
Whether you're fact-checking a meme, decoding a viral TikTok, or cutting through the "official version" of events, Freespoke is your chaos-killer.
And as an exclusive for The Capitalist readers**:** Get 35% off Freespoke Premium with code **cap35.**
Premium unlocks enhanced privacy by blocking all ads while using the app which means no more creepy data-stalking ads. Plus, you get unlimited AI summaries that simplify complex stories in seconds, and fully searchable podcast transcripts that pull truth straight from the source.
Don't lose the truth in the chaos of the internet. **[Download the free app today](https://substack.com/redirect/5f921c4d-b0b1-4d57-998c-42a803bf8a9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and take back control.
[Download the Free App and Be in Control](https://substack.com/redirect/5f921c4d-b0b1-4d57-998c-42a803bf8a9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Article continues**
* * *
This incident, unfolding in the tail end of the summer of 2025, was merely the prelude to a cascade of events that exposed the fractures in America's social fabric. Just weeks later, on September 10, conservative activist Charlie Kirk was fatally shot in the neck during a campus event in Orem, Utah. The 31-year-old founder of Turning Point USA, a vocal Trump ally, described by some as a future presidential candidate fell doing what he had always done, talking to people who disagreed with him. His killer, 22-year-old Tyler Robinson, a self-described radicalized leftist from a middle-class background, later confessed to family members, citing Kirk's "hateful" rhetoric as provocation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a444e658-381a-46b2-987d-73f36130db4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Social media erupted, not with universal mourning, but with cheers from some corners--posts celebrating his death that led to firings, though hardly enough to stem the tide.
These stories, raw and unrelenting, point to a deeper malaise. The progressive argument--once a beacon of empathy, equity, and reform--has faltered, breeding not unity but a toxic polarization that normalizes inhumane cruelty. In an era where daily headlines chronicle unprovoked violence and gleeful schadenfreude, we must ask: How did a movement rooted in compassion contribute to this darkness? The answer lies in the unintended consequences of ideological purity the left always suffers from, where nuance erodes and hatred festers.
The progressive vision, born well before the civil rights struggles of the mid-20th century and invigorated by the Obama era, promised a more just society. It championed criminal justice reform, mental health awareness, and protections for the marginalized. Yet, by 2025, these ideals have curdled into something unrecognizable.
Consider the Zarutska killing. In Charlotte, a city governed by progressive policies emphasizing decriminalization and community policing, Brown's prior offenses--including assaults--had resulted in lenient sentences under "soft-on-crime" reforms. Critics, including Trump administration officials, decried these as emblematic of progressive failures. The release of the video surveillance footage on September the 5th put a face to the story and fueled the outrage to new levels. The bystanders' inaction, captured on video, echoed a societal desensitization: progressive calls for "defund the police" had, in some views, eroded communal responsibility, leaving individuals isolated in the face of peril. Despite championing "womens rights" the progressive left had very little to say when it came to Iryna.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c86dbdce-a6b8-4bcb-81db-d98d29f7f0ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kirk's assassination amplified this rift. Robinson, described in court documents as _**"poisoned by online radicalization,"**_ had immersed himself in leftist forums decrying Kirk as a fascist enabler. The shooting, from a rooftop during Kirk's "American Comeback Tour," was no isolated act. It followed a pattern: the suspect's bullet casings bore engravings like "Bella Ciao," an anti-fascist anthem co-opted by online extremists. Online, the response was swift and vicious. Thousands of posts on X celebrated Kirk's death, with users from progressive circles labeling him a _**"threat to democracy"**_ as justification for his slaying. Employers fired hundreds, but the viral glee persisted, revealing how echo chambers--nurtured by progressive activism's focus on _**"punching up"**_ against perceived _**" oppressors"**_--had blurred into outright malice and dehumanization.
Not content with plumbing the craven depths of humanity, this dehumanization now extends to the young. A **[viral video from early September](https://substack.com/redirect/74dcc09e-a8f9-404c-96b9-91292485fc6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** showed two sisters, indoctrinated either by society or their parents (or both), being asked to guess what "the best news ever" was.
**[The clip, shared widely,](https://substack.com/redirect/3047a697-4dcb-44a7-8846-d8943a1e475a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** captured their wide-eyed youthful excitement and hope as they tried to guess what the good news was.
Child: _**" Donald Trump died?**_
*Off Screen Adult Laughter* - _**" Uhhh Second best news."**_
Child: _**" The Vice President died?"**_
*Off Screen Adult* - _**" Ok, third best news."**_
Child: _**" That Elon Musk died?"**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/55bc7099-d3f2-4641-90ca-df309830020e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It is highly unlikely that children of their ages have any real grasp of the gravity of what they were saying. They are just repeating what they have heard. Given that they volunteered the shocking answers so freely to a parent with no fear of consequence, it's likely that we can guess with some accuracy who they heard it from.
That the mother of the two girls **[is a pre-school teacher and the father a member of the National Guard](https://substack.com/redirect/4ae95f29-e535-443d-bec3-58d23729202d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** should give anyone pause before they say that this progressive rot is the preserve simply of the blue haired pronoun brigade.
The video is a stark indictment of "progressive attitudes" in homes and classrooms. What was once meant to foster empathy has now supplanted critical thinking, has been twisted into narratives of "systemic" evil sowing seeds of generational hate and turning children into unwitting partisans.
Even in the courts, this toxicity manifests. On September 16, 2025, Luigi Mangione, accused of murdering UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson in December 2024, saw his state terrorism charges dismissed for insufficient evidence of intent to intimidate a population leaving the second degree murder charge.
_**(Quite how stalking a specific individual on the streets of New York with a loaded handgun before executing them from behind does not count as pre-meditated murder one is something that the New York Justice system has yet to make clear.)**_
Mangione, portrayed by supporters as a Robin Hood-esque folk hero against corporate greed, drew cheers from crowds outside the Manhattan courthouse, some clad in "Free Luigi" shirts.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/07bb0c05-bcce-4c3d-bc3d-0daad27d634d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2add066c-dd20-44b5-b620-e3eea52054f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Progressive critiques of healthcare profiteering, a very valid concern and one noble in its intent, had radicalized into vigilante justice, where killing an executive becomes a cause celebre. The judge may have upheld the second-degree murder charges, but the celebration outside underscored a moral inversion: violence as redemption.
These vignettes are not isolated anomalies but symptoms of a failed progressive paradigm. The movement's emphasis on identity and grievance has found a home online. Something that social media algorithms amplify, creating silos of ever increasing extremism and recommending ever more extreme communities where empathy eventually atrophies. What began as a fight against injustice has morphed into a culture where the "other" is not just wrong but evil--deserving of death or derision because they are not human.
Historically, America has weathered polarization: the Gilded Age's robber barons met Progressive Era reforms, tempering excess with pragmatism. Yet today's divide, fueled by 24-hour outrage cycles, resists such correction. Emotional hatred threatens democracy more than ideological differences, correlating with rising violence. Kirk's assassination, Zarutska's murder and Thompson's execution, following two attempts on Trump himself, exemplifies this.
As these events cascade, the progressive argument's failure becomes more apparent. Try as the Left might to create a moral equivalence between acts by the Right (J6 is a favored reference) to the acts perpetrated by the Left. It is the Left's absolutism--framing any act of dissent against their world view as bigotry--that has eroded our humanity. It is all too easy to paper over the divisions and say both sides are to blame. This is simply not true. Consider this:
* **Iryna was murdered in an unprovoked attack by a dangerous man who should not have been allowed to be walking the streets. Soft on crime is not a right wing position and never has been.**
* **There is no Left wing person who so openly debated their political adversaries as Charlie Kirk did - (and if there is one that we haven 't heard of, they certainly have not been shot in the middle of a debate.)**

In classrooms the next generation inherits not hope but hostility. The shocking fact that came in to focus amidst the online glee over Kirk's death and the resultant firings was quite how many of the people, just like the mother of the two girls in the video above, were educators, the people teaching the next generation, away from the prying eyes of concerned parents.
America in 2025 feels like a darkening theater, where applause follows tragedy. To reclaim the light, progressives must rediscover nuance: reform without radicalism, justice without joy in suffering.
The alternative is to become a movement where cruelty is currency, and unity a relic. The callous bile that we have witnessed expressed in the last few weeks by the "Progressive Left" is not sustainable for the country.
Progressives need to look in the mirror and see what they have become, and they need to do it sooner rather than later, because they are on the cusp of becoming so obsessed with their warped sense of moral piety, that they risk detaching completely from reality.
* * *
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cc34c052-68eb-4b1e-be6e-48da2c181a6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

I've been hard at work on my first agenda as a United States Senator – “A New Way Home,” and I want to tell you a little bit about it. [**If you're short on time, will you chip in $15 right now to help me and my fellow Democrats keep working on life-changing agendas like this one?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115597062/570854001/-492875955?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.20_New-Way-Home_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQ4NDg3Ny0zZjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nL_eiaOPFekMFOe7YBxS_Uwalx7rQr-E7-LaRaOVqUQ=)

Right now, buying a house seems out of reach to many Americans. And thanks to Donald Trump playing yo-yo with our economy, it's not getting any easier for families to find a safe, affordable house.

That's why I authored A New Way Home. I talked to dozens of experts and Americans about how we could tackle housing affordability and insecurity – and I put all of their best ideas in this agenda.

_Here's how we'll solve the housing crisis:_

✅ **_Expanding housing supply_** by supporting new builds and rewarding communities that increase their housing supply.

✅ **_Build stronger communities_** by removing rental assistance barriers and investing in high-poverty neighborhoods.

✅ **_Make housing attainable_** by helping Seniors age in place and supporting workforce housing.

✅ **_Unlock innovative housing models_** by piloting permanent affordable housing and converting underutilized federal property.

✅ **_Invest in smart tax policies_** by re-establishing the first-time buyer tax credit and delivering rent relief to the most vulnerable.

I'm filled with hope that this agenda will change lives and give millions of Americans the relief they need.

[**This is what you sent me to the Senate to do, team. If you support Senate Democrats and the important work we’re doing, I'm humbly asking you to chip in just a few dollars right now:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115597063/570854002/1350224472?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.20_New-Way-Home_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQ4NDg3Ny0zZjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nL_eiaOPFekMFOe7YBxS_Uwalx7rQr-E7-LaRaOVqUQ=) | | [ CHIP IN $10 » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115597064/570854003/-492875955?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.20_New-Way-Home_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQ4NDg3Ny0zZjk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nL_eiaOPFekMFOe7YBxS_Uwalx7rQr-E7-LaRaOVqUQ=)

name: Erika Kirk
subject: They took Charlie. They unleashed a storm.
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
We will never surrender. Ever. p; | | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wbcy&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie’s life? They have NO idea what they have done.** They didn’t just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message — a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God’s merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband’s mission was powerful before...****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they’ve lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart — just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wbcy&__onlt=h)
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wbcy&__onlt=h)
---
Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wbcy&__onlt=h)
---
Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wbcy&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** Charlie always said: _“Never surrender.”_ He built something bigger than himself — and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie’s vision die...
---
[ **Give in Charlie’s Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wbcy&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Energy and water
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Team,

Much of the work of legislating happens in Congressional committees. That's where bills are crafted and where the appropriation of federal funds is hammered out.

When I was first elected to Congress, I knew I wanted to serve on committees where my work would directly serve my constituents. I was appointed to the Energy and Water Appropriations Committee, and today, I'm the committee's senior Democrat.

The work of our committee is critical for our Great Lakes region and for the Heartland as a whole.

In my time on the committee, we've brought home hundreds of millions of dollars in federal investments to our district:

🌽We've invested in renewable energy programs with proven track records, creating thousands of jobs that cannot be outsourced.

⚙️We've supported innovation and manufacturing in the industries of the future, ensuring that tomorrow's economy will once again be built right here in Ohio.

💧And we've done transformative work to restore and protect our Great Lakes ecosystem, which is the lifeblood of communities across the Midwest.

I'm proud of everything we've accomplished so far, friend, and I'll never stop going to work for you.

Onward,

— Marcy

Support our work → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250920_mk_energywater_b1]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=ca7591dd-4096-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=ca7591dd-4096-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413]
Follow Marcy
https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur [https://twitter.com/Marcy_Kaptur] https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/marcykapturforcongress]

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
| | |
---
Patriot, In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA.** All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come. As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save." We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt
& The Turning Point USA Family
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

body:
The evil doers have no idea what they have done.
We will never surrender. Ever.

| [ ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=5101c4eda8784db29a9e56603f3926d0&_e=BceTek2j0eRYHicJP_Oez0xohSKS5djg0OesPMKS6qpMf_eaIhwRvqWu3l6i-odxAIq71u0wAU1GdtjxWFu2oaA28caINTFe2Vjqn50LdbZRoVTLNJpEsU1jBUy_WCl2okoD1VpNvfoJEb9DGNim5Ahox9f1t49laQbtRFtsOP3_ZEUxmD2y_GZj19nNf7IjeN5jpLYrjSFMl6v5fF_XQUpHfAkremsf5O_3d-ZFrc9KxPXWHGTO1AJo5K880BeIotYBtNoUdwlXCwa3WBRotqY_XCz_vscRcintiWwh1z0ucClN4IMlSRXUP7Pa6fkHWbfWig95CFdMECYlLxjnPBVVaxLwOD5X0qXdciV9l2sPqjnj71t0zDz8k6p2Ax8ffY2bUO4zfzCjCXG8SzvtXwkqV01aA4XJ4fUAgldq1bpvtxJPooO0KiVPQgCePHXtTEp1KItNTlwhGyDfEVTEuE1Uxv9s22ZtS1o7zjlcAuUM4rZfWjWpkS_l0iyR-GJUhyBUC1cy-yLGp5jsxXAytjuYOXRZeantEEnR4XuylBpUgL1uaXWRq3TzBFS9fK0PQoN9ihaEOOO_icogqgdj2y0eRv-vqPbS30zOnX-Y8SGqpsbN4bW25Em-vhj0SoHBTikLAzgHpJ_r4eQ2flqFTDoq2h3Vp5YAUZGIl5pY7HCqRRI8wQr7FZQtvk1uGmwczi26QLFddHn8D1tgkCxBxQ%3D%3D)

Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. **_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[ **I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:** ](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=5101c4eda8784db29a9e56603f3926d0&_e=BceTek2j0eRYHicJP_Oez0xohSKS5djg0OesPMKS6qpMf_eaIhwRvqWu3l6i-odxAIq71u0wAU1GdtjxWFu2oaA28caINTFe2Vjqn50LdbZRoVTLNJpEsU1jBUy_WCl2okoD1VpNvfoJEb9DGNim5Ahox9f1t49laQbtRFtsOP3_ZEUxmD2y_GZj19nNf7IjeN5jpLYrjSFMl6v5fF_XQUpHfAkremsf5O_3d-ZFrc9KxPXWHGTO1AJo5K880BeIcEl7N4GB-BNQqntgi9rFjJasoOK_QRUx9UtO63pSLHcpr60iW3UU6JtTjgEke7mzKQyE2G8dckmYjisJ6irONtzwqIVP26pqkx9HSF2l4_QAPyERAwkMszNZunpRy9_Ppf0uyr_nwFkqpPmqsLVAICsd00Buc7ZJDe8V6VPsSS5NXDeSGPi5MXKjxLQ1v9GDZf0I0ym-eDMW2nUUDo8rfK0_aauzSoMXNa2Ti1id5HgMAirTOA3XdPXnHxcpU34wT84hENth4hIx2t9J9JudE0ChhOkfzui49mpp3SA_mFbmnTIA1g-ZH47ANWAtRNe-AvNSgjDBHS8RDYiGRFEFXRHKTzUIvHTud3TnVagZbWfQ90dCECgYY5BbDQtY-PGR5VaaEblH4zpjTCx925yw7XDWa_EjY5-pP0bAPeWprcN_ULz_ke0_ixcQtdsp5gv-uOawefZbTK70RPv9iaSbsw%3D%3D)

Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie,

Prices keep rising, paychecks aren’t going as far, and unemployment is at its highest point since the pandemic. But instead of doing anything they can to help working families, Washington Republicans are doubling down on policies that inflict more economic pain. They gladly stand behind their Big Betrayal Bill, which slashed critically important benefits like food assistance and Medicaid, cutting off support for millions of families who need it most. At the same time, they’re backing tariffs that drive up prices on everyday goods, making groceries, gas, and household essentials even more expensive. **That’s the GOP’s economic agenda: higher costs, fewer protections, and more pain for working people.** We need stronger leaders who will fight like hell for us and put working families first, not their billionaire donors. clean_body: A better future is possible — but we need you with us to build it. | Team, take a look at this headline: = Across the country, families are feeling the squeeze. Prices keep rising, paychecks aren’t going as far, and unemployment is at its highest point since the pandemic. But instead of doing anything they can to help working families, Washington Republicans are doubling down on policies that inflict more economic pain. They gladly stand behind their Big Betrayal Bill, which slashed critically important benefits like food assistance and Medicaid, cutting off support for millions of families who need it most. At the same time, they’re backing tariffs that drive up prices on everyday goods, making groceries, gas, and household essentials even more expensive. That’s the GOP’s economic agenda: higher costs, fewer protections, and more pain for working people. We need stronger leaders who will fight like hell for us and put working families first, not their billionaire donors. That’s why we’re working so hard to recruit, train, and elect a new generation of changemakers who can take on Washington Republicans and win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. My path to Congress was anything but typical.
I grew up the son of Vietnamese refugees. I worked in my family’s corner store, served in the Army, and later opened a small business. Those experiences are why I fight so hard for working families, families like mine.
My parents came here after the fall of Saigon determined to give their kids a better life. They worked long hours in their corner store, relying on Medicaid and food assistance when times got tough. Those programs gave us a foothold, and I chose to serve in uniform to give back to the country that gave us a chance.
I never expected to run for office. But when I saw politicians disappoint us by siding with the wealthy and powerful time and again, I couldn’t stay on the sidelines.
Now, after flipping CA-45 by just 653 votes, Republicans are pouring millions into this district because they know control of the House could come down to this seat.
**[That’s why I need your support. Every grassroots donation sends a message: CA-45 is not for sale. Can I count on you to chip in $3 ahead of the important end-of-quarter deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115600886/570857186/1527952032?refcode=em-9.20.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODNlMWU3NDAtNDM5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ki3pAm_YC6T9DyqmdZWsLRTVr03nYSS8Nbm9jkiT7Ps=)**

name: Laura Friedman & Eric Swalwell
subject: Kristi Noem is a threat to our democracy

body:
Enough is enough | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115601669/570859579/-1623651544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgwYjM4YzItNDM5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hP9i5v5wPqC8sysFZyjrHacl3onK7PWLCAbTX2QKlOw=) Hey there, I know you’ve probably seen the disturbing videos of ICE agents violently detaining immigrants — and in some cases, even American citizens. **We cannot and must not normalize this.** While the White House and Kristi Noem churn out memes and photo ops to claim they’re “tough on crime,” we know the truth: their actions are not about safety. They are about fear. They are about control. And they are about undermining the very foundation of our democracy. **We need your help fighting their injustice.** | ****[Chip In](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115601671/570859581/1980468985?refcode=em-9.20.25-partner-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgwYjM4YzItNDM5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hP9i5v5wPqC8sysFZyjrHacl3onK7PWLCAbTX2QKlOw=)****
---
Let’s be clear: **Kristi Noem is not protecting our communities — she is threatening them.** Every violent detention, every unconstitutional stunt, every attempt to silence dissent is part of a dangerous agenda that divides us, weakens our democracy, and erodes our freedoms.
**We’ve seen this playbook before — scapegoating immigrants, attacking marginalized communities, and concentrating power in the hands of the few. It’s cruel, it’s un-American, and it has to stop.**
That’s why we are building a grassroots movement strong enough to hold Noem and her MAGA allies accountable. But we can’t do it without you.
[**Chip in today to help us fight back against Kristi Noem’s attacks on democracy and defend the values this country was built on.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115601673/570859583/1980468985?refcode=em-9.20.25-partner-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDgwYjM4YzItNDM5Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hP9i5v5wPqC8sysFZyjrHacl3onK7PWLCAbTX2QKlOw=)

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie gave it all. We owe him this.
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, “Don’t you dare quit”

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bbTu/?__vbtrk=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend,
---
I don’t write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can’t stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bbTu/?__vbtrk=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don’t you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That’s what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it’s to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie’s vehicle to save America. **He didn’t just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie’s work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let’s make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That’s how we honor him best.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bbTu/?__vbtrk=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bbTu/?__vbtrk=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We’ll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bbTu/?__vbtrk=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bbTu/?__vbtrk=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzIwMzIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=320321&trkid=934906363&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: I’m running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished — and I’m ready to keep going.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=kHNwbNrJacMPTk2q1Mp%2BmZU0Cbax4eW3s9KrzkHMXLUc%2Fk4dZkqX2liF%2FtizBik5UMUJSBAEBnFZxo9Wx68aS2I7wCcomAa8yda%2F72thMSTcpMmBAo1TIZqJXa7BnVyj5d1bnjhurRTmaNYJI3PhjWOXXM0tuBfh48mx7dQ2xFPr2aig6fX9zpnIFqC3u9APx5hIpNKjrbw26SGoojbt6hTt7hBevdrNmAlKoLaapaeRYrK%2FuDigUiKelxJvJuNEVQAVMWjoeLBt9lvSKMPlakh7C%2B%2F%2BqblRBjlWbohl5hET3PLTw9UUyMbozbs6S%2FgEFEtRa3kcMz3vqJwvDUcok%2Fmmm0HvujmOxcFBKGuS7UQoQPotH9Z70ZXOcFPckHxFoukEIiEywZzo2QYi%2BljY7dCjFkwSP%2B0TiDcM1xmWcVc%3D)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115602431/570860603/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_092025_LAUNCH_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODMzZjcxOS00NDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbiLfrJ8SNBgqJdcQP5ZfviQiJ26IEB-0qhaYzw65VA=) Hey, it’s Gabe. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running for re-election to keep representing New Mexico’s 2nd District. Running for office wasn’t always the plan. I didn’t grow up dreaming of a life in politics. I was raised by a single mother who came to this country from Mexico with nothing but hope, grit, and a whole lot of determination. She worked long hours and made tough sacrifices. And everything she did — every value she passed on — taught me the importance of service, of hard work, and of speaking up when something isn’t right. That’s why I ran in the first place. Because I saw our communities being ignored. I saw politicians more interested in power than in their people. And I knew I had to step up. Since winning our first campaign in 2022, I’ve traveled across southern New Mexico, meeting people who inspire me every single day. Families working multiple jobs, neighbors looking out for one another, and communities doing everything they can to build a better future for the next generation. They remind me why this work matters. And why I keep fighting. We’ve made real progress together — protecting our public lands, expanding access to healthcare, and building a stronger economic foundation for working people. But we’re not done. Not even close. Right now, some of the most fundamental rights in this country are under attack. Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are targeting this seat because they know just how important NM-02 is to maintain control of the House. They’re pouring tons of money into this district, and they’ll stop at nothing to flip it. We can’t let that happen. This is a moment to stand together, because the stakes couldn’t be higher. If you believe in protecting our democracy, our freedoms, and the communities too often pushed to the margins, then I’m asking: [Will you chip in to support my re-election campaign — so I can keep fighting for the people of New Mexico’s 2nd District and continue the work we’ve started together?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115602432/570860604/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_092025_LAUNCH_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODMzZjcxOS00NDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbiLfrJ8SNBgqJdcQP5ZfviQiJ26IEB-0qhaYzw65VA=) | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115602435/570860605/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_092025_LAUNCH_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODMzZjcxOS00NDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbiLfrJ8SNBgqJdcQP5ZfviQiJ26IEB-0qhaYzw65VA=)
---
Let’s get to work.

clean_body: I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished — and I’m ready to keep going. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hey, it’s Gabe. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running for re-election to keep representing New Mexico’s 2nd District. Running for office wasn’t always the plan. I didn’t grow up dreaming of a life in politics. I was raised by a single mother who came to this country from Mexico with nothing but hope, grit, and a whole lot of determination. She worked long hours and made tough sacrifices. And everything she did — every value she passed on — taught me the importance of service, of hard work, and of speaking up when something isn’t right. That’s why I ran in the first place. Because I saw our communities being ignored. I saw politicians more interested in power than in their people. And I knew I had to step up. Since winning our first campaign in 2022, I’ve traveled across southern New Mexico, meeting people who inspire me every single day. Families working multiple jobs, neighbors looking out for one another, and communities doing everything they can to build a better future for the next generation. They remind me why this work matters. And why I keep fighting. We’ve made real progress together — protecting our public lands, expanding access to healthcare, and building a stronger economic foundation for working people. But we’re not done. Not even close. Right now, some of the most fundamental rights in this country are under attack. Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are targeting this seat because they know just how important NM-02 is to maintain control of the House. They’re pouring tons of money into this district, and they’ll stop at nothing to flip it. We can’t let that happen. This is a moment to stand together, because the stakes couldn’t be higher. If you believe in protecting our democracy, our freedoms, and the communities too often pushed to the margins, then I’m asking: = | | = Let’s get to work. — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Team Bonta
subject: 🎉 Sign Rob’s birthday card!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250920 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250920]
Monday is a special day: it’s Attorney General Rob Bonta’s birthday!
Rob is a tireless defender of our rights and freedoms. In the 34 weeks since Trump took office again, he’s filed 39 lawsuits against the administration’s lawlessness, overreach, and corruption. He’s standing up to Trump and his cronies throughout their unlawful power grabs, dangerous and unprecedented orders, and unconstitutional trampling of our foundational democratic rights, like the right to vote.
But that’s not all. Rob is holding corporations accountable, tackling crime and fraud, and making sure California remains a place where every family can feel safe and protected. In this difficult moment, his leadership has never mattered more.
That’s why we’re organizing a surprise birthday card filled with messages from his strongest supporters — to remind him how much he’s appreciated, and to show him the incredible grassroots team that powers all of his work.
Will you add your name to Rob’s birthday card today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/leuukAKGv0m5Va7PWDYshA2]
SIGN THE CARD [https://secure.ngpvan.com/leuukAKGv0m5Va7PWDYshA2]
You are the reason Rob keeps fighting every single day, and we know your message will mean the world to him. So please, please take a moment to sign the card before Monday and help us make his birthday extra special.
Click here to add your name to Rob’s birthday card — and if you’d like, leave a message of support, too! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/leuukAKGv0m5Va7PWDYshA2]
Thanks for everything you do.
—Team Bonta
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250920]
To contribute via check, please address to:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Thank you for supporting Rob Bonta. Grassroots supporters like you help us protect California’s working families, advance criminal justice reform, and keep our communities safe. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to protect and serve the people of California, we need you with us every step of the way.
If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, click unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tsXL_NR2qEmgRRek5GtgsA2?unsubscribedata=fJOzwHEQ202Q0rq9N3S24gXIi25MvzMc4a9yqwcMQGLdO4eGO5dloLbGQBtE3RVzORUnOLJY6p44gg%2BQgaUWXz4l1Cqwx44fmaqPb5A9XiGzUoKup76786quXHzenQxKiHZQ9C4HjyTWXSOMFTofi64fKqOJX5UoFmDXAr4hGjCA0Z02pSSpu6V37oyxLLd8FER786rhoFbJ03FLhqUnNQ84TonYO5BERI644GSikgAzQmGFTHiO%2By6gt2WlmoewQpHEMacn0HEUxT44Ey2BI6yW7yL63T97W%2F90O19FVbla0HE51vcG8RrshSYmttYcIJfjfDt5GUWiwMmhqjEyC3064YZYQlm12yuuN9XugV1lq0wEsy7zkPxEX%2Bl2Ic%2BnTG84elKd9AaU0LvGp6DZ5WmZcD2Tr9TpN1G%2BtfcSZaZmyWRRTaDfyVjuNHI9pD2v .

clean_body: [] Monday is a special day: it’s Attorney General Rob Bonta’s birthday! Rob is a tireless defender of our rights and freedoms. In the 34 weeks since Trump took office again, he’s filed 39 lawsuits against the administration’s lawlessness, overreach, and corruption. He’s standing up to Trump and his cronies throughout their unlawful power grabs, dangerous and unprecedented orders, and unconstitutional trampling of our foundational democratic rights, like the right to vote. But that’s not all. Rob is holding corporations accountable, tackling crime and fraud, and making sure California remains a place where every family can feel safe and protected. In this difficult moment, his leadership has never mattered more. That’s why we’re organizing a surprise birthday card filled with messages from his strongest supporters — to remind him how much he’s appreciated, and to show him the incredible grassroots team that powers all of his work. Will you add your name to Rob’s birthday card today? [] SIGN THE CARD [] You are the reason Rob keeps fighting every single day, and we know your message will mean the world to him. So please, please take a moment to sign the card before Monday and help us make his birthday extra special. Click here to add your name to Rob’s birthday card — and if you’d like, leave a message of support, too! [] Thanks for everything you do. —Team Bonta DONATE [] To contribute via check, please address to: Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026 c/o Deane & Company 1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201 Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie gave everything. We must too.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpihhlbh6ld8whnnxkg4qliqeulqic49ix2vcrus0pyzygln49l2je7gz8xb48ihigyl74vyjag2s3mqzjjybxkskf5u0p6&__stmp=t2wdpy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit" | | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wdpy&__onlt=h)
---
Friend,
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can't stay quiet._ **Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wdpy&__onlt=h)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie. America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on.** _We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don't you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth. That's what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight. **And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible.** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right. Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn't just start a movement... _he started a revival._** And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision... **_Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today._** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wdpy&__onlt=h)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wdpy&__onlt=h)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wdpy&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2wdpy&__onlt=h)

Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

When district lines are drawn fairly, every vote carries equal weight, and our representatives are chosen for and by the people.

But in Texas and Missouri, those principles and district lines are under attack. Republicans know the American people reject their extremist policies, so they’re trying to cheat their way to power instead of winning elections fairly.

Gerrymandering silences voices, dilutes votes, and erodes trust in our democracy. Republicans are going to these extreme lengths because they know they’ve already destroyed the people’s trust with the Big, Ugly Bill – and all they care about is clinging to power to push their radical agenda.

**_But we can’t let them cheat their way into more power._**

subject: Don’t let Trump erase history – Sign today
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) **THIS JUST IN:** [**The Trump Administration Ordered the National Park Service To Take Down Some Materials on Slavery and Native American History**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=3&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) 10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA [
**Sign our nationwide petition:** [ **Stop Trump from erasing American history and dismantling our federal institutions → ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=5&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=6&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB)
| [ADD MY SIGNATURE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=7&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB)
---

This is **TERRIFYING,** team...

The Trump administration has directed [ **several National Park Service sites to remove materials related to slavery and Native American history,**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=8&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) including an 1863 photograph of a formerly enslaved man that became one of the _most compelling images of the Civil War era._

This instruction stems from Trump’s [**“Restoring Truth and Sanity to American History”**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=9&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) order, that demands federal institutions remove or cover up materials that “inappropriately disparage Americans”. [ **In other words, team, Trump wants to white-wash and gloss over incredibly important parts of American history. ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=10&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) We refuse to let Donald Trump take over our institutions and erase history, team, but we can’t do it alone.

[ **We need to prove that Americans NATIONWIDE want to see Trump’s racist fever dream brought to an end! ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=11&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) [ **If you’re with us, add your name to our petition ASAP!! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=12&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) [ADD MY SIGNATURE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69151?t=13&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB)
---
Your signature has never been more important, friend.

Fight For Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=14&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=15&akid=23419%2E4449941%2E7CSylB)

I’ve been out knocking on doors in our district — **because nothing is more powerful than a face-to-face conversation with a voter.**
It’s how we connect, it’s how we share what’s at stake, **_and it’s how we win._**
But here’s the truth: for every door I knock, there are thousands more that our volunteers need to reach.
And powering that ground game takes resources — printing literature, training canvassers, and making sure no neighborhood is left behind.
**_That’s where you come in._**

It’s how we connect, it’s how we share what’s at stake, and it’s how we win. But here’s the truth: for every door I knock, there are thousands more that our volunteers need to reach. And powering that ground game takes resources — printing literature, training canvassers, and making sure no neighborhood is left behind. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Trump is coming after birth control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, if you’re worried that abortion bans will turn into contraception bans, now is the time to sound the alarm — loudly.
Last week, the New York Times reported that the Trump Administration ordered $10 million in contraceptives to be destroyed. USAID purchased these birth control pills, IUDs, and hormonal implants to support women’s health and economic opportunity in low-income countries.
This should not be controversial. But since Elon Musk and DOGE gutted USAID earlier this year, billions of dollars in foreign aid has been cut off — even when that aid, like contraceptives or even food, have already been purchased.
Over the summer, the Trump Administration incinerated enough emergency food to feed 27,000 starving children for a month — 500 tons of aid. In that case, they said the food had expired. (The U.N. had offered to distribute it before then — the administration declined.)
Here’s what they claimed about the contraceptives:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
So, first of all, none of the destroyed contraceptives were abortifacients — meaning a drug that induces an abortion — in part because USAID is already prohibited by law from procuring abortifacients!
But second of all, let’s be clear about what the Trump Administration is saying here. They’re saying that they consider birth control pills and IUDs to be abortions.
This is a really big deal. It makes clear that the anti-choice movement sees birth control as their next big battle after overturning Roe v. Wade. We *must* take action at the federal level to protect the right to contraception.
I’m a proud co-lead of the Right to Contraception Act, and am grateful to have the support of more than 200 of my Democratic colleagues on that bill. Birth control isn’t a substitute for abortion rights — but it’s an absolutely vital part of our freedom and wellbeing.
We know we can’t pass this legislation in the triple minority — so step one of winning this fight has to be winning back control of the House.
I’m 100% committed to the fight for a Democratic majority. My team and I are mapping out all our plans for the next year — supporting vulnerable Democratic incumbents, backing strong Democratic challengers, and winning my own re-election here in CA-51.
But we can’t do it alone. Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to support our work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
There’s so much we need to do, and we can only get it done if we go all-in on flipping the House.
Thanks for being with me in this fight!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

body:

---
_**Here's what happened:**_
Last November 2024, Harris County held the general election...you remember it, right?
The one where **DONALD J. TRUMP** defeated Kamala Harris for US President.
Well...political insiders noticed the numbers were WAY off in Harris County "Central Count" where the ballots are officially tabulated. In fact, Election Judges where raising concerns and being escorted out by police for raising these red flags when all manner of inappropriate handling of ballots occurred right before their eyes.
You remember, right? It was all over the news...
**"Texas Secretary of State JANE NELSON vows BIGGEST Election Audit in TEXAS HISTORY to take place in Houston Harris County Texas"**
# and then NOTHING!
|
---
...SOS Jane Nelson, appointed by and reporting to Texas Governor Greg Abbott, let the same corrupt machine perform the "audit" rather than send in Texas National Guardsmen...a trusted outside 3rd party.
Well...one glance at public data and any thinking individual could clearly see a massive problem.
## Over 600,000 dead people, non-Harris County Residents and people that had moved since the last time they voted were STILL on the voter rolls ILLEGALLY by Texas State Law and 205,000+ somehow VOTED?
Texas State Law Code REQUIRES the County PURGE its voter rolls each month comparing it with the United States Postal Service "Change of Address Database".
THIS is Texas LAW
https://codes.findlaw.com/tx/election-code/elec-sect-15-022/
**Harris County has NOT purged its voter rolls in years.**
So, over 205,000 illegal ballots were cast in the November 2024 election.
This is mystifying and down right non-sensical.
## JANE NELSON (Texas SOS) and GREG ABBOTT (Texas Governor) know full well that Harris County submitted FRAUD in their official "certified" election.
Here's how: When you go to vote in a polling location, the very first thing you do is present your Texas State Drivers License or Texas State issued ID. Election workers SWIPE your ID and compare and log with the Texas Dept of Public Safety registry database.
If 205,000+ people has actually shown up and presented their Texas ID, we would have that record...We don't. We don't have that record because it NEVER occurred for those 205,000+ fraudulent ballots.
And if it did, by the testimony of people on this list of 205,000+, the ones that are not dead (because some of them were actually dead at the time of the election) they'll swear they NEVER set foot in a polling location or cast a ballot in the November 2024 election because they don't live here.
NOW do you see how the Harris County Election SCAM works?
Good Samaritan and Patriot hearted citizen Dr. Steven F. Hotze mobilized immediately to file a lawsuit against Harris County for perpetrating this fraud.
Governor Abbott did NOTHING and held ALL the power cards at that point and refused to act...AGAIN.
HOTZE's Lawsuit for the People WON its first hearing to start discovery in Texas State District Court here in Houston Texas.
Here is what your corrupt Harris County did:
They spent your tax dollars to delay "discovery" and filed an appeal arguing that YOU have NO STANDING in election fraud.
Texas Court of Appeals will almost unanimously rule to uphold the lower court and START DISCOVERY exposing the fraud.
Wherever you see Dr. Steven F Hotze, walk up to him and **thank him** for filing this lawsuit to expose the corruption.
HOTZE is the only one fighting for us many times having filed more than 23 lawsuits were our government LIED, forced masks, lockdowns, business closings, and more.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: If we capitulate, it will be the end of our country…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I know I’ve written a lot here, but I ask that you bear with me and read every word all the same.
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b43ca33c48c14557841d0d880426b0fc&_e=7-XD_kgi1tycrliXWvbzDsbYI3pjDlolucvxsTSyfOk6pDog7n3H61cndg5e-CqcpnZ2uJAafypL1AEmM4WA76aAV9zbFOzFhhCxCB8uTwng03iDydUbW5utcn7IjTRA4Wils0M4l1XNOBsdMzQhe7vsXacbgAsXjD9LpLXKIVMTbVu9IbdVu9A7XozUj_nsYwCvU-2zPrEP0RlD5CR0Vg0PShhMX4i0ut2MIIoBVoYoH1oN22I5X714RCmTNhI8e2FJn2v93UWfrJk8mswGHzzUDXGdLG_gtmtBZLJXth-snlAzZIdCoYygfY3BFK6BpyjIw7VATSFRxprpM7TsxcSCTthlNnh9pV9--2Loadd8fbWeSfPclFSvqGfUrbO2-YLGKmxjyq4FbwkvPc3KJWXDlsLI8cJZdLYGrFr6eENHSLjLjXpmlxUQLpukg9G-hYfCsB7pxFI-jXBiaN-eF8VOWDW_aCW9u9lUTsl-CA00s14Viz74VseGYUiLCbyzgtdpkRuGcptuiM1v8GFbq_gh493TGlBA-eJdTvY_Kr6tAOomebgw9O-lVyEjzirRtA_D9C6GGEcAcPiQn3D8YXQVIbZrRYFbF_J8Ju5vRAOSOoZUWNz7D-LPXTbRwWyjK0B4VzQscK8nYKo23PoWyw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Given recent events, I felt compelled to write this letter. I know I’ve written a lot here, but I ask that you bear with me and read every word all the same.
---
**Simply put, the radical Left is a sickness.**
---
Among its extremism, dissent is no longer allowed.**
---
And if we capitulate, the First Amendment will vanish right before our very eyes.
---
Their goal, as we’ve seen dating all the way back to President Trump’s first term when I defended him from one of the most vile witch hunts in history, is not to prove their opponents wrong...
---
**_...No, it is to utterly destroy us – professionally, financially, and personally – by any means necessary._**
---
Make no mistake, the radical Left has proven above all else that they have an ideology of _zero_ _tolerance_ and destruction.
---
**Why else do you think there would be monsters out there who chose to _celebrate_ and _promote_ the senseless assassination of Charlie Kirk?**
---
We cannot be silent in the face of their madness, Friend. Anyone celebrating or justifying the act of MURDER as an acceptable response to speech that you disagree with is a threat to civil society and the future of America.
---
**That’s why I’ve taken on the mission of EXPOSING as many of these vile radicals as I possibly can:**
---

__
---
But let me be clear, these kinds of radical leftists are not as rare as you might think. Believe me, I know personally what they will throw at you to try and ruin you.
---
There are Democrats who _still_ make it their top priority to harass and ruin those close to our President – _including yours truly..._
---
**In fact, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial just months from now for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in state court.**
---
**It’s truly a diabolical plot from the Left, but sadly, at this point, it should come as no surprise; they intend to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**
---
_I’ve been left with no pardon, no protection (especially after they stripped me of my law licenses!), and no cavalry coming over the hill._
---
They think they've finally got me in their trap.
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me: **_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON”**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b43ca33c48c14557841d0d880426b0fc&_e=7-XD_kgi1tycrliXWvbzDsbYI3pjDlolucvxsTSyfOk6pDog7n3H61cndg5e-CqcpnZ2uJAafypL1AEmM4WA76aAV9zbFOzFhhCxCB8uTwng03iDydUbW5utcn7IjTRA4Wils0M4l1XNOBsdMzQhe7vsXacbgAsXjD9LpLXKIVMTbVu9IbdVu9A7XozUj_nsYwCvU-2zPrEP0RlD5CR0VtjRhqxMlGwLPd4n-P5XGbVmyTxKoaGp3Flz-zZzL4tReO7puU3YZAs_hCpYvIY0YZKI9T8WEXkbyILNQK2_hrkosyPpcT_hIgxpQmgYORhBTcPt1ATW92Bn56fryb3PQV1lyQ2k3OyKmIe941RxSUeZ_zvfHvwPNPPM85Ds26incs-YjKTlIRHMZOpCd_r45eZ9R0XyzuU1RnwmGwL76p1QbLJeyJyFSYlCzCKMQFfpkHrjkogxNb0-KfZnb4Ao4MgTZn4plZsTEW8QTETqTqsTGwz8OVH7DKprf8DSJdzlausliF-Ifrgvim1RbERcmJWZ_q02Y4Xr2N9QaKDrwyXm_LnyFx7i16QGgJYJRi1iDHRLwlnv3JZ_cA2U3t-LSO5rMC2lzWKs1wx-IiZ5yDVHKRWtQjnzE7w1y7TaypqMuWA6fy72M1eVu3BjikInDQ%3D%3D) — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b43ca33c48c14557841d0d880426b0fc&_e=7-XD_kgi1tycrliXWvbzDsbYI3pjDlolucvxsTSyfOk6pDog7n3H61cndg5e-CqcpnZ2uJAafypL1AEmM4WA76aAV9zbFOzFhhCxCB8uTwng03iDydUbW5utcn7IjTRA4Wils0M4l1XNOBsdMzQhe7vsXacbgAsXjD9LpLXKIVMTbVu9IbdVu9A7XozUj_nsYwCvU-2zPrEP0RlD5CR0VkAD3sOQSM2X41GPtddL1U1IoQy8woAEX6nD2gv-XbrU-SAJoLzvn-unq9p5mlI0oPEFmykXkLsxR1YtgubT_RIHOYSPdu_ZNp6RftuSck0y0Tqms39zKTHdBOrDaYSsIsJmBlbEkpjcRMMkVRcWJrlo7kQnCPmykV4HC7eFJ1E95EWBjMB95VFSWEZsVy3hjuqw-O14EAbW1qYxjdvqpUSLDyPXMGI-HAgCanmo_1Dfmxj4COAtoRu6FuNRoIeehC3z0CIIyNqhDcmbqZ6ds-I5lhz6bpcSwNVQ3GN3wE0p1SobWk_VzY5zvr7s2a9QAweo01ogevzLIzqKXdEoJT4S8h60d5v2GTrU-7C9QNwzEFSYs19rPeVeNVffrKdGlD3e4sE1z-pZfmg6UgLOJgql7HpeZ8usXnj_8GHZ6J_v5yNyD0Hhld5fH9W_MJIKvg%3D%3D)

clean_body: I know I’ve written a lot here, but I ask that you bear with me and read every word all the same. | Friend, Given recent events, I felt compelled to write this letter. I know I’ve written a lot here, but I ask that you bear with me and read every word all the same. Simply put, the radical Left is a sickness. Among its extremism, dissent is no longer allowed. And if we capitulate, the First Amendment will vanish right before our very eyes. Their goal, as we’ve seen dating all the way back to President Trump’s first term when I defended him from one of the most vile witch hunts in history, is not to prove their opponents wrong... ...No, it is to utterly destroy us – professionally, financially, and personally – by any means necessary. Make no mistake, the radical Left has proven above all else that they have an ideology of zero tolerance and destruction. Why else do you think there would be monsters out there who chose to celebrate and promote the senseless assassination of Charlie Kirk? We cannot be silent in the face of their madness, Friend. Anyone celebrating or justifying the act of MURDER as an acceptable response to speech that you disagree with is a threat to civil society and the future of America. That’s why I’ve taken on the mission of EXPOSING as many of these vile radicals as I possibly can: But let me be clear, these kinds of radical leftists are not as rare as you might think. Believe me, I know personally what they will throw at you to try and ruin you. There are Democrats who still make it their top priority to harass and ruin those close to our President – including yours truly... In fact, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial just months from now for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. It’s truly a diabolical plot from the Left, but sadly, at this point, it should come as no surprise; they intend to JAIL me for the rest of my life. I’ve been left with no pardon, no protection (especially after they stripped me of my law licenses!), and no cavalry coming over the hill. They think they've finally got me in their trap. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me: the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU.** My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Cofflation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250920-948&t=1001&akid=962%2E251025%2E8PI55S ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250920-948&t=1002&akid=962%2E251025%2E8PI55S ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

When our Republican opponent, Mike Rogers, was asked about the rising cost
of groceries, his response was:

“Oh my gosh, coffee went up. You know, horror.”

Really, Mike?

As someone who drinks more coffee than I probably should, I can tell you —
this is no joke.

When the prices of coffee, eggs, or bread go up, working people struggle
to afford the basics. That means parents skipping meals so their kids can
eat. People cutting pills in half because their grocery bill ate into
their prescription money. The list goes on.

It shouldn’t be this hard to get by,
Peter.

And MAGA Republicans love to mock this situation, saying the reason why
young adults can’t afford a house is because they spend too much on coffee
from a cafe.

But these days, it’s just as expensive to make coffee yourself. That’s
what happens when corporations jack up grocery prices to boost their
profits.

Everyone should be able to get a cup of coffee in the morning without
breaking the bank.

Everyone should be able to buy groceries without worrying about what
they’ll have to cut next.

Something’s gotta change. That’s why I’m in this race — to take on
corporate greed, bring down costs, and build an economy that actually
works for all of us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250920-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250920-948&refcode2=962_251025_8PI55S&akid=962%2E251025%2E8PI55S ]But to get there, I need your help. Will you pitch in $10
— only if you can afford it — to fuel our people-powered campaign?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250920-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250920-948&refcode2=962_251025_8PI55S&akid=962%2E251025%2E8PI55S ]Donate $10 ››

Together, we’ll show Mike Rogers that the struggles of everyday people
aren’t a punchline.

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

[ Abdul ]Abdul standing in front of a mural that says 'Everyone deserves good
coffee'
