body:
Let’s use every tool at our disposal to defeat Republicans’ anti-democracy efforts
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115607878/570869374/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ZTY4YWExLTRiOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xfqDb65TnBU7xWwAUKZuldLWuBaCWdGBvGOmHGAbq2o=&emci=dc4fc852-7d95-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=98e68aa1-4b96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter,

Have you seen the latest polling about redistricting in California? | CA PROPOSITION 50 POLL
---
Yes: 54%
No: 29%
Undecided: 17%
USJF, August 28, 2025
According to the _USJF_ , 54% of voters approve of the Proposition 50 language that would temporarily redistrict in California to fight back against Trump’s power grab in Texas.
What are the most important things this poll shows us? Voters are on board with California’s plan. Not only is this measure temporary and a direct response to the racial gerrymander in Texas that gives Republicans five more seats, but most importantly, it leaves it up to the people to decide.
**Now, more than ever, it’s crucial to do whatever we can to push back against Trump’s attempt to thwart the will of the people and rig the midterms. Right now, that means supporting this ballot measure in California and fighting back in Missouri, Indiana, and beyond.**

clean_body: Let’s use every tool at our disposal to defeat Republicans’ anti-democracy efforts | Peter, Have you seen the latest polling about redistricting in California? | CA PROPOSITION 50 POLL Yes: 54% No: 29% Undecided: 17% USJF, August 28, 2025 According to the USJF , 54% of voters approve of the Proposition 50 language that would temporarily redistrict in California to fight back against Trump’s power grab in Texas. What are the most important things this poll shows us? Voters are on board with California’s plan. Not only is this measure temporary and a direct response to the racial gerrymander in Texas that gives Republicans five more seats, but most importantly, it leaves it up to the people to decide. Now, more than ever, it’s crucial to do whatever we can to push back against Trump’s attempt to thwart the will of the people and rig the midterms. Right now, that means supporting this ballot measure in California and fighting back in Missouri, Indiana, and beyond. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, NDRC HQ = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115608280/570870531/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250920_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmMxZTA1Mi00Yzk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wUPTXWiWDGLaLk37k6Q0Q52sYBLdciPQ_3VkaZTSV5A=)

Peter, there’s a lot going on right now, but one thing I want to make clear: we will not get through this moment by throwing empathy out the door. **We need warriors _and_ empaths to stand up.** We need people who are willing to be loud, to be unabashed, and to fight back. But we also need leaders who can listen deeply to the needs of Americans. People are struggling — to afford groceries, to afford a roof over their heads, and to afford childcare. People who have spent their lives working are worried about retirement. Young people are worried they’ll never be able to afford a home. Too many politicians boast about how America’s economy recovered faster than almost any other country after the pandemic. They’re right, but _who cares?_ Nobody cares about those wins when they still feel their wallets tightening. Read the room. **I’m not doing this work to score points and win arguments, Peter — I’m fighting to build an economy that _actually_ works for working people in Vermont and across the country. ** **[If you’re with me in this fight, can I count on your support today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115608281/570870532/-1713512840?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250920_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmMxZTA1Mi00Yzk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wUPTXWiWDGLaLk37k6Q0Q52sYBLdciPQ_3VkaZTSV5A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115608282/570870533/-531189761?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250920_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmMxZTA1Mi00Yzk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wUPTXWiWDGLaLk37k6Q0Q52sYBLdciPQ_3VkaZTSV5A=)

# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2303%2E582294%2EcmCFta)
Chris Pappas is running for U.S. Senate — and he’s building a campaign powered by the people of New Hampshire, not Washington insiders or special interests.
Chris has never backed down from a tough fight. He’s defended one of the most competitive districts in the country, delivered for working families, and stood up to the MAGA agenda time and again. That’s why grassroots organizations, labor unions, and Granite Staters from across the state are lining up to endorse him.
[**Now we’re asking: Will you add your name and stand with Chris?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/em_ms_cp_20250920_1_endorse?source=em20250920-2303&akid=2303%2E582294%2EcmCFta)

**Chris would be honored to have your endorsement.**
Let’s keep this seat blue and build a Senate that puts people first.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Major updates on the situation in Gaza
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We have multiple major updates on the situation in Gaza,
Peter.

Just this week:

* Israel launched a new, large-scale ground invasion to seize Gaza City,
sending in troops and tanks while continuing to relentlessly bomb the
city where hundreds of thousands of displaced Palestinians reside.

* An independent United Nations commission concluded that Israel’s
government is conducting genocide in Gaza, and countries like the
United States that continue to supply weapons are complicit. According
to the report, “It is clear there is an intent to destroy the
Palestinians in Gaza through acts that meet the criteria set forth in
the Genocide Convention.”

* Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is discussing plans for the
“voluntary emigration” of ALL Palestinians in Gaza next month. Being
forced to leave your home and community after it's been bombed and
starved isn’t voluntary—it’s ethnic cleansing.

* At the same time as all of this, Israel’s military has ramped up
aggression on other countries, such as Yemen, where Israeli airstrikes
killed 31 people in “the deadliest strike on journalists in the Middle
East.”

As the Squad and Justice Democrats in Congress have been saying for months
on end, the U.S. must end its complicity in this genocide by halting
weapons sales to Israel.

An arms embargo and ceasefire are the bare minimum. If your congressmember
isn’t demanding those two things in order to stop genocide and ethnic
cleansing, they should lose their jobs.

Justice Democrats is working to elect even more progressive, pro-peace
leaders to Congress who reject money from AIPAC and the rest of the
anti-Palestinian lobby and will fight for human rights for ALL. We’ve
already endorsed two candidates in the 2026 Democratic primaries, and
we’re not stopping there.

Together, we can build a strong enough movement to end our government’s
complicity in the genocide and free Palestine.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250920?refcode=em20250920-37039&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37039_1203867_98TLDo&akid=37039%2E1203867%2E98TLDo ]Contribute

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250920-37039-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37039_1203867_98TLDo&akid=37039%2E1203867%2E98TLDo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37039%2E1203867%2E98TLDo

Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Tim Walz can learn from Charlie Kirk’s sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c5be009af7a54b7cba62f644da0785dc&_e=MgFXQbladZ6I8wVEK5w-gBCQJjMBHrbd2pqqfZ-uUM6XGohj-azvpbYKr74Kyj_dHdqXTSz1zG4wZx-o0DmpCaioZKKxz-UnLTH6WgkYepX4t44LewkJ-_2eKRSAeZNfTVOFmqvdarm5cIk6aLAOEZVXC_pfumJtKsVir4BlvffIIcDcPkNEc_wF1Msh7ZMChjU8XJ1ix0-VnPncJIhxqcOq4J2ivYt-eFbh2uywzYOjuuFENi2nHN0zTcakpWD2evGWVIx_m57y1JIJxaBdt8cE-R9PUaG3svNVqdIhMpN9iIq4NONUj6sUBRMtrDdAtwNCgCWp9Ou2ikBI80xOQ92S-LaubXfIKalAfu0uDTWMopSyzSj8CMHhjCkS01W-UXx2bdgli6NAmazDr9PqOe20X1DLCCGwXwOg5DWgbwJI9tiGnTST1irehDLCh_klj0BQo6WYJNfPLJoq2zu2--eoFDaZlUxCQxUW-35Gye24WQ-rC6TVjpKZZ8WswI8jPCQVXmbXfF-y-21XxsY_c9P2yAGN6vhenfty5FCcX3f-KONeSO1JY_dE7NMYlODXOuFJcxW37k7jz7cROd2OGjyI8jyV6E4t-19MEpFWChHL6ytt38KCG6ur53v54mT6ysgVdEfKrFtA0Kxjje4f2XdbFe5BkHYm2wSme4Lij-NdJtqIir4k5VvWBxs-NvgnK-uzJkv9AmABElQ9tKLBdlrxbRLxI14-9cj8Z1zHGlUvOXXGS_pFxPOTdY9fz2HiQB3GoOOhqtdba9LTQjqAaBXz8wseervZ7pE7buiXGbM%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c5be009af7a54b7cba62f644da0785dc&_e=MgFXQbladZ6I8wVEK5w-gBCQJjMBHrbd2pqqfZ-uUM6XGohj-azvpbYKr74Kyj_dHdqXTSz1zG4wZx-o0DmpCaioZKKxz-UnLTH6WgkYepX4t44LewkJ-_2eKRSAeZNfTVOFmqvdarm5cIk6aLAOEZVXC_pfumJtKsVir4BlvffIIcDcPkNEc_wF1Msh7ZMChjU8XJ1ix0-VnPncJIhxqcOq4J2ivYt-eFbh2uywzYOjuuFENi2nHN0zTcakpWD2evGWVIx_m57y1JIJxaBdt8cE-R9PUaG3svNVqdIhMpMbqhMYL2Yew_qdHPF4P6bAb7SilfaXbGdAZfMnHyCiLoI5HW4wB-l7Tb4d3OG9SaKmVu8NExiOXEkB9x8ujk9I7kIPG9aT9BBM4eG5o5ScuW86Y-A9T4iKw3I8mwFu58XjyiVf1gr_6zWCj1tQ-4mEflmebWkURfq5Xq13ZQZ4xQknEgy0jMmvRa0WFLMjgyN85Iff_aA-3bq9EMyHgYDAzOcR_d8Z4q5ODY6NT2CQOofP22p9FtuzZgVdZa7idVBaLioqkFoye0OUTG09cyIEiF4FZQu-VMU-pARiKvXbOsYbmGUNQGBtqu9DPWdqtY_EMaOSzdpz0kt8CQE5UfNRasV4dZef8gNtvNdmrS0P_Y7A3SgZPx7uegayjJsMS53qsOkclb9597dglElznpSagXKA19m49rEqXgJQl6wsBahX3tr9Ys-jSDSKnZ_L93AlH9LRprdRMMdwZia6hGFFmJiwVgw40TtBfBDKougANgUgyR-PpyiVwyeAJtgD6uQ%3D)**_.

Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. **[I would be honored if you would consider a small gift of $5 or even $10 right now to help me take my fight to the far-left and ensure that we’re able to complete this mission - for Charlie, for our children, and for the good of the entire nation](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c5be009af7a54b7cba62f644da0785dc&_e=MgFXQbladZ6I8wVEK5w-gBCQJjMBHrbd2pqqfZ-uUM6XGohj-azvpbYKr74Kyj_dHdqXTSz1zG4wZx-o0DmpCaioZKKxz-UnLTH6WgkYepX4t44LewkJ-_2eKRSAeZNfTVOFmqvdarm5cIk6aLAOEZVXC_pfumJtKsVir4BlvffIIcDcPkNEc_wF1Msh7ZMChjU8XJ1ix0-VnPncJIhxqcOq4J2ivYt-eFbh2uywzYOjuuFENi2nHN0zTcakpWD2evGWVIx_m57y1JIJxaBdt8cE-R9PUaG3svNVqdIhMpNrq6NR25CwETourwbUS5pJE-rOJHdasqKhfkjqvlrPYiOlJ7veqGGUekZ_QQwzVxPsdqSIHUdzNIDlC8Fti9u2YqKcssKzV4Zt9AXwAJqFC7hlaac5hAm3e1uyDqlCpcX9ekRWILEjtisWRlt9dbx-pcGRUjcXCU2se1QTvQLfQ-W5HsboLdzQD1mey5c27obXfAuJ0tbboZ8FvmiesMZeDNgl47GnL_G7MzPhsvImCYjOoq6Ier5-BeCMuubdZSiyBIoPftAIqi9PYeJLjmqYDc4GE-iB55gQFrNmTLo5gUNBmTEAga4C1voUlDAOMy6MpaJbk-Df3-NE31a4DqrYY8gJ5Hqm1qJxXMuhd5n-3RblH2Z6pFoznAHvUjWuSUcKrwlC7pVJoYGPVNqoZ2V8LKIyVub8v7KLXPi52oK3ZwH39BhQx9CjKMsUKF6ib0iiQiqDXEL6IuwfP2bfgydyt6ijHDoVSyPJpjpF2_BqO2AUDxxnopago-WMLwAZehY%3D)**.

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | Fellow Conservative, The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me. Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable. I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America. Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. . Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric. Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online. I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.** Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder? I can’t. Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed. Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words. They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: = Peter, I've seen a lot of tough races in my time, so let me tell you: This one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor's race is a bellwether for the entire country, the first major election of Trump's second term, and it's going to set the stage for years to come. If Abigail Spanberger doesn't win big this November, we'll be facing a rough road ahead. = = = = = = = Here's what's got me terrified, and I won't mince my words: The polls are tight. The attack ads are everywhere. And we're dealing with opponents who will gladly lie through their teeth to keep hold of power. Look, this election matters too much to let them go unanswered. There's only one shot to flip a Governor's office in 2025. It's in Virginia. And we've seen that Democratic Governors are our first line of defense against the chaos coming out of the Trump Administration. So, that's why I'm asking you to step up. The money that's coming from the other side is massive. Abigail is pushing back, but she needs more resources. = = = = = = = Thank you, James Carville By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6b6bb25688ad4d1ab484786533ca795c&_e=mfB_4dK134MWRKF5rma1XllIXt8kmXTQ_VGnhPbs-r8GCfXHeSWE1takN-V1CMX2Ett47XPBDgx5XKSj4brJB6x8jNqFzHDwLBJka_X4qRIJhiyOaI-nq211K8fkS-nx_ObrETXAhPYckhE1-_B4alxe9SUDlKhOJ7iaUQKkbIdRWVBIzloXkjesTuog4OjJaOX3nn_7tKph-2guVf5gFsts8xJoJt-Zn990-T0jh6xsBvVc6red6GeNeuJ5S3RjNmaxNYNMiOTcnC4VFHublD1u6v1nau3Udu2DHWn7ZPGR7wALqIkLW2xOzgp6ab-yPjKotlYY-vyfOGxGiOjh6KZW6qDorcwNya-tpFBdzmcoS72F0kKdUJQp2BDvED_gG2LZEXUhnsCSzxlZvvzQgRWaVuXTMUpfcl48T_YrjsY_W9Xhr4Aqzpu3gHe01dPbtsC1xjrpBKwRzIMKK47yv_1M4EhAjJnyG9uICOWQOU5uHuj1sV3ArpVT1fNKdffjYMdth0KjVBZrw33u1DK9ENB8K6YmtRsjWp9K-yWwfY0vs9i6Zm5XGOu5pXr-i7yiQU6bzmrjSvwwl4mQIAJB3qxt3UXZ1vUmpYzZfLD_GZjpgxcnRmmqcy-VVB1nAYAtYzEhgLb8NjwUdLyZVxi23A%3D%3D)

Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten.

clean_body: Friend, I recently came across a striking statistic. 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders. And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for harsher penalties. Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service? I've always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream because of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice. And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven't received justice. The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured. That's why I'm proud to support Stand in the Gap. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties finding a job Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in. Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need. There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance. Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten. This isn't about politics. It's about justice. These are real Americans -- veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens -- who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs. If we don 't fight for our fellow patriots now, who will? When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you're not just defending individuals. You are defending the soul of our country. As long as there 's breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I'll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. subject: God is moving
body:
An inspiring update for you | | [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=06bc853b6802412e9b96eb3fb20f5271&_e=EBfWiUevKPh8iHZPjQmRicNg0odsA-mZwBY4eyhpgn6ZWemyrat9Rl6ALYjz_TrHvR9tLeGSiwd7JUXOO6yNwFPPyKEdu3M8N3Agv9iVa6hjd2zCI8yHFgPfu3R0XOYAHJ-n-0w0yuQlaidJhujPj_oEIG7c7DCHIrZ3J2Z159KAAGMtN8KzO6XZlDHITcrOEYOZ_uGmwXknQQPOekjNO93SzZgYJ3EqD1McWg1lmDTfiWbDsZotdttyVPSLIg5KGqBw09R8lxKLBk4Jv24nATTY31GpwrhdAwJV6zryXIhDcSjpfzqeMLOhADxCX3lNAF7NmWWVhosnp9LFwtl-9r43GacVDyyEmADPqP6vezPW0oqhKzB2s2LhH7r87RQC1yYVmS8aB7fFva61kyhKW-84EzDdd4cBuX-bXbDyyU2oXUA_Tr1QNlccJAqscMPEX9Gm_JsDf3sjwHhfnxc4uy1CketgispkaM0bUmS3xdUnK_yJO6IEcejje3FasDvh46bbyy30ICvzFTaAaEsv8UoAA0tum0c7BL4vCRVhu4b65LRpvpt6cLhXQpd3Eab9vE8Zt5fYs3N5gnZYVDpvxc-zrdIq1hQ6CI0fzQvF12zIF7f6BIpQaCrDVtbKry7iJKTYUQGVPVQMye1KufJ_J7cBIYxUXl5GRMkLTlyIZSYvZxTUQU4Vrxlr2HkFkQkooZnOFqTfKd_zk8ZoWQQA3Km4NJ2H1cHF2p6HBXBZEA8%3D)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=06bc853b6802412e9b96eb3fb20f5271&_e=EBfWiUevKPh8iHZPjQmRicNg0odsA-mZwBY4eyhpgn6ZWemyrat9Rl6ALYjz_TrHvR9tLeGSiwd7JUXOO6yNwFPPyKEdu3M8N3Agv9iVa6hjd2zCI8yHFgPfu3R0XOYAHJ-n-0w0yuQlaidJhujPj_oEIG7c7DCHIrZ3J2Z159KAAGMtN8KzO6XZlDHITcrOEYOZ_uGmwXknQQPOekjNO93SzZgYJ3EqD1McWg1lmDTfiWbDsZotdttyVPSLIg5KVH4X738Bo2E6uHz8-POtW3qIsCCpdrk7lK3s3rH63cA7j0NrSHHil8zDmwHsqINbhbJO-4V0LpYHguAdXtabh_9T0EDJ1H7CuApVQDXcjNMRuL-q4qp5pTC_i42W89dTcBGjc10uvteXcSwy0qdtczBZldnB_VALCj95AP5nyb9-gjdK2eyzamSdpuYL00cnvMF-4YA3-NTpJYpdmg07qrkHS45fFLG8hfxwv-1kbMIvyC63B9jCFSXbUC6gTQ65VU8k6t9RdeTyQ_6OaV0ga6RaQ92hMRSiAl2kQwdNJo20hr9rhrZWmOaFam-_ACoscp_fYDQ5aHGFE6KQC_quKJmxq5VYQplb7HBrpdDXutXrNIuIayCsRPOsuvWIfCUQRWXq21OFSPfcqJ11lz6IwlhiB5iEMJJpEizzFwfTBgGXhm6LPPCxYB8QplwDRF4Zf0WDsPFz75DgvG0NPqx_qXoS2W7G5sSR_gq1AHVaJ8M%3D)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=06bc853b6802412e9b96eb3fb20f5271&_e=EBfWiUevKPh8iHZPjQmRicNg0odsA-mZwBY4eyhpgn6ZWemyrat9Rl6ALYjz_TrHvR9tLeGSiwd7JUXOO6yNwFPPyKEdu3M8N3Agv9iVa6hjd2zCI8yHFgPfu3R0XOYAHJ-n-0w0yuQlaidJhujPj_oEIG7c7DCHIrZ3J2Z159KAAGMtN8KzO6XZlDHITcrOEYOZ_uGmwXknQQPOekjNO93SzZgYJ3EqD1McWg1lmDTfiWbDsZotdttyVPSLIg5KCJN7UNYkOOH0v4h9NJm-DFWYhW28MJ-oQySTjpSA26sa9s1-K-oBUIwnwptcyvL79rjhKCJZdWiogMavuQmxp7g1hf--ncm2u563PmJAojrYzcJHv2IaCCKEv61S77gJ_viftdNXJ5ZpvUc2cDjPe8oakI5DkVAe-vwe_o5C-jqBD8LyX1DSCs0iVpQWSwHrpxeE3gYo1p5mNSBMYEiDUkrre7yXe2klAlgLprKf4o-STQKLxmB7RZ5csh_eoiaFS8jUVsi1dKTzGuAxxAeheqHg81_PMrdYD26QNgvMZdDiIR7sMGaI_t6l8Z7jLU1cbfH_ftMAA4IT0VO9otAsOrwBWCOWaP5z3QLs41MtZAS0uTfBvnlUqUdzax8UrVT3O1s8N1YXtAjK862MqfG19ESKWmsnMfsuwnfOmf5rihs725mG38XAmfkVmiul93xoP2SNlLdU1bWjSIiw00rQUJDRMsXXL5t2GkhI2stBPhU%3D)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---

clean_body: An inspiring update for you | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It 's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, " What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won 't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here 's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it. Also... Here 's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, we 're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

The leadership shake-up at Texas A&M University is the latest flashpoint in America’s raging battle over higher education, ideology, and the classroom. Mark A. Welsh III, president of Texas A&M, announced he will step down effective Friday, following days of escalating controversy over a children’s literature course that recognized more than two genders. The course, [...]

# **[Nielsen Data Over Summer Shows Slide For Some Shows](http://trk.libertyledger._hD7decjnU5m9ZbRbNQ)**
---
Jimmy Kimmel has been skating on thin ice for years with his cheap political shots and sanctimonious late-night rants. But his reckless attempt to tie Charlie Kirk’s accused assassin to the MAGA movement may finally have pushed him — and his flailing show — over the edge. ABC affiliates Nexstar and Sinclair weren’t just displeased [...]
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger._hD7decjnU5m9ZbRbNQ)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
# **[FCC Chair Issues Statement That 'The View' May Face Probe](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The fallout from Jimmy Kimmel’s suspension continues to ripple through ABC — and now another flagship program, The View, may find itself in the FCC’s crosshairs.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-yoYPm4TF3w)
# **[Clinton Promotes Book](http://trk.libertyledger.-yoYPm4TF3w)**
---
Randi Weingarten, the long-reigning teachers’ union boss, has never shied away from using her perch to push ideology instead of education. But now, she’s promoting a book that reportedly smears conservatives as “fascists.” And who’s cheering her on? None other than Hillary Clinton. Of course.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-yoYPm4TF3w)
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/1fm1UbBZsgOFrMKA6ZofKw)
# **[Kamala Discusses Her Running Mate Decision In New Book](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/1fm1UbBZsgOFrMKA6ZofKw)**
---
Kamala Harris’ forthcoming book is supposed to be a campaign reset, the kind of memoir that reframes her image and stakes a claim to leadership. Instead, it reads more like a political self-sabotage manual. The headline revelation is stunning in its bluntness: Harris admits she passed over Pete Buttigieg as her running mate not because [...]

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eb5a297-88a2-4599-900c-f7e273b8b45e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e7b1891-7290-49cf-96b8-f5c55d750724/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, Peter – it’s Wes Moore. I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Our work to make this Maryland’s decade is just getting started, and I’m incredibly grateful to have Blue Amp Action’s support in this race. Now, I’m asking if you’ll have my back, too. [ Would you please split a contribution of $10 – or any amount that feels right to you – between my campaign and Blue Amp Action? I can’t win this race without you. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T924c2d4e-97bf-4d7c-923f-8e8835ac542f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc93b12a-6c99-45ec-baf0-be7582eca4ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Over the past three years, we’ve made tremendous strides to support Maryland families. From ensuring our children receive a world-class education, to building pathways to good jobs, to lowering taxes for the middle class, I couldn’t be prouder of how far we’ve come together. But these past couple weeks have made one thing crystal clear: I am now in Donald Trump’s sights. Republicans are already gearing up to take my seat in 2026. They’re afraid of the results we’ve delivered for Maryland. From public safety improvements to funding public education, our opponents are trying to roll it all back. But here’s what they don’t know: I don’t back down from a fight. If they want to tear down our accomplishments, let them try. Peter, that’s why I need you with me. In order to stay in this fight, I’m asking for your early support as we launch our reelection so we can keep delivering results for Maryland. [Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way. I’d be so grateful if you’d split a $10 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T646d0814-a32f-4f7d-a707-1955479d358d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Elevate, Wes
---
|

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T949c1f5b-4edd-4e06-b58a-a239cf606215/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Nate Buxton
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
Peter,
I want to take a moment to introduce myself – my name is Nate, and I’m Jena Griswold’s Finance Director. My job is to make sure we have the resources needed to power this campaign all the way through Election Day.
We’re now just 10 days away from the end of the month – and the end of the quarter. That means every single contribution we raise between now and then will be included in one of the most important public fundraising reports of the campaign.
These reports aren’t just numbers. They're a signal to our opponents, the press, and everyone who has their eyes on this race about the strength of our movement. If we show momentum, we’ll have the resources we need to fight back against the attacks and stay on track to win.
That’s why I’m reaching out directly to ask: can you chip in today to help us close this quarter strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
We can’t afford to fall short this close to the deadline. Thank you for stepping up and being part of this fight — Jena and I are grateful for your support.
Let’s finish strong,
Nate Buxton
Finance Director

name: Tim Walz
subject: I’m running for reelection.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-walz?refcode=em250916twrealtexaspac [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-walz?refcode=em250916twrealtexaspac]
Peter, I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running to continue serving as Governor of Minnesota.
Here in Minnesota, we’ve cut child poverty, expanded labor rights, invested in education, made sure every student gets free breakfast and lunch at school, and so much more.
We’re putting people first — and giving folks the freedom to live their own lives the way they want to live them.
But Peter, everything we’re building is under attack. Donald Trump and his fellow extremists are dismantling basic services like Social Security and Medicare, leaving working families behind, and threatening our freedoms.
That’s why I’m running — because we’ve got a lot more work to do, and I’m sure as hell not going to let MAGA extremists flip this state red.
Will you stand with me and split a donation between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to show that we are fired up and ready to win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-walz?refcode=em250916twrealtexaspac]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tim Walz and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-walz?express_lane=true&refcode=em250916twrealtexaspac&amount=5]

Republicans want to gut your benefits and hand out tax breaks to billionaires. They think no one will notice. And if we do, they think we won’t fight back.
We’re going to prove them wrong. But to do it, we need the resources to fight back starting right now — there’s no time to waste.
If you're with me, pitch in and split a donation between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC today so we can continue showing the country that there is a better way forward. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-walz?refcode=em250916twrealtexaspac]

— Forbes Breaking News, September 19, 2025
This week, Jason stood up for the Constitution. Now it’s our turn.

clean_body: | Hi Derek — We’ve beaten MAGA extremism before – and with less than two months until Election Day, we have to do it again. The stakes? Everything from protecting abortion rights to defending working families from chaos in Washington. Virginia has always been a firewall against Trump’s extremist agenda, and now it’s the nation’s first chance to send a referendum on his administration. That’s why we launched Operation Virginia Victory – a groundbreaking coordinated campaign to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November. But here’s the truth: we can’t run phone banks, knock doors, or keep the Assembly blue without grassroots donors like you. = | ************=********** With MAGA Republicans banking billionaire dollars, we need every single supporter to step up. Virginia’s races are being watched nationally – because what happens here will set the tone for 2026. Two months out, this is where momentum is built. Let’s build it together. **********=************ — Virginia Democrats [content goes here] Forwarded this email? * * *
Outrage doesn’t begin to cover it, Friend. DOGE has our Social Security numbers and personal data. ICE has our Medicaid records. And now RFK Jr. wants an autism registry - an apparatus to scrape and stockpile information that could be weaponized against the human rights and dignity of autistic people. We know where this road leads. RFK Jr.’s registry proposal echoes the logic of eugenics - catalog, control, and ultimately dehumanize. We refuse to let that happen again. **As a proud American with a disability, I founded Able Dems to FIGHT BACK.** We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stop this dystopian agenda in its tracks - and I’m so proud that thousands of donors like you are backing our work. [**We need you with us right now. Chip in today to power this fight and protect our community.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8QkTeDxRvklnqoRpDFXVTH15wrPAfa4vGaP1peoYbvzlQl9MAlPRJqLDXFaIut3Ux0vAylW8RcaXIspBjaSMcq6owrNTvh1AVePsR3PEKhoU1rk7c5VAP8guMMQiRnGfvDEMWFe61Y83bUnQTSHqgcWqO1oyzTO__qvoXAZtI_iUG9sM_8nxXbgVcDLKLRGzIlvTJ46Fnd4lQvBKEOfvVROJYY_Jh2VpXyB7gK-21b1mdSL32Lv55rGZGC-ItunstTw/4k2/qgJXKWFES3KPUsatQMAvgQ/h2/h001.4_sb-11GFFFdMwF8v2Wd6rAOyO_s4Lm8-riimohH3Tc) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | ** **** Outrage doesn’t begin to cover it, Friend. DOGE has our Social Security numbers and personal data. ICE has our Medicaid records. And now RFK Jr. wants an autism registry - an apparatus to scrape and stockpile information that could be weaponized against the human rights and dignity of autistic people. We know where this road leads. RFK Jr.’s registry proposal echoes the logic of eugenics - catalog, control, and ultimately dehumanize. We refuse to let that happen again. As a proud American with a disability, I founded Able Dems to FIGHT BACK. We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will stop this dystopian agenda in its tracks - and I’m so proud that thousands of donors like you are backing our work. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Let’s be clear: under Trump, the National Institutes of Health floated an initiative that could create “disease registries” to “research” autism - an alarming step the Autism Science Foundation has publicly flagged. We’ve learned to expect the worst from Republican skullduggery because, time and again, they’ve shown us exactly that. We cannot stand idle as history threatens to repeat itself. An autism registry would chill privacy, corrode dignity, and undermine decades of progress toward acceptance and inclusion. This is a five-alarm fire.** Thank you for standing with us, Jeff Person, Founder, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Solar Generator
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?
| |
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21991/6374453/cfea5cefccbeb1ac049736d5eeb74da408fcbe61/dd2628e4976d205822c3fb4b52c90819d85b3b80)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
**Jim and his family lost power recently.** Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator 2500X – a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21991/6374453/cfea5cefccbeb1ac049736d5eeb74da408fcbe61/dd2628e4976d205822c3fb4b52c90819d85b3b80)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator 2500X, our most in-demand product, back in stock. This workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out – _thousands_ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator 2500X is portable and can go just about anywhere with you. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too – no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21991/6374453/cfea5cefccbeb1ac049736d5eeb74da408fcbe61/dd2628e4976d205822c3fb4b52c90819d85b3b80)

_~National Gun Owner_**

name: George Whitesides
subject: Counting on Peter's signature.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q3-2025?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

In case you missed it, I officially have an opponent.

This challenger entered the race with an endorsement from Mike Garcia – the MAGA Republican I defeated in one of the most competitive races in the country last year.

We already knew that the national GOP was out for revenge, but now it’s clear that they will do anything to flip this seat back and expand their majority in Congress.

Their leadership, or lack thereof, has devastated families in CA-27 and beyond. With only three seats separating House control, we must keep this seat blue to have a chance at the majority and holding Trump accountable.

My new opponent may have Mike Garcia’s support, but I need your help to make it known they will never have yours. I’m counting on 2,000 citizen endorsements to send an unmistakable message of strength.

So today, instead of asking for your contribution, I’m only asking for your signature of support. Can I count on your endorsement in this critical moment?

Click to endorse >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/fzrRxSxc20-YP4JXTQ1h9g2?refcode=em-9.20.25-all

Thank you,

George

Right now, Republicans are trying to redraw congressional district lines to consolidate their power and unfairly keep their grip on Congress through the midterms and beyond. They know their policies are deeply unpopular. So rather than facing their voters at the polls next year, they’re trying to silence them instead.
**Listen: Voters are supposed to choose their politicians, not the other way around.**
This NDRC is taking on this fight to block Republicans from overriding the will of the people. But as we work to defeat the anti-democracy forces who are threatening our rights and freedoms across the country, one thing remains clear: We need supporters like you in this fight alongside us.
[**Watch the video and answer President Obama’s call to action by making a donation. Eric Holder are making an urgent plea to all who care about preserving democracy in this critical moment for our country. | = Right now, Republicans are trying to redraw congressional district lines to consolidate their power and unfairly keep their grip on Congress through the midterms and beyond. They know their policies are deeply unpopular. So rather than facing their voters at the polls next year, they’re trying to silence them instead. Listen: Voters are supposed to choose their politicians, not the other way around. This NDRC is taking on this fight to block Republicans from overriding the will of the people. But as we work to defeat the anti-democracy forces who are threatening our rights and freedoms across the country, one thing remains clear: We need supporters like you in this fight alongside us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, Brianna Shamsuddoha Director of Mobilization, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Sign the Letter! [via VPP]
subject: Do you stand with Jimmy Kimmel?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Limited time to correct this >>>
| Our records show that you _HAVE NOT_ signed our letter standing with Jimmy Kimmel!

**If we don’t get enough signatures, Trump will think NO ONE in your area cares about free speech.**

_He’ll use it to cancel Jimmy Fallon and Seth Meyers next!!!_

[**So please, can you correct the record by midnight and chip in $3 to add your name? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94043?t=6&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH) | [**Chip in $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94043?t=7&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH)
---
Thank you,
The Voter Protection Project
**—LETTER ATTACHED BELOW—**
**This is what AUTHORITARIANISM looks like:**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94043?t=8&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH)
_First it was Stephen Colbert, now Jimmy Kimmel. Trump is even calling for Jimmy Fallon and Seth Meyers to be cancelled next._

**We’re APPALLED — and we REFUSE to let Trump and his MAGA mob get away with their blatant attacks on free speech.**

[**To show Jimmy Kimmel that we stand with him, we’re sending him a letter tomorrow at 9am promptly. Rush $3 to add your name before we hit send! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94043?t=9&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH)
[**Chip in $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94043?t=10&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH)
---
TO: Jimmy Kimmel
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I have your back. Dear Jimmy Kimmel,

**Thank you.** Your commitment to journalistic integrity and the truth over the years has been truly inspirational and has kept us all laughing through the MAGA madness.

While Fox News and other far-right outlets spew misinformation and conspiracy theories, you have been a constant, outstanding voice for our democracy.

**We know this is exactly the outcome that Trump and his MAGA cronies wished for — _and we are committed to fighting back tirelessly to protect the free press._**

[**So I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who will stand with your progressive values and honor your legacy, and we are so sad to see you go. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94043?t=11&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94043?t=12&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94044?t=13&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21285%2E878179%2EPoncWH)

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Legally required to report what we've raised
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
Derek,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a well-timed donation to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here's the truth:
Tonight, we have our first, official fundraising deadline of this campaign. When it ends, we're legally required to report how much we've raised.
This is the biggest election in the country and everyone will be watching: the press, the Trump administration and Republican states considering re-drawing their maps.
They're looking to see how much grassroots enthusiasm there is in opposing the Republican power grab happening everywhere.
If we report a big number, they'll know Americans are deeply opposed to their efforts to rig the next election. Plus, every donation will help us win our race here in California.
So this is a big deal. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges, the free press and those they don't like in the media.
Time is running out:
**[If stopping Trump's power grab is important to you, please contribute to help pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California and to help Adam Schiff fight for our democracy in the Senate. Our average donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are donating before this deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-caredistricting.VKsGBY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20250920_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=3&akid=9002%2E5257348%2Ev3WpRv)**

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: Erika Kirk Will Carry On Her Husband’s Mission
body:
| | |
---
Patriot,In Ecclesiastes, King Solomon wrote that mankind is to be tested by _God._ Today, we are facing such a test, yet we also know that God has prepared us with everything we need to overcome this ordeal. It was the honor of our lives to serve as board members at Charlie's side. Charlie prepared all of us for a moment like this one. He worked tirelessly to ensure Turning Point USA was built to survive even the greatest tests. **And now, it is our great pride to announce Erika Kirk as the new CEO and Chair of the Board for Turning Point USA. **All of us at Turning Point USA have a special role in carrying Charlie Kirk's mantle and completing his vision of bringing us all closer to our Lord and fostering a prosperous country for generations to come.As Charlie always said, "We have a country to save."We will not surrender or kneel before evil. We will carry on. The attempt to destroy Charlie's work will become our chance to make it more powerful and enduring than ever before. May God bless Erika, the Kirk family, and the entire Turning Point USA family.
---
**For Charlie & Very Truly Yours, **
TPUSA Board of Directors

Doug De Groote
Mike Miller
Tom Sodeika
David Engelhardt
& The Turning Point USA Family
---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Patriot!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , Patriot!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**
---
**Listen Patriot, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. __I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU!__ **

## **ONE NATION UNDER GOD!**

Friend, Under the Trump administration, we are defending our rights and restoring our identity as ONE NATION UNDER GOD!
We will always protect the Judeo-Christian principles of our founding.
For most of our country’s history, **the Bible was found in every classroom across the nation.**
Yet in many schools today, students are indoctrinated with anti-religious propaganda, and some are even punished for their religious beliefs.
**I am pleased to announce that the Department of Education is issuing new guidance protecting the RIGHT TO PRAYER in our public schools.**
I also created the first ever Department of Justice task force to eradicate anti-Christian bias.
|
---
| **TRUMP MAGA POLL**
**_Question #1:_** Do you approve of Trump defending PRAYER in public schools?
**_Question #2:_** Do you support an official task force to eradicate anti-Christian bias?

America has always been a nation that believes in the power of prayer, and we will never apologize for our Faith, EVER!
Together, we will make our country greater, stronger, more united, and more faithful than ever before.

May God Bless you,
Donald J. Trump President of the United States

For most of our country’s history, the Bible was found in every classroom across the nation. Yet in many schools today, students are indoctrinated with anti-religious propaganda, and some are even punished for their religious beliefs. I am pleased to announce that the Department of Education is issuing new guidance protecting the RIGHT TO PRAYER in our public schools. I also created the first ever Department of Justice task force to eradicate anti-Christian bias. | | TRUMP MAGA POLL Question #1: Do you approve of Trump defending PRAYER in public schools? Question #2: Do you support an official task force to eradicate anti-Christian bias? | America has always been a nation that believes in the power of prayer, and we will never apologize for our Faith, EVER! Together, we will make our country greater, stronger, more united, and more faithful than ever before. May God Bless you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate authorized’s committee. . | | P.O. BOX 13570 ARLINGTON, VA 22219 Click here to change your subscription status.

name: Eric Swalwell & Zoe Lofgren
subject: Some exciting news...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Peter,
I want you to hear this from me: Eric Swalwell has been appointed Ranking Member of the new January 6th Subcommittee .
As a former prosecutor, Eric knows what it takes to follow the facts, protect the integrity of an investigation, and uphold the rule of law. His commitment is simple: no fear, no favor, and no shortcuts . I know the Subcommittee will pursue the evidence wherever it leads and work to ensure that those responsible are held accountable.
This isn’t about politics. It’s about protecting our democracy, making sure something like January 6th never happens again, and defending the rule of law. The American people deserve a full accounting — and we won’t rest until that happens.
STAY IN THE FIGHT >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zl-eric-swalwell-partner-split-q32025?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-09-20_J6C_CTN_ES-31809_partner]
Thank you for standing with us. Together, we will defend our institutions and prove that no one is above the law.
- Eric & Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q32025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

body:
Will you please give us just a few moments to explain?
#
Peter,
**Republicans in Congress have abandoned real patriotism.**
They’re allowing an all-out assault on freedoms guaranteed in our Constitution. They’re threatening to undermine the foundation of our democracy. All while letting everyday people and working families bear the brunt of their cruel, billionaire-first agenda.
**Now, Democrats have a historic opportunity to put the GOP on defense for it.**
**[If you’re ready to join our movement to hold the GOP accountable and Elect Patriotic Democrats, please chip in $10 to become a Founding Donor today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95491?refcode=em20250920-9452&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9452%2E614464%2EOVz9Km) Otherwise, please take a moment to read this longer email about why reclaiming patriotism could be a game changer for Democrats’ strategy in 2026 and beyond.**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Elect Patriotic Democrats (a project of Heartland Patriots) will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95492?refcode=em20250920-9452&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9452%2E614464%2EOVz9Km) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95492?refcode=em20250920-9452&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9452%2E614464%2EOVz9Km) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95491?refcode=em20250920-9452&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9452%2E614464%2EOVz9Km)
---
First, let’s define real patriotism. Because we’re not talking about nationalism, or the GOP version of faux-patriotism they’ve been parading on Fox News for decades.
**Real patriotism is investing in the common good of the American people** — for working families, not out-of-touch politicians or corporate elites. **It’s defending principles like liberty, freedom, and justice for ALL** — even people we disagree with or who live differently than we do. **And it’s resisting any threat to the voice and livelihoods of working people like you.**
**At its core, real patriotism means loving your country so much that you want to make life as good as possible for the people who live, work, and build communities here.**
You don’t have to flip through your nearest newspaper very long to see how Republicans in Congress have abandoned that idea. Instead of providing more resources for working people who are already struggling to survive, they’re actively stripping them away. Instead of supporting people to actually build and raise their families, they’re attacking reproductive freedom and sowing deep divisions in our communities.
_The GOP is making life more difficult and more expensive — and we can’t let them call that patriotism any longer._
**[Elect Patriotic Democrats is dedicated to supporting Democratic candidates who are running to fight for patriotic values that benefit people like you — right now, in 2026, and beyond. Real patriotism is investing in the common good of the American people — for working families, not out-of-touch politicians or corporate elites. It’s defending principles like liberty, freedom, and justice for ALL — even people we disagree with or who live differently than we do. It’s Steny Hoyer – former House Majority Leader. I need your attention for just one minute.
This is urgent: **I am calling on Democrats everywhere to support my friend Haley Stevens in her battleground Senate race in Michigan.**

Haley’s race is one of the most critical I’ve seen in my four decades in public service. **[So please, will you join me in standing with Haley by rushing $5 for her grassroots campaign now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5785?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=807%2E49239%2EpF8ff5)**

---
I’ve served in Congress for over 40 years and seen political fights of every kind – but the threat we face from today’s Republican Party is unlike anything I’ve ever experienced.
They’re not interested in governing.
They’re not interested in the truth.
They’re interested in power – and in advancing Donald Trump’s chaotic agenda.
They’ve gutted Social Security and Medicare.
They’ve enabled election lies and fueled political violence.
And they’ve handed the reins of their party to the far-right fringe, who are driving our country to oligarchy and authoritarianism.
We cannot allow them to seize more power – especially not in the Senate.**[That is why I’m urging you to support Haley Stevens by chipping in $5 now.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5785?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=807%2E49239%2EpF8ff5)**
Haley is exactly the kind of leader we need in the Senate. I’ve served with her and let me tell you, she is tough, principled, and deeply committed to the people of Michigan.

Haley Stevens is a fighter. I’ve watched her deliver time and time again for working families.
But she’s locked in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and with Donald Trump officially endorsing her MAGA opponent and GOP megadonors dumping millions into Michigan, the stakes could not be higher. Experts say Senate control will likely come down to her race in Michigan.
**[That’s why I’m asking, null: Will you rush $5 to help elect Haley Stevens in Michigan and flip the Senate blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5785?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=807%2E49239%2EpF8ff5)**
