#### **With Trump cancelling Jimmy Kimmel, independent media 's our last line of defense. Please help keep us fighting with a Paid Subscription**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.J6dFwV7ewEyq5cTpJ_rZa3JrZaTqVgEUqGRuRxm7H8k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173966478)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f2cec96-312e-4ffc-9b50-78659b85de69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump has long produced sycophants of such stupendous mediocrity that one marvels not merely at their survival, but at their ongoing power. Mr. Kashyap Patel, Trump's Director of the FBI, is the latest example.
It would be difficult to imagine a man less suited to run a federal agency --unless, of course, one has glimpsed at the rest of the current Trump Cabinet, which increasingly resembles a low-class variety show curated by Steve Bannon after three bourbons.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9353f65-690c-4801-a41d-09c5671a70b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
To say that Patel is a bumbler is to libel honest incompetents the world over. Patel is something more extreme --a man who, when given a match, doesn't merely drop it in the gasoline but insists it is actually lemonade, lights it anyway, and then lectures the fire chief on the virtues of deregulation.
Take, for example, the gruesome assassination of conservative influencer Charlie Kirk--a tragedy of real political consequence and human cost.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ed8e89e-1368-43c1-8872-adb413ea2f84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.J6dFwV7ewEyq5cTpJ_rZa3JrZaTqVgEUqGRuRxm7H8k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173966478)
The case immediately [demanded forensic rigor, tight-lipped professionalism, and the kind of strategic discretion](https://substack.com/redirect/b3da0519-0b20-4d42-ab1f-83c303e1abe3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that one would expect from whoever is running our nation's top investigative body.
Instead, what did we get?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8f749018-ab33-4eeb-adee-1075cbb5f763?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Patel, thumbs ablaze (though not definitively opposable), took to X (Twitter) and blurted out that a suspect was in custody--two hours before law enforcement agents finished collecting the security footage from the Utah Valley University crime scene.
When the truth inconveniently emerged that first day (no suspect, no arrest, no idea who killed Charlie Kirk) Patel was forced to make a mortifying retraction. This is not just a failure of leadership; it is a failure of basic adult thinking.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fee708dc-f3fd-43ba-bb0e-480775b6c753?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[The FBI never "caught" Charlie Kirk's alleged killer](https://substack.com/redirect/53697732-bdb8-4dac-a799-d4170e0516aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A day and a half after the shooting, the suspects dad and pastor turned him in. Then, the FBI director and Trump administration sat on the news of the arrest for nine hours so that Patel's boss, Old Man Orange, could break it on Fox and Friends.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d8f53b4b-4ab8-44d5-b5ee-397cf3a173fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Later that same day, in his own rush to promote himself and play armchair prosecutor before a panting audience of half-literate MAGA cultists, [Patel went on Fox News and blithely disclosed details](https://substack.com/redirect/37060ca5-e039-41a7-ace9-d25f3fa30938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that any half-witted defense attorney will now use to argue for mistrial, tainting the public record before the yellow police tape had been removed.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc973de8-e7e6-4e4f-aa2a-d67685a2aec4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If justice is blind, Patel seems determined to gouge out its remaining eye--even if both of his can't seem to focus on the problem.
But we should not be surprised.
Patel is the same man whose first order of business as FBI Director was to [fire agents whose primary sin was doggedly investigating two things that inflame Trump world](https://substack.com/redirect/b2b68142-2532-4a04-986d-cb60efb3b8a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): the January 6 insurrection and Russia's curious fondness for the 2016 GOP Presidential nominee.
In a saner era, firing career FBI agents because they pursued criminal investigations would be called obstruction of justice. Under the Trump administration, it's called "cleaning house."
Patel's resume is not a record of public service but rather a document of ruin.
His fingerprints are smeared across every scandal Trump couldn't bury in term 1.0 -- Ukraine phone call shenanigans, National Security Council circus acts, even an attempt to moonlight as CIA deputy director with no prior experience.
Patel has always seemed to float through the corridors of Trumpian power not like a statesman, but like a fumbling drunk in a glass shop, cursing the products for breaking after he stumbles and knocks them over.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/768bc380-4070-454b-a576-85d437412c5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yet none of this compares to the gob smacking mendacity Patel displayed before Congress this past week. [Patel testified that Jeffrey Epstein trafficked young girls only to himself, no one else. Seriously](https://substack.com/redirect/2e5fcf1e-7126-4d0d-b574-831ee5b989ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/99c9cad3-d39d-4a4e-9610-9698307e0b43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Patel really insisted, under questioning from Republican Senator John Kennedy of Louisiana, "there is no credible information, none - if there were, I would bring a case yesterday - that he (Epstein) trafficked to other individuals."
Never mind that Epstein was convicted of sex trafficking and that Epstein's accomplice Ghislaine Maxwell is in prison for trafficking minors to someone. Also never mind that during the Biden administration, Patel repeatedly insisted Epstein trafficked young girls.
Or that Patel broadcast MAGA conspiracy theory claims about a democratic party pedophilia ring.
But now, as Donald Trump's FBI director and presidency protector, Patel insists the investigation information shows Jeffrey Epstein only trafficked girls to Jeffrey Epstein.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b1f23d7d-5d5f-4cd7-9c6c-72ea4826dcb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One wonders how the victims--those whose sworn accounts, corroborated by evidence and upheld in courts of law--felt hearing that their abuser ran a solo operation and did not force them to satisfy anybody else, as had been brutally seared in their memories.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/613aacaa-b172-4e88-b95d-354cff83def7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Perhaps Patel believes that the dozens of flight logs, cell phone records, photographs, and testimonies were all part of an elaborate avant-garde performance art piece. Or perhaps, more plausibly, Patel is simply lying.
This is the creepy and deranged man at the helm of the FBI. He is clearly a partisan fixer who mistakes loyalty for law and propaganda for policing.
Under Patel, the FBI is not merely politicized. It has become parodied, diminished, and transformed into a theater of the absurd where investigations begin with hash tags and end with Fox News exclusives.
There was a time when the role of the FBI Director demanded at least a passing familiarity with law enforcement, institutional integrity, and, dare we say, truth.
Today, under Trump, it merely demands that one kiss the ring, bark on command, and smear the Constitution in the name of devotion to Dementia Don. Which even includes his attempts to set up state-run media ([we're trying to provide at least some of the response to this](https://substack.com/redirect/f1a6be1f-eed3-4866-b0e9-bd578275a5ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
Mr. Patel is not an anomaly. He is the perfect mascot for a Trump administration that is fueled by narcissism, delusion, incompetence, and cruelty.
The tragedy is not just that Kash Patel holds power. It's that so many Americans are content to let him keep it.
* * *

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: MAGA is watching — we can’t miss this goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s almost time to publish our fundraising. We need to show our movement’s strength.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250920-5454-footer&t=1&akid=5454%2E420207%2E6jPF6Q)
Peter,
We’re quickly coming up on one of the most critical points of this year — our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Shortly after the end of September, our fundraising numbers will be publicly reported for everyone to see.
**And make no mistake — Trump, MAGA, and far-right extremists will be watching closely, hoping that we miss our goal as proof that our movement is losing steam.**
There’s simply too much at stake to let that happen. Because this is about so much more than just a fundraising goal — **what happens now sets the stage for the rest of this year and next year’s midterms.**
Pramila’s work is rapidly scaling up to take on Trump in Congress, build up our nonviolent resistance movement nationwide, and ensure as many people as possible are ready to push back and defend our communities against authoritarian overreach.
Pramila doesn’t take a single dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists, and that’s exactly what makes her the leader we need. But it also means she relies entirely on grassroots supporters like you to fund _everything_ this campaign does.
Every dollar makes a huge difference in proving our movement is strong, energized, and ready to win.
[**Will you chip in to help us meet our goal, fuel Pramila’s leadership, and show MAGA extremists that we’re here to win?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250920-2?refcode=em20250920-5454&refcode2=5454_420207_6jPF6Q&akid=5454%2E420207%2E6jPF6Q)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250920-2?amount=3&refcode=em20250920-5454&refcode2=5454_420207_6jPF6Q&akid=5454%2E420207%2E6jPF6Q)**
We’ll continue to be in touch with updates as we get closer to the deadline at the end of the month. Thank you for standing with us.
– Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250920-5454-footer&t=2&refcode2=5454_420207_6jPF6Q&akid=5454%2E420207%2E6jPF6Q)**

name: Team DNC
subject: Is there anything we can say today?
body:
---
Derek, Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to donate to the DNC today? What if we told you that gerrymandering Texas and Missouri was only the beginning, and that Trump and his allies are already looking at redrawing maps in states like Indiana and Florida to give themselves more congressional seats? What if we told you that unless Democrats fight back, we could have _another_ two years of Trump with no guardrails from Congress? And what if we told you that Republicans are counting on all of us becoming overwhelmed by all the news and just giving up entirely? **We can't do that, Derek — not with so much on the line.** With your donation, we can send a powerful message to Trump and his allies that Democrats are here to defend our democracy and we’re standing united. [**Will you rush a $7 contribution to help support the DNC’s efforts to continue pushing back against the GOP’s gerrymandering efforts? With $7, we can continue investing in every single Democratic state party and helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year, next year, and beyond:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250920_4617_fr&amount=7&refcode2=4617_22930333_3JB07y&akid=4617%2E22930333%2E3JB07y) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20250920_4617_fr&refcode2=4617_22930333_3JB07y&akid=4617%2E22930333%2E3JB07y)**
